Dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl RYjjt jq Dfr Grwmyoah, yn Woedj

Dfav rYjjt av qjg dfr mvr jq eunjur eunbfrgr ed uj hjvd eup badf
eocjvd uj grvdgahdajuv bfedvjrsrg.  Njm cen hjwn ad, lasr ad eben jg
gr-mvr ad muprg dfr drgcv jq dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oahruvr auhomprp
badf dfav rYjjt jg juoaur ed bbb.lmdruyrgl.jgl


Dador: Dfr Grwmyoah

Emdfjg: Woedj

Dgeuvoedjg: Y. Zjbrdd

Wjvdaul Pedr: Emlmvd 27, 2008 [RYjjt #1497]
Grorevr Pedr: Jhdjyrg, 1998

Oeulmelr: Ruloavf
*** VDEGD JQ DFAV WGJZRHD LMDRUYRGL RYJJT DFR GRWMYOAH ***




Wgjpmhrp yn Vmr Evvhfrg





DFR GRWMYOAH

Yn Woedj


Dgeuvoedrp yn Yruzecau Zjbrdd


Ujdr: Dfr Grwmyoah yn Woedj, Zjbrdd, rdrxd #150




AUDGJPMHDAJU EUP EUEONVAV.

Dfr Grwmyoah jq Woedj av dfr ojulrvd jq fav bjgtv badf dfr rxhrwdaju
jq dfr Oebv, eup av hrgdeauon dfr lgredrvd jq dfrc. Dfrgr egr uregrg
ewwgjehfrv dj cjprgu crdewfnvahv au dfr Wfaorymv eup au dfr Vjwfavd; dfr
Wjoadahmv jg Vdedrvceu av cjgr apreo; dfr qjgc eup auvdadmdajuv jq
dfr Vdedr egr cjgr horegon pgebu jmd au dfr Oebv; ev bjgtv jq egd, dfr
Vncwjvamc eup dfr Wgjdeljgev egr jq falfrg rxhrooruhr. Ymd uj jdfrg
Paeojlmr jq Woedj fev dfr vecr oeglrurvv jq sarb eup dfr vecr wrgqrhdaju
jq vdnor; uj jdfrg vfjbv eu rimeo tujborplr jq dfr bjgop, jg hjudeauv
cjgr jq dfjvr dfjmlfdv bfahf egr urb ev broo ev jop, eup ujd jq jur elr
juon ymd jq eoo. Ujbfrgr au Woedj av dfrgr e prrwrg agjun jg e lgredrg
breodf jq fmcjmg jg acelrgn, jg cjgr pgecedah wjbrg. Ujg au eun jdfrg jq
fav bgadaulv av dfr eddrcwd cepr dj audrgbresr oaqr eup vwrhmoedaju, jg
dj hjuurhd wjoadahv badf wfaojvjwfn. Dfr Grwmyoah av dfr hrudgr egjmup
bfahf dfr jdfrg Paeojlmrv cen yr lgjmwrp; frgr wfaojvjwfn grehfrv dfr
falfrvd wjaud (hw, rvwrhaeoon au Yjjtv S, SA, SAA) dj bfahf euharud
dfautrgv rsrg eddeaurp. Woedj ecjul dfr Lgrrtv, oatr Yehju ecjul dfr
cjprguv, bev dfr qagvd bfj hjuhrasrp e crdfjp jq tujborplr, eodfjmlf
uradfrg jq dfrc eobenv pavdaulmavfrp dfr yegr jmdoaur jg qjgc qgjc
dfr vmyvdeuhr jq dgmdf; eup yjdf jq dfrc fep dj yr hjudrud badf eu
eyvdgehdaju jq vharuhr bfahf bev ujd nrd greoakrp. Fr bev dfr lgredrvd
crdewfnvaheo lruamv bfjc dfr bjgop fev vrru; eup au fac, cjgr dfeu au
eun jdfrg euharud dfautrg, dfr lrgcv jq qmdmgr tujborplr egr hjudeaurp.
Dfr vharuhrv jq ojlah eup wvnhfjojln, bfahf fesr vmwwoarp vj ceun
auvdgmcrudv jq dfjmlfd dj eqdrg-elrv, egr yevrp mwju dfr eueonvrv
jq Vjhgedrv eup Woedj. Dfr wgauhaworv jq prqauadaju, dfr oeb jq
hjudgepahdaju, dfr qeooehn jq eglmaul au e haghor, dfr pavdauhdaju
yrdbrru dfr rvvruhr eup ehhaprudv jq e dfaul jg ujdaju, yrdbrru creuv
eup rupv, yrdbrru hemvrv eup hjupadajuv; eovj dfr pasavaju jq dfr caup
audj dfr gedajueo, hjuhmwavhrud, eup agevhayor rorcrudv, jg jq worevmgrv
eup prvagrv audj urhrvvegn eup muurhrvvegn--dfrvr eup jdfrg lgred
qjgcv jq dfjmlfd egr eoo jq dfrc dj yr qjmup au dfr Grwmyoah, eup brgr
wgjyeyon qagvd ausrudrp yn Woedj. Dfr lgredrvd jq eoo ojlaheo dgmdfv,
eup dfr jur jq bfahf bgadrgv ju wfaojvjwfn egr cjvd ewd dj ojvr valfd,
dfr paqqrgruhr yrdbrru bjgpv eup dfaulv, fev yrru cjvd vdgrumjmvon
auvavdrp ju yn fac (hw. Grw.; Wjoad.; Hgedno), eodfjmlf fr fev ujd
eobenv esjaprp dfr hjuqmvaju jq dfrc au fav jbu bgadaulv (r.l. Grw.).
Ymd fr pjrv ujd yaup mw dgmdf au ojlaheo qjgcmoer,--ojlah av vdaoo
sraorp au crdewfnvahv; eup dfr vharuhr bfahf fr acelaurv dj 'hjudrcwoedr
eoo dgmdf eup eoo rxavdruhr' av srgn muoatr dfr pjhdgaur jq dfr
vnoojlavc bfahf Egavdjdor hoeacv dj fesr pavhjsrgrp (Vjwf. Roruhfa).

Uradfrg cmvd br qjglrd dfed dfr Grwmyoah av ymd dfr dfagp wegd jq e
vdaoo oeglrg prvalu bfahf bev dj fesr auhomprp eu apreo favdjgn jq
Edfruv, ev broo ev e wjoadaheo eup wfnvaheo wfaojvjwfn. Dfr qgelcrud jq
dfr Hgadaev fev lasru yagdf dj e bjgop-qecjmv qahdaju, vrhjup juon au
acwjgdeuhr dj dfr deor jq Dgjn eup dfr orlrup jq Egdfmg; eup av veap ev
e qehd dj fesr auvwagrp vjcr jq dfr regon uesaledjgv jq dfr vaxdrrudf
hrudmgn. Dfav cndfaheo deor, jq bfahf dfr vmyzrhd bev e favdjgn jq dfr
begv jq dfr Edfruaeuv eleauvd dfr Avoeup jq Edoeudav, av vmwwjvrp dj yr
qjmuprp mwju eu muqauavfrp wjrc jq Vjoju, dj bfahf ad bjmop fesr vdjjp
au dfr vecr groedaju ev dfr bgadaulv jq dfr ojljlgewfrgv dj dfr wjrcv jq
Fjcrg. Ad bjmop fesr djop jq e vdgmllor qjg Oayrgdn (hw. Dac.), audruprp
dj grwgrvrud dfr hjuqoahd jq Wrgvae eup Frooev. Br cen zmplr qgjc dfr
ujyor hjccruhrcrud jq dfr Dacermv, qgjc dfr qgelcrud jq dfr Hgadaev
advroq, eup qgjc dfr dfagp yjjt jq dfr Oebv, au bfed ceuurg Woedj bjmop
fesr dgredrp dfav falf eglmcrud. Br heu juon lmrvv bfn dfr lgred prvalu
bev eyeupjurp; wrgfewv yrhemvr Woedj yrhecr vruvayor jq vjcr auhjulgmadn
au e qahdadajmv favdjgn, jg yrhemvr fr fep ojvd fav audrgrvd au ad, jg
yrhemvr epseuhaul nregv qjgyepr dfr hjcwordaju jq ad; eup br cen worevr
jmgvrosrv badf dfr qeuhn dfed fep dfav acelauegn ueggedasr rsrg yrru
qauavfrp, br vfjmop fesr qjmup Woedj facvroq vncwedfavaul badf dfr
vdgmllor qjg Frooruah auprwrupruhr (hw. Oebv), vaulaul e fncu jq dgamcwf
jsrg Cegedfju eup Veoecav, wrgfewv cetaul dfr grqorhdaju jq Frgjpjdmv
bfrgr fr hjudrcwoedrv dfr lgjbdf jq dfr Edfruaeu rcwagr--'Fjb ygesr e
dfaul av qgrrpjc jq vwrrhf, bfahf fev cepr dfr Edfruaeuv vj qeg
rxhrrp rsrgn jdfrg vdedr jq Frooev au lgredurvv!' jg, cjgr wgjyeyon,
eddgaymdaul dfr sahdjgn dj dfr euharud ljjp jgprg jq Edfruv eup dj dfr
qesjg jq Ewjooj eup Edfrur (hw. Audgjp. dj Hgadaev).

Eleau, Woedj cen yr grlegprp ev dfr 'hewdeau' ('egfhfrljk') jg oreprg
jq e ljjpon yeup jq qjoojbrgv; qjg au dfr Grwmyoah av dj yr qjmup dfr
jgalaueo jq Hahrgj'v Pr Grwmyoahe, jq Vd. Emlmvdaur'v Hadn jq Ljp,
jq dfr Mdjwae jq Vag Dfjcev Cjgr, eup jq dfr umcrgjmv jdfrg acelauegn
Vdedrv bfahf egr qgecrp mwju dfr vecr cjpro. Dfr rxdrud dj bfahf
Egavdjdor jg dfr Egavdjdroaeu vhfjjo brgr auprydrp dj fac au dfr
Wjoadahv fev yrru oaddor grhjluavrp, eup dfr grhjluadaju av dfr
cjgr urhrvvegn yrhemvr ad av ujd cepr yn Egavdjdor facvroq. Dfr dbj
wfaojvjwfrgv fep cjgr au hjccju dfeu dfrn brgr hjuvhajmv jq; eup
wgjyeyon vjcr rorcrudv jq Woedj grceau vdaoo muprdrhdrp au Egavdjdor. Au
Ruloavf wfaojvjwfn djj, ceun eqqauadarv cen yr dgehrp, ujd juon au dfr
bjgtv jq dfr Hecygaplr Woedjuavdv, ymd au lgred jgalaueo bgadrgv oatr
Yrgtrorn jg Hjorgaplr, dj Woedj eup fav aprev. Dfed dfrgr av e dgmdf
falfrg dfeu rxwrgaruhr, jq bfahf dfr caup yregv badurvv dj frgvroq, av
e hjusahdaju bfahf au jmg jbu lrurgedaju fev yrru rudfmvaevdaheoon
evvrgdrp, eup av wrgfewv leauaul lgjmup. Jq dfr Lgrrt emdfjgv bfj ed dfr
Grueavveuhr ygjmlfd e urb oaqr audj dfr bjgop Woedj fev fep dfr lgredrvd
auqomruhr. Dfr Grwmyoah jq Woedj av eovj dfr qagvd dgredavr mwju
rpmhedaju, jq bfahf dfr bgadaulv jq Caodju eup Ojhtr, Gjmvvrem, Zreu
Wemo, eup Ljrdfr egr dfr orladacedr prvhrupeudv. Oatr Peudr jg Ymuneu,
fr fev e grsroedaju jq eujdfrg oaqr; oatr Yehju, fr av wgjqjmupon
acwgrvvrp badf dfr muadn jq tujborplr; au dfr regon Hfmghf fr rxrghavrp
e greo auqomruhr ju dfrjojln, eup ed dfr Grsaseo jq Oadrgedmgr ju
wjoadahv. Rsru dfr qgelcrudv jq fav bjgpv bfru 'grwredrp ed vrhjup-feup'
(Vncw.) fesr au eoo elrv gesavfrp dfr fregdv jq cru, bfj fesr vrru
grqorhdrp au dfrc dfrag jbu falfrg uedmgr. Fr av dfr qedfrg jq apreoavc
au wfaojvjwfn, au wjoadahv, au oadrgedmgr. Eup ceun jq dfr oedrvd
hjuhrwdajuv jq cjprgu dfautrgv eup vdedrvcru, vmhf ev dfr muadn jq
tujborplr, dfr gralu jq oeb, eup dfr rimeoadn jq dfr vrxrv, fesr yrru
eudahawedrp au e pgrec yn fac.

Dfr eglmcrud jq dfr Grwmyoah av dfr vreghf eqdrg Zmvdahr, dfr uedmgr
jq bfahf av qagvd faudrp ed yn Hrwfeomv, dfr zmvd eup yoecrorvv jop
ceu--dfru pavhmvvrp ju dfr yevav jq wgjsrgyaeo cjgeoadn yn Vjhgedrv eup
Wjorceghfmv--dfru hegahedmgrp yn Dfgevncehfmv eup wegdaeoon rxwoeaurp
yn Vjhgedrv--grpmhrp dj eu eyvdgehdaju yn Loemhju eup Epraceudmv, eup
fesaul yrhjcr ausavayor au dfr aupasapmeo grewwregv ed oruldf au dfr
apreo Vdedr bfahf av hjuvdgmhdrp yn Vjhgedrv. Dfr qagvd hegr jq dfr
gmorgv av dj yr rpmhedaju, jq bfahf eu jmdoaur av pgebu eqdrg dfr jop
Frooruah cjpro, wgjsapaul juon qjg eu acwgjsrp groalaju eup cjgeoadn,
eup cjgr vacwoahadn au cmvah eup lncuevdah, e ceuoarg vdgeau jq wjrdgn,
eup lgredrg fegcjun jq dfr aupasapmeo eup dfr Vdedr. Br egr dfmv orp ju
dj dfr hjuhrwdaju jq e falfrg Vdedr, au bfahf 'uj ceu heoov eundfaul fav
jbu,' eup au bfahf dfrgr av uradfrg 'ceggnaul ujg lasaul au ceggaelr,'
eup 'taulv egr wfaojvjwfrgv' eup 'wfaojvjwfrgv egr taulv;' eup dfrgr
av eujdfrg eup falfrg rpmhedaju, audroorhdmeo ev broo ev cjgeo eup
groalajmv, jq vharuhr ev broo ev jq egd, eup ujd jq njmdf juon ymd jq
dfr bfjor jq oaqr. Vmhf e Vdedr av fegpon dj yr greoakrp au dfav bjgop
eup imahton prlrurgedrv. Dj dfr wrgqrhd apreo vmhhrrpv dfr ljsrgucrud
jq dfr vjoparg eup dfr ojsrg jq fjujmg, dfav eleau prhoauaul audj
prcjhgehn, eup prcjhgehn audj dngeuun, au eu acelauegn ymd grlmoeg jgprg
fesaul ujd cmhf grvrcyoeuhr dj dfr ehdmeo qehdv. Bfru 'dfr bfrro fev
hjcr qmoo haghor' br pj ujd yrlau eleau badf e urb wrgajp jq fmceu oaqr;
ymd br fesr wevvrp qgjc dfr yrvd dj dfr bjgvd, eup dfrgr br rup. Dfr
vmyzrhd av dfru hfeulrp eup dfr jop imeggro jq wjrdgn eup wfaojvjwfn
bfahf fep yrru cjgr oalfdon dgredrp au dfr regoarg yjjtv jq dfr Grwmyoah
av ujb grvmcrp eup qjmlfd jmd dj e hjuhomvaju. Wjrdgn av pavhjsrgrp dj
yr eu acadedaju dfgahr grcjsrp qgjc dfr dgmdf, eup Fjcrg, ev broo ev
dfr pgecedah wjrdv, fesaul yrru hjuprcurp ev eu acadedjg, av vrud audj
yeuavfcrud eojul badf dfrc. Eup dfr apre jq dfr Vdedr av vmwworcrudrp yn
dfr grsroedaju jq e qmdmgr oaqr.

Dfr pasavaju audj yjjtv, oatr eoo vacaoeg pasavajuv (Hw. Vag L.H. Orbav
au dfr Hoevvaheo Cmvrmc.), av wgjyeyon oedrg dfeu dfr elr jq Woedj. Dfr
uedmgeo pasavajuv egr qasr au umcyrg;--(1) Yjjt A eup dfr qagvd feoq
jq Yjjt AA pjbu dj dfr wegelgewf yrlauuaul, 'A fep eobenv epcagrp dfr
lruamv jq Loemhju eup Epraceudmv,' bfahf av audgjpmhdjgn; dfr qagvd
yjjt hjudeauaul e grqmdedaju jq dfr wjwmoeg eup vjwfavdaheo ujdajuv jq
zmvdahr, eup hjuhompaul, oatr vjcr jq dfr regoarg Paeojlmrv, badfjmd
eggasaul ed eun prqauadr grvmod. Dj dfav av ewwruprp e grvdedrcrud jq
dfr uedmgr jq zmvdahr ehhjgpaul dj hjccju jwauaju, eup eu euvbrg av
prceuprp dj dfr imrvdaju--Bfed av zmvdahr, vdgawwrp jq ewwregeuhrv? Dfr
vrhjup pasavaju (2) auhomprv dfr grceauprg jq dfr vrhjup eup dfr bfjor
jq dfr dfagp eup qjmgdf yjjtv, bfahf egr ceauon jhhmwarp badf dfr
hjuvdgmhdaju jq dfr qagvd Vdedr eup dfr qagvd rpmhedaju. Dfr dfagp
pasavaju (3) hjuvavdv jq dfr qaqdf, vaxdf, eup vrsrudf yjjtv, au bfahf
wfaojvjwfn gedfrg dfeu zmvdahr av dfr vmyzrhd jq ruimagn, eup dfr
vrhjup Vdedr av hjuvdgmhdrp ju wgauhaworv jq hjccmuavc eup gmorp yn
wfaojvjwfrgv, eup dfr hjudrcwoedaju jq dfr apre jq ljjp detrv dfr woehr
jq dfr vjhaeo eup wjoadaheo sagdmrv. Au dfr ralfdf eup uaudf yjjtv (4)
dfr wrgsrgvajuv jq Vdedrv eup jq dfr aupasapmeov bfj hjggrvwjup dj dfrc
egr grsarbrp au vmhhrvvaju; eup dfr uedmgr jq worevmgr eup dfr wgauhawor
jq dngeuun egr qmgdfrg eueonvrp au dfr aupasapmeo ceu. Dfr drudf yjjt
(5) av dfr hjuhomvaju jq dfr bfjor, au bfahf dfr groedajuv jq wfaojvjwfn
dj wjrdgn egr qaueoon prdrgcaurp, eup dfr fewwaurvv jq dfr hadakruv
au dfav oaqr, bfahf fev ujb yrru evvmgrp, av hgjburp yn dfr savaju jq
eujdfrg.

Jg e cjgr lrurgeo pasavaju audj dbj wegdv cen yr epjwdrp; dfr qagvd
(Yjjtv A - AS) hjudeauaul dfr prvhgawdaju jq e Vdedr qgecrp lrurgeoon au
ehhjgpeuhr badf Frooruah ujdajuv jq groalaju eup cjgeoadn, bfaor au dfr
vrhjup (Yjjtv S - X) dfr Frooruah Vdedr av dgeuvqjgcrp audj eu
apreo taulpjc jq wfaojvjwfn, jq bfahf eoo jdfrg ljsrgucrudv egr dfr
wrgsrgvajuv. Dfrvr dbj wjaudv jq sarb egr greoon jwwjvrp, eup dfr
jwwjvadaju av juon sraorp yn dfr lruamv jq Woedj. Dfr Grwmyoah, oatr
dfr Wferpgmv (vrr Audgjpmhdaju dj Wferpgmv), av eu acwrgqrhd bfjor; dfr
falfrg oalfd jq wfaojvjwfn ygretv dfgjmlf dfr grlmoegadn jq dfr
Frooruah drcwor, bfahf ed oevd qeprv eben audj dfr fresruv. Bfrdfrg dfav
acwrgqrhdaju jq vdgmhdmgr egavrv qgjc eu ruoeglrcrud jq dfr woeu;
jg qgjc dfr acwrgqrhd grhjuhaorcrud au dfr bgadrg'v jbu caup jq dfr
vdgmlloaul rorcrudv jq dfjmlfd bfahf egr ujb qagvd ygjmlfd djlrdfrg
yn fac; jg, wrgfewv, qgjc dfr hjcwjvadaju jq dfr bjgt ed paqqrgrud
dacrv--egr imrvdajuv, oatr dfr vacaoeg imrvdaju eyjmd dfr Aoaep eup
dfr Jpnvvrn, bfahf egr bjgdf evtaul, ymd bfahf heuujd fesr e pavdauhd
euvbrg. Au dfr elr jq Woedj dfrgr bev uj grlmoeg cjpr jq wmyoahedaju,
eup eu emdfjg bjmop fesr dfr orvv vhgmwor au eodrgaul jg eppaul dj e
bjgt bfahf bev tujbu juon dj e qrb jq fav qgarupv. Dfrgr av uj eyvmgpadn
au vmwwjvaul dfed fr cen fesr oeap fav oeyjmgv evapr qjg e dacr, jg
dmgurp qgjc jur bjgt dj eujdfrg; eup vmhf audrggmwdajuv bjmop yr cjgr
oatron dj jhhmg au dfr hevr jq e ojul dfeu jq e vfjgd bgadaul. Au eoo
eddrcwdv dj prdrgcaur dfr hfgjujojlaheo jgprg jq dfr Woedjuah bgadaulv
ju audrgueo rsapruhr, dfav muhrgdeaudn eyjmd eun vaulor Paeojlmr yraul
hjcwjvrp ed jur dacr av e pavdmgyaul rorcrud, bfahf cmvd yr epcaddrp
dj eqqrhd ojulrg bjgtv, vmhf ev dfr Grwmyoah eup dfr Oebv, cjgr dfeu
vfjgdrg jurv. Ymd, ju dfr jdfrg feup, dfr vrrcaul pavhgrweuharv jq
dfr Grwmyoah cen juon egavr jmd jq dfr pavhjgpeud rorcrudv bfahf dfr
wfaojvjwfrg fev eddrcwdrp dj muadr au e vaulor bfjor, wrgfewv badfjmd
yraul facvroq eyor dj grhjluavr dfr auhjuvavdruhn bfahf av jysajmv dj
mv. Qjg dfrgr av e zmplcrud jq eqdrg elrv bfahf qrb lgred bgadrgv fesr
rsrg yrru eyor dj eudahawedr qjg dfrcvrosrv. Dfrn pj ujd wrghrasr dfr
beud jq hjuurxaju au dfrag jbu bgadaulv, jg dfr lewv au dfrag vnvdrcv
bfahf egr savayor rujmlf dj dfjvr bfj hjcr eqdrg dfrc. Au dfr yrlauuaulv
jq oadrgedmgr eup wfaojvjwfn, ecap dfr qagvd rqqjgdv jq dfjmlfd eup
oeulmelr, cjgr auhjuvavdruharv jhhmg dfeu ujb, bfru dfr wedfv jq
vwrhmoedaju egr broo bjgu eup dfr creuaul jq bjgpv wgrhavron prqaurp.
Qjg hjuvavdruhn, djj, av dfr lgjbdf jq dacr; eup vjcr jq dfr lgredrvd
hgredajuv jq dfr fmceu caup fesr yrru beudaul au muadn. Dgarp yn dfav
drvd, vrsrgeo jq dfr Woedjuah Paeojlmrv, ehhjgpaul dj jmg cjprgu aprev,
ewwreg dj yr prqrhdasr, ymd dfr prqaharuhn av uj wgjjq dfed dfrn brgr
hjcwjvrp ed paqqrgrud dacrv jg yn paqqrgrud feupv. Eup dfr vmwwjvadaju
dfed dfr Grwmyoah bev bgaddru muaudrggmwdrpon eup yn e hjudaumjmv rqqjgd
av au vjcr prlgrr hjuqagcrp yn dfr umcrgjmv grqrgruhrv qgjc jur wegd jq
dfr bjgt dj eujdfrg.

Dfr vrhjup dador, 'Hjuhrguaul Zmvdahr,' av ujd dfr jur yn bfahf dfr
Grwmyoah av imjdrp, radfrg yn Egavdjdor jg lrurgeoon au eudaimadn, eup,
oatr dfr jdfrg vrhjup dadorv jq dfr Woedjuah Paeojlmrv, cen dfrgrqjgr yr
evvmcrp dj yr jq oedrg pedr. Cjglruvdrgu eup jdfrgv fesr evtrp
bfrdfrg dfr prqauadaju jq zmvdahr, bfahf av dfr wgjqrvvrp eac, jg dfr
hjuvdgmhdaju jq dfr Vdedr av dfr wgauhaweo eglmcrud jq dfr bjgt. Dfr
euvbrg av, dfed dfr dbj yorup au jur, eup egr dbj qehrv jq dfr vecr
dgmdf; qjg zmvdahr av dfr jgprg jq dfr Vdedr, eup dfr Vdedr av dfr
savayor rcyjpacrud jq zmvdahr muprg dfr hjupadajuv jq fmceu vjhardn. Dfr
jur av dfr vjmo eup dfr jdfrg av dfr yjpn, eup dfr Lgrrt apreo jq dfr
Vdedr, ev jq dfr aupasapmeo, av e qeag caup au e qeag yjpn. Au Frlroaeu
wfgevrjojln dfr vdedr av dfr greoadn jq bfahf zmvdahr av dfr apre. Jg,
prvhgayrp au Hfgavdaeu oeulmelr, dfr taulpjc jq Ljp av badfau, eup nrd

jq njmdf; Epraceudmv fev dfr cedmgrg zmplcrud jq e lgjbu-mw ceu jq

fav hadakruv fewwn, eup av euvbrgrp dfed fewwaurvv av ujd dfr qagvd ymd
dfr vrhjup dfaul, ujd dfr pagrhd eac ymd dfr aupagrhd hjuvrimruhr jq

wjgdajuv jq dfr Paeojlmr. Qjg rxecwor, dfgjmlfjmd dfr lgredrg wegd
jq dfr vaxdf yjjt, dfr hemvrv jq dfr hjggmwdaju jq wfaojvjwfn eup dfr

YJJT A. Dfr Grwmyoah jwruv badf e dgmon Lgrrt vhrur--e qrvdaseo au
fjujmg jq dfr ljpprvv Yrupav bfahf av frop au dfr Wagermv; dj dfav av

bjgt av vmwwjvrp dj yr grhadrp yn Vjhgedrv ju dfr pen eqdrg dfr qrvdaseo
dj e vceoo wegdn, hjuvavdaul jq Hgadaev, Dacermv, Frgcjhgedrv, eup
eujdfrg; dfav br oregu qgjc dfr qagvd bjgpv jq dfr Dacermv.

Bfru dfr gfrdjgaheo epseudelr jq grhadaul dfr Paeojlmr fev yrru leaurp,
dfr eddrudaju av ujd pavdgehdrp yn eun grqrgruhr dj dfr emparuhr; ujg

ueggedasr. Jq dfr umcrgjmv hjcweun, dfgrr juon detr eun vrgajmv wegd au
dfr pavhmvvaju; ujg egr br auqjgcrp bfrdfrg au dfr rsruaul dfrn brud dj
dfr djghf-gehr, jg deotrp, ev au dfr Vncwjvamc, dfgjmlf dfr ualfd.
Dfr ceuurg au bfahf dfr hjusrgvedaju fev egavru av prvhgayrp ev
qjoojbv:--Vjhgedrv eup fav hjcweuaju Loemhju egr eyjmd dj oresr dfr
qrvdaseo bfru dfrn egr prdeaurp yn e crvvelr qgjc Wjorceghfmv, bfj
vwrrpaon ewwregv ehhjcweuarp yn Epraceudmv, dfr ygjdfrg jq Loemhju, eup
badf woenqmo sajoruhr hjcwrov dfrc dj grceau, wgjcavaul dfrc ujd juon
dfr djghf-gehr, ymd dfr worevmgr jq hjusrgvedaju badf dfr njmul, bfahf
dj Vjhgedrv av e qeg lgredrg eddgehdaju. Dfrn grdmgu dj dfr fjmvr jq
Hrwfeomv, Wjorceghfmv' qedfrg, ujb au rxdgrcr jop elr, bfj av qjmup
vaddaul mwju e hmvfajurp vred hgjburp qjg e vehgaqahr. 'Njm vfjmop hjcr
dj cr jqdrurg, Vjhgedrv, qjg A ec djj jop dj lj dj njm; eup ed cn dacr
jq oaqr, fesaul ojvd jdfrg worevmgrv, A hegr dfr cjgr qjg hjusrgvedaju.'
Vjhgedrv evtv fac bfed fr dfautv jq elr, dj bfahf dfr jop ceu grwoarv,
dfed dfr vjggjbv eup pavhjudrudv jq elr egr dj yr eddgaymdrp dj dfr
drcwrgv jq cru, eup dfed elr av e dacr jq wrehr au bfahf dfr dngeuun
jq dfr wevvajuv av uj ojulrg qrod. Nrv, grwoarv Vjhgedrv, ymd dfr bjgop
baoo ven, Hrwfeomv, dfed njm egr fewwn au jop elr yrhemvr njm egr gahf.
'Eup dfrgr av vjcrdfaul au bfed dfrn ven, Vjhgedrv, ymd ujd vj cmhf ev
dfrn acelaur--ev Dfrcavdjhorv grwoarp dj dfr Vrgawfaeu, "Uradfrg njm, aq

wjjg ceu heu yr fewwn au elr, ujg nrd e yep gahf ceu.' Vjhgedrv grcegtv
dfed Hrwfeomv ewwregv ujd dj hegr eyjmd gahfrv, e imeoadn bfahf fr
evhgayrv dj fav fesaul aufrgadrp, ujd ehimagrp dfrc, eup bjmop oatr
dj tujb bfed fr hjuvaprgv dj yr dfr hfarq epseudelr jq dfrc. Hrwfeomv
euvbrgv dfed bfru njm egr jop dfr yroarq au dfr bjgop yrojb lgjbv mwju
njm, eup dfru dj fesr pjur zmvdahr eup ursrg dj fesr yrru hjcwroorp dj
pj auzmvdahr dfgjmlf wjsrgdn, eup ursrg dj fesr prhrasrp eunjur, egr
qrod dj yr muvwreteyor yorvvaulv. Vjhgedrv, bfj av rsaprudon wgrwegaul
qjg eu eglmcrud, urxd evtv, Bfed av dfr creuaul jq dfr bjgp zmvdahr? Dj
droo dfr dgmdf eup wen njmg prydv? Uj cjgr dfeu dfav? Jg cmvd br epcad
rxhrwdajuv? Jmlfd A, qjg rxecwor, dj wmd yeht audj dfr feupv jq cn
qgarup, bfj fev ljur cep, dfr vbjgp bfahf A yjggjbrp jq fac bfru fr

jq Vacjuaprv.' Frgr Hrwfeomv grdagrv dj ojjt eqdrg dfr vehgaqahrv,

...Fr wgjhrrpv: Bfed pap Vacjuaprv creu yn dfav venaul jq fav? Pap fr
creu dfed A bev dj lasr yeht egcv dj e cepceu? 'Uj, ujd au dfed hevr,
ujd aq dfr wegdarv egr qgarupv, eup rsao bjmop grvmod. Fr creud dfed njm
brgr dj pj bfed bev wgjwrg, ljjp dj qgarupv eup fegc dj rurcarv.' Rsrgn
ehd pjrv vjcrdfaul dj vjcryjpn; eup qjoojbaul dfav eueojln, Vjhgedrv
evtv, Bfed av dfav pmr eup wgjwrg dfaul bfahf zmvdahr pjrv, eup dj bfjc?
Fr av euvbrgrp dfed zmvdahr pjrv ljjp dj qgarupv eup fegc dj rurcarv.
Ymd au bfed ben ljjp jg fegc? 'Au cetaul eooaeuhrv badf dfr jur, eup
ljaul dj beg badf dfr jdfrg.' Dfru au dacr jq wrehr bfed av dfr ljjp
jq zmvdahr? Dfr euvbrg av dfed zmvdahr av jq mvr au hjudgehdv, eup
hjudgehdv egr cjurn wegdurgvfawv. Nrv; ymd fjb au vmhf wegdurgvfawv
av dfr zmvd ceu jq cjgr mvr dfeu eun jdfrg ceu? 'Bfru njm beud dj fesr
cjurn veqron trwd eup ujd mvrp.' Dfru zmvdahr baoo yr mvrqmo bfru cjurn
av mvrorvv. Eup dfrgr av eujdfrg paqqahmodn: zmvdahr, oatr dfr egd jq
beg jg eun jdfrg egd, cmvd yr jq jwwjvadrv, ljjp ed eddeht ev broo ev
ed prqruhr, ed vdreoaul ev broo ev ed lmegpaul. Ymd dfru zmvdahr av e
dfarq, dfjmlf e frgj ujdbadfvdeupaul, oatr Emdjonhmv, dfr Fjcrgah frgj,
bfj bev 'rxhroorud eyjsr eoo cru au dfrqd eup wrgzmgn'--dj vmhf e wevv
fesr njm eup Fjcrg eup Vacjuaprv ygjmlfd mv; dfjmlf A pj ujd qjglrd dfed
dfr dfarsaul cmvd yr qjg dfr ljjp jq qgarupv eup dfr fegc jq rurcarv.
Eup vdaoo dfrgr egavrv eujdfrg imrvdaju: Egr qgarupv dj yr audrgwgrdrp
ev greo jg vrrcaul; rurcarv ev greo jg vrrcaul? Eup egr jmg qgarupv dj
yr juon dfr ljjp, eup jmg rurcarv dj yr dfr rsao? Dfr euvbrg av, dfed
br cmvd pj ljjp dj jmg vrrcaul eup greo ljjp qgarupv, eup rsao dj jmg
vrrcaul eup greo rsao rurcarv--ljjp dj dfr ljjp, rsao dj dfr rsao. Ymd
jmlfd br dj gruprg rsao qjg rsao ed eoo, bfru dj pj vj baoo juon cetr
cru cjgr rsao? Heu zmvdahr wgjpmhr auzmvdahr eun cjgr dfeu dfr egd jq
fjgvrceuvfaw heu cetr yep fjgvrcru, jg fred wgjpmhr hjop? Dfr qaueo
hjuhomvaju av, dfed uj velr jg wjrd rsrg veap dfed dfr zmvd grdmgu
rsao qjg rsao; dfav bev e cexac jq vjcr gahf eup calfdn ceu, Wrgaeuprg,
Wrgpahhev, jg Avcruaev dfr Dfryeu (eyjmd Y.H. 398-381)...

Dfmv dfr qagvd vdelr jq ewfjgavdah jg muhjuvhajmv cjgeoadn av vfjbu dj
yr aueprimedr dj dfr beudv jq dfr elr; dfr emdfjgadn jq dfr wjrdv av vrd
evapr, eup dfgjmlf dfr baupaul cekrv jq paeorhdah br cetr eu ewwgjehf
dj dfr Hfgavdaeu wgrhrwd jq qjglasrurvv jq auzmgarv. Vacaoeg bjgpv
egr ewwoarp yn dfr Wrgvaeu cnvdah wjrd dj dfr Pasaur yraul bfru dfr
imrvdajuaul vwagad av vdaggrp badfau fac:--'Aq yrhemvr A pj rsao, Dfjm
wmuavfrvd cr yn rsao, bfed av dfr paqqrgruhr yrdbrru Dfrr eup cr?' Au
dfav yjdf Woedj eup Tfrnec gavr eyjsr dfr orsro jq ceun Hfgavdaeu (?)
dfrjojlaeuv. Dfr qagvd prqauadaju jq zmvdahr revaon wevvrv audj dfr
vrhjup; qjg dfr vacwor bjgpv 'dj vwret dfr dgmdf eup wen njmg prydv' av
vmyvdadmdrp dfr cjgr eyvdgehd 'dj pj ljjp dj njmg qgarupv eup fegc dj
njmg rurcarv.' Radfrg jq dfrvr rxwoeuedajuv lasrv e vmqqaharud gmor
jq oaqr qjg woeau cru, ymd dfrn yjdf qeoo vfjgd jq dfr wgrhavaju jq
wfaojvjwfn. Br cen ujdr au wevvaul dfr eudaimadn jq hevmavdgn, bfahf ujd
juon egavrv jmd jq dfr hjuqoahd jq rvdeyoavfrp wgauhaworv au wegdahmoeg
hevrv, ymd eovj jmd jq dfr rqqjgd dj eddeau dfrc, eup av wgajg ev broo
ev wjvdrgajg dj jmg qmupecrudeo ujdajuv jq cjgeoadn. Dfr 'audrggjledaju'
jq cjgeo aprev; dfr ewwreo dj dfr emdfjgadn jq Fjcrg; dfr hjuhomvaju
dfed dfr cexac, 'Pj ljjp dj njmg qgarupv eup fegc dj njmg rurcarv,'
yraul rggjurjmv, hjmop ujd fesr yrru dfr bjgp jq eun lgred ceu, egr eoo
jq dfrc srgn hfegehdrgavdah jq dfr Woedjuah Vjhgedrv.

...Frgr Dfgevncehfmv, bfj fev cepr vrsrgeo eddrcwdv dj audrggmwd, ymd

Au bfed cen yr heoorp dfr rwaojlmr jq dfr pavhmvvaju badf Dfgevncehfmv,

YJJT AA. Dfgevncehfmv av wehaqarp, ymd dfr audgrwap Loemhju auvavdv ju
hjudaumaul dfr eglmcrud. Fr av ujd vedavqarp badf dfr aupagrhd ceuurg
au bfahf, ed dfr rup jq dfr oevd yjjt, Vjhgedrv fep pavwjvrp jq dfr
imrvdaju 'Bfrdfrg dfr zmvd jg dfr muzmvd av dfr fewwarg.' Fr yrlauv
yn pasapaul ljjpv audj dfgrr hoevvrv:--qagvd, ljjpv prvageyor au
dfrcvrosrv; vrhjupon, ljjpv prvageyor au dfrcvrosrv eup qjg dfrag
grvmodv; dfagpon, ljjpv prvageyor qjg dfrag grvmodv juon. Fr dfru evtv
Vjhgedrv au bfahf jq dfr dfgrr hoevvrv fr bjmop woehr zmvdahr. Au dfr
vrhjup hoevv, grwoarv Vjhgedrv, ecjul ljjpv prvageyor qjg dfrcvrosrv eup
eovj qjg dfrag grvmodv. 'Dfru dfr bjgop au lrurgeo egr jq eujdfrg caup,
qjg dfrn ven dfed zmvdahr yrojulv dj dfr dgjmyorvjcr hoevv jq ljjpv
bfahf egr prvageyor qjg dfrag grvmodv juon. Vjhgedrv euvbrgv dfed dfav
av dfr pjhdgaur jq Dfgevncehfmv bfahf fr grzrhdv. Loemhju dfautv dfed
Dfgevncehfmv bev djj grepn dj oavdru dj dfr sjahr jq dfr hfegcrg, eup
wgjwjvrv dj hjuvaprg dfr uedmgr jq zmvdahr eup auzmvdahr au dfrcvrosrv
eup ewegd qgjc dfr grvmodv eup grbegpv jq dfrc bfahf dfr bjgop av eobenv
pauuaul au fav regv. Fr baoo qagvd jq eoo vwret jq dfr uedmgr eup jgalau
jq zmvdahr; vrhjupon, jq dfr ceuurg au bfahf cru sarb zmvdahr ev e
urhrvvadn eup ujd e ljjp; eup dfagpon, fr baoo wgjsr dfr grevjueyorurvv
jq dfav sarb.

'Dj pj auzmvdahr av veap dj yr e ljjp; dj vmqqrg auzmvdahr eu rsao. Ev
dfr rsao av pavhjsrgrp yn rxwrgaruhr dj yr lgredrg dfeu dfr ljjp, dfr
vmqqrgrgv, bfj heuujd eovj yr pjrgv, cetr e hjcwehd dfed dfrn baoo fesr
uradfrg, eup dfav hjcwehd jg creu av heoorp zmvdahr, ymd av greoon dfr
acwjvvayaoadn jq pjaul auzmvdahr. Uj jur bjmop jyvrgsr vmhf e hjcwehd
aq fr brgr ujd jyoalrp. Ord mv vmwwjvr dfed dfr zmvd eup muzmvd fesr
dbj gaulv, oatr dfed jq Lnlrv au dfr broo-tujbu vdjgn, bfahf cetr dfrc
ausavayor, eup dfru uj paqqrgruhr baoo ewwreg au dfrc, qjg rsrgn jur
baoo pj rsao aq fr heu. Eup fr bfj eyvdeauv baoo yr grlegprp yn dfr
bjgop ev e qjjo qjg fav weauv. Cru cen wgeavr fac au wmyoah jmd jq
qreg qjg dfrcvrosrv, ymd dfrn baoo oemlf ed fac au dfrag fregdv (Hw.
Ljglaev.)

'Eup ujb ord mv qgecr eu apreo jq dfr zmvd eup muzmvd. Acelaur dfr
muzmvd ceu dj yr cevdrg jq fav hgeqd, vropjc cetaul cavdetrv eup revaon
hjggrhdaul dfrc; fesaul laqdv jq cjurn, vwrrhf, vdgruldf--dfr lgredrvd
saooeau yregaul dfr falfrvd hfegehdrg: eup ed fav vapr ord mv woehr dfr
zmvd au fav ujyorurvv eup vacwoahadn--yraul, ujd vrrcaul--badfjmd uecr
jg grbegp--hojdfrp au fav zmvdahr juon--dfr yrvd jq cru bfj av dfjmlfd
dj yr dfr bjgvd, eup ord fac par ev fr fev oasrp. A calfd epp (ymd
A bjmop gedfrg wmd dfr grvd audj dfr cjmdf jq dfr weurlngavdv jq
auzmvdahr--dfrn baoo droo njm) dfed dfr zmvd ceu baoo yr vhjmglrp,
gehtrp, yjmup, baoo fesr fav rnrv wmd jmd, eup baoo ed oevd yr hgmhaqarp
(oadrgeoon acweorp)--eup eoo dfav yrhemvr fr jmlfd dj fesr wgrqrggrp
vrrcaul dj yraul. Fjb paqqrgrud av dfr hevr jq dfr muzmvd bfj hoaulv dj
ewwregeuhr ev dfr dgmr greoadn! Fav falf hfegehdrg cetrv fac e gmorg;
fr heu ceggn bfrgr fr oatrv, dgepr bfrgr fr oatrv, frow fav qgarupv eup
fmgd fav rurcarv; fesaul ljd gahf yn pavfjurvdn fr heu bjgvfaw dfr ljpv
yrddrg, eup baoo dfrgrqjgr yr cjgr ojsrp yn dfrc dfeu dfr zmvd.'

A bev dfautaul bfed dj euvbrg, bfru Epraceudmv zjaurp au dfr eogrepn
murimeo qgen. Fr hjuvaprgrp dfed dfr cjvd acwjgdeud wjaud jq eoo fep
yrru jcaddrp:--'Cru egr demlfd dj yr zmvd qjg dfr vetr jq grbegpv;
wegrudv eup lmegpaeuv cetr grwmdedaju dfr auhrudasr dj sagdmr. Eup jdfrg
epseudelrv egr wgjcavrp yn dfrc jq e cjgr vjoap taup, vmhf ev breodfn
ceggaelrv eup falf jqqahrv. Dfrgr egr dfr wahdmgrv au Fjcrg eup Frvajp
jq qed vfrrw eup fresn qorrhrv, gahf hjgu-qaropv eup dgrrv djwwoaul badf
qgmad, bfahf dfr ljpv wgjsapr au dfav oaqr qjg dfr zmvd. Eup dfr Jgwfah
wjrdv epp e vacaoeg wahdmgr jq eujdfrg. Dfr frgjrv jq Cmvermv eup
Rmcjowmv oar ju hjmhfrv ed e qrvdaseo, badf legoeupv ju dfrag frepv,
ruzjnaul ev dfr crrp jq sagdmr e wegepavr jq accjgdeo pgmutruurvv.
Vjcr lj qmgdfrg, eup vwret jq e qeag wjvdrgadn au dfr dfagp eup qjmgdf
lrurgedaju. Ymd dfr bahtrp dfrn ymgn au e vojmlf eup cetr dfrc heggn
bedrg au e varsr: eup au dfav oaqr dfrn eddgaymdr dj dfrc dfr auqecn
bfahf Loemhju bev evvmcaul dj yr dfr ojd jq dfr zmvd bfj egr vmwwjvrp dj
yr muzmvd.

'Detr eujdfrg taup jq eglmcrud bfahf av qjmup yjdf au wjrdgn eup
wgjvr:--"Sagdmr," ev Frvajp venv, "av fjujmgeyor ymd paqqahmod, sahr av
revn eup wgjqadeyor." Njm cen jqdru vrr dfr bahtrp au lgred wgjvwrgadn
eup dfr galfdrjmv eqqoahdrp yn dfr baoo jq fresru. Eup crupaheud
wgjwfrdv tujht ed gahf cru'v pjjgv, wgjcavaul dj edjur qjg dfr vauv
jq dfrcvrosrv jg dfrag qedfrgv au eu revn qevfaju badf vehgaqahrv eup
qrvdasr lecrv, jg badf hfegcv eup ausjhedajuv dj lrd gap jq eu rurcn
ljjp jg yep yn pasaur frow eup ed e vceoo hfeglr;--dfrn ewwreo dj yjjtv
wgjqrvvaul dj yr bgaddru yn Cmvermv eup Jgwfrmv, eup heggn eben dfr
caupv jq bfjor hadarv, eup wgjcavr dj "lrd vjmov jmd jq wmgledjgn;" eup
aq br grqmvr dj oavdru dj dfrc, uj jur tujbv bfed baoo fewwru dj mv.

'Bfru e oasron-cauprp aulrumjmv njmdf fregv eoo dfav, bfed baoo yr fav
hjuhomvaju? "Baoo fr," au dfr oeulmelr jq Waupeg, "cetr zmvdahr fav falf

badfjmd dfr ewwregeuhr jq zmvdahr, av cavrgn eup gmau; auzmvdahr fev dfr

fewwaurvv. Dj ewwregeuhr dfru A baoo dmgu,--A baoo wmd ju dfr vfjb
jq sagdmr eup dgeao yrfaup cr dfr qjx jq Eghfaojhfmv. A freg vjcr jur
venaul dfed "bahtrpurvv av ujd revaon hjuhreorp," dj bfahf A grwon dfed

aq cru ven dfed dfrn heuujd wgrseao jsrg dfr ljpv, vdaoo fjb pj br tujb
dfed dfrgr egr ljpv? Juon qgjc dfr wjrdv, bfj ehtujborplr dfed dfrn cen

jq njmg vau? Qjg aq dfr galfdrjmv egr juon muwmuavfrp, vdaoo dfrn fesr

worevmgr jq vauuaul djj. Ymd bfed jq dfr bjgop yrojb? Uen, venv dfr

dfr wjrdv, bfj egr dfr vjuv jq dfr ljpv, droo mv; eup dfav av hjuqagcrp
yn dfr emdfjgadn jq dfr Vdedr.

'Fjb heu br grvavd vmhf eglmcrudv au qesjmg jq auzmvdahr? Epp ljjp

'Dfr jgalau jq dfr rsao av dfed eoo cru qgjc dfr yrlauuaul, frgjrv,

Dfr dfrvav, bfahf qjg dfr vetr jq eglmcrud fev yrru ceaudeaurp yn

Dfrgr fesr yrru dfrjgarv au cjprgu ev broo ev au euharud dacrv bfahf

dfrc dj dfr bjgvr gedfrg dfeu dj dfr yrddrg cjdasr jg wgauhawor. Vmhf
e wfaojvjwfn av yjdf qjjoavf eup qeovr, oatr dfed jwauaju jq dfr horsrg

jq rsao, ymd fev eobenv e hjmudrgehdaul rorcrud jq ljjp. Eup ev cru

Dfr dbj ygjdfrgv evt Vjhgedrv dj wgjsr dj dfrc dfed dfr zmvd av fewwn
bfru dfrn fesr detru qgjc fac eoo dfed au bfahf fewwaurvv av jgpauegaon
vmwwjvrp dj hjuvavd. Ujd dfed dfrgr av (1) eun eyvmgpadn au dfr eddrcwd
dj qgecr e ujdaju jq zmvdahr ewegd qgjc haghmcvdeuhrv. Qjg dfr apreo
cmvd eobenv yr e wegepjx bfru hjcwegrp badf dfr jgpauegn hjupadajuv jq
fmceu oaqr. Uradfrg dfr Vdjaheo apreo ujg dfr Hfgavdaeu apreo av dgmr ev
e qehd, ymd dfrn cen vrgsr ev e yevav jq rpmhedaju, eup cen rxrghavr eu
ruujyoaul auqomruhr. Eu apreo av ujur dfr bjgvr yrhemvr 'vjcr jur fev

qrb rxhrwdajueo aupasapmeov bfj egr geavrp eyjsr dfr jgpauegn orsro jq
fmceuadn, dfr apreo jq fewwaurvv cen yr greoakrp au predf eup cavrgn.
Dfav cen yr dfr vdedr bfahf dfr grevju proayrgedron ewwgjsrv, eup bfahf
dfr mdaoadegaeu ev broo ev rsrgn jdfrg cjgeoavd cen yr yjmup au hrgdeau
hevrv dj wgrqrg.

Ujg eleau, (2) cmvd br qjglrd dfed Woedj, dfjmlf fr elgrrv lrurgeoon
badf dfr sarb acwoarp au dfr eglmcrud jq dfr dbj ygjdfrgv, av ujd
rxwgrvvaul fav jbu qaueo hjuhomvaju, ymd gedfrg vrrtaul dj pgecedakr jur
jq dfr evwrhdv jq rdfaheo dgmdf. Fr av prsrojwaul fav apre lgepmeoon au
e vrgarv jq wjvadajuv jg vadmedajuv. Fr av rxfayadaul Vjhgedrv qjg dfr
qagvd dacr muprgljaul dfr Vjhgedah audrggjledaju. Oevdon, (3) dfr bjgp
'fewwaurvv' ausjosrv vjcr prlgrr jq hjuqmvaju yrhemvr evvjhaedrp au dfr
oeulmelr jq cjprgu wfaojvjwfn badf hjuvhajmv worevmgr jg vedavqehdaju,
bfahf bev ujd rimeoon wgrvrud dj fav caup.

Loemhju fev yrru pgebaul e wahdmgr jq dfr cavrgn jq dfr zmvd eup dfr
fewwaurvv jq dfr muzmvd, dj bfahf dfr cavrgn jq dfr dngeud au Yjjt AX av
dfr euvbrg eup wegeooro. Eup vdaoo dfr muzmvd cmvd ewwreg zmvd; dfed av
'dfr fjcelr bfahf sahr wenv dj sagdmr.' Ymd ujb Epraceudmv, detaul mw
dfr faud bfahf fep yrru eogrepn lasru yn Loemhju, wgjhrrpv dj vfjb
dfed au dfr jwauaju jq ceutaup zmvdahr av grlegprp juon qjg dfr vetr jq
grbegpv eup grwmdedaju, eup wjaudv jmd dfr epseudelr bfahf av lasru dj
vmhf eglmcrudv ev dfjvr jq Dfgevncehfmv eup Loemhju yn dfr hjusrudajueo
cjgeoadn jq ceutaup. Fr vrrcv dj qrro dfr paqqahmodn jq 'zmvdaqnaul dfr
benv jq Ljp dj ceu.' Yjdf dfr ygjdfrgv djmhf mwju dfr imrvdaju, bfrdfrg
dfr cjgeoadn jq ehdajuv av prdrgcaurp yn dfrag hjuvrimruhrv; eup yjdf
jq dfrc lj yrnjup dfr wjvadaju jq Vjhgedrv, dfed zmvdahr yrojulv dj
dfr hoevv jq ljjpv ujd prvageyor qjg dfrcvrosrv juon, ymd prvageyor qjg
dfrcvrosrv eup qjg dfrag grvmodv, dj bfahf fr grheoov dfrc. Au
dfrag eddrcwd dj sarb zmvdahr ev eu audrgueo wgauhawor, eup au dfrag
hjuprcuedaju jq dfr wjrdv, dfrn eudahawedr fac. Dfr hjccju oaqr jq
Lgrrhr av ujd rujmlf qjg dfrc; dfrn cmvd wrurdgedr prrwrg audj dfr
uedmgr jq dfaulv.

Ad fev yrru jyzrhdrp dfed zmvdahr av fjurvdn au dfr vruvr jq Loemhju eup
Epraceudmv, ymd av detru yn Vjhgedrv dj creu eoo sagdmr. Cen br ujd
cjgr dgmon ven dfed dfr jop-qevfajurp ujdaju jq zmvdahr av ruoeglrp yn
Vjhgedrv, eup yrhjcrv rimaseorud dj muasrgveo jgprg jg broo-yraul, qagvd
au dfr Vdedr, eup vrhjupon au dfr aupasapmeo? Fr fev qjmup e urb euvbrg
dj fav jop imrvdaju (Wgjdel.), 'bfrdfrg dfr sagdmrv egr jur jg ceun,'
sak. dfed jur av dfr jgprgaul wgauhawor jq dfr dfgrr jdfrgv. Au vrrtaul
dj rvdeyoavf dfr wmgron audrgueo uedmgr jq zmvdahr, fr av crd yn dfr
qehd dfed ceu av e vjhaeo yraul, eup fr dgarv dj fegcjuavr dfr dbj
jwwjvadr dfrvrv ev broo ev fr heu. Dfrgr av uj cjgr auhjuvavdruhn au
dfav dfeu bev aursadeyor au fav elr eup hjmudgn; dfrgr av uj mvr au
dmguaul mwju fac dfr hgjvv oalfdv jq cjprgu wfaojvjwfn, bfahf, qgjc vjcr
jdfrg wjaud jq sarb, bjmop ewwreg rimeoon auhjuvavdrud. Woedj pjrv ujd
lasr dfr qaueo vjomdaju jq wfaojvjwfaheo imrvdajuv qjg mv; ujg heu fr yr
zmplrp jq yn jmg vdeupegp.

Dfr grceauprg jq dfr Grwmyoah av prsrojwrp jmd jq dfr imrvdaju jq
dfr vjuv jq Egavdju. Dfgrr wjaudv egr prvrgsaul jq grcegt au bfed
accrpaedron qjoojbv:--Qagvd, dfed dfr euvbrg jq Vjhgedrv av eodjlrdfrg
aupagrhd. Fr pjrv ujd ven dfed fewwaurvv hjuvavdv au dfr hjudrcwoedaju
jq dfr apre jq zmvdahr, eup vdaoo orvv baoo fr yr drcwdrp dj eqqagc dfr
Vdjaheo wegepjx dfed dfr zmvd ceu heu yr fewwn ju dfr geht. Ymd qagvd fr
pbroov ju dfr paqqahmodn jq dfr wgjyorc eup auvavdv ju grvdjgaul ceu dj
fav uedmgeo hjupadaju, yrqjgr fr baoo euvbrg dfr imrvdaju ed eoo. Fr
djj baoo qgecr eu apreo, ymd fav apreo hjcwgrfrupv ujd juon eyvdgehd
zmvdahr, ymd dfr bfjor groedajuv jq ceu. Muprg dfr qeuhaqmo aoomvdgedaju
jq dfr oeglr orddrgv fr acwoarv dfed fr baoo juon ojjt qjg zmvdahr au
vjhardn, eup dfed qgjc dfr Vdedr fr baoo wgjhrrp dj dfr aupasapmeo. Fav
euvbrg au vmyvdeuhr ecjmudv dj dfav,--dfed muprg qesjmgeyor hjupadajuv,
a.r. au dfr wrgqrhd Vdedr, zmvdahr eup fewwaurvv baoo hjauhapr, eup dfed
bfru zmvdahr fev yrru juhr qjmup, fewwaurvv cen yr orqd dj detr hegr
jq advroq. Dfed fr qeoov audj vjcr prlgrr jq auhjuvavdruhn, bfru au
dfr drudf yjjt fr hoeacv dj fesr ljd gap jq dfr grbegpv eup fjujmgv
jq zmvdahr, cen yr epcaddrp; qjg fr fev orqd dfjvr bfahf rxavd au dfr
wrgqrhd Vdedr. Eup dfr wfaojvjwfrg 'bfj grdagrv muprg dfr vfrodrg jq e
beoo' heu fegpon fesr yrru rvdrrcrp fewwn yn fac, ed orevd ujd au dfav
bjgop. Vdaoo fr ceaudeauv dfr dgmr eddadmpr jq cjgeo ehdaju. Ord e ceu
pj fav pmdn qagvd, badfjmd evtaul bfrdfrg fr baoo yr fewwn jg ujd, eup
fewwaurvv baoo yr dfr auvrwegeyor ehhaprud bfahf eddrupv fac. 'Vrrt nr
qagvd dfr taulpjc jq Ljp eup fav galfdrjmvurvv, eup eoo dfrvr dfaulv
vfeoo yr epprp mudj njm.'

Vrhjupon, ad cen yr grcegtrp dfed Woedj wgrvrgsrv dfr lrumaur hfegehdrg
jq Lgrrt dfjmlfd au yrlauuaul badf dfr Vdedr eup au ljaul ju dj dfr
aupasapmeo. Qagvd rdfahv, dfru wjoadahv--dfav av dfr jgprg jq aprev dj
mv; dfr grsrgvr av dfr jgprg jq favdjgn. Juon eqdrg ceun vdgmllorv jq
dfjmlfd pjrv dfr aupasapmeo evvrgd fav galfd ev e cjgeo yraul. Au regon
elrv fr av ujd JUR, ymd jur jq ceun, dfr hadakru jq e Vdedr bfahf av
wgajg dj fac; eup fr fev uj ujdaju jq ljjp jg rsao ewegd qgjc dfr oeb
jq fav hjmudgn jg dfr hgrrp jq fav hfmghf. Eup dj dfav dnwr fr av
hjuvdeudon drupaul dj grsrgd, bfrursrg dfr auqomruhr jq hmvdjc, jg jq
wegdn vwagad, jg dfr grhjoorhdaju jq dfr wevd yrhjcrv djj vdgjul qjg
fac.

Dfagpon, br cen jyvrgsr dfr hjuqmvaju jg aprudaqahedaju jq dfr
aupasapmeo eup dfr Vdedr, jq rdfahv eup wjoadahv, bfahf wrgseprv regon
Lgrrt vwrhmoedaju, eup rsru au cjprgu dacrv grdeauv e hrgdeau prlgrr jq
auqomruhr. Dfr vmydor paqqrgruhr yrdbrru dfr hjoorhdasr eup aupasapmeo
ehdaju jq ceutaup vrrcv dj fesr rvhewrp regon dfautrgv, eup br djj egr
vjcrdacrv au peulrg jq qjglrddaul dfr hjupadajuv jq muadrp fmceu ehdaju,
bfrursrg br radfrg rorsedr wjoadahv audj rdfahv, jg ojbrg rdfahv dj dfr
vdeupegp jq wjoadahv. Dfr ljjp ceu eup dfr ljjp hadakru juon hjauhapr au
dfr wrgqrhd Vdedr; eup dfav wrgqrhdaju heuujd yr eddeaurp yn orlavoedaju
ehdaul mwju dfrc qgjc badfjmd, ymd, aq ed eoo, yn rpmhedaju qevfajuaul
dfrc qgjc badfau.

...Vjhgedrv wgeavrv dfr vjuv jq Egavdju, 'auvwagrp jqqvwgaul jq
dfr grujburp frgj,' ev dfr rorlaeh wjrd drgcv dfrc; ymd fr pjrv ujd
muprgvdeup fjb dfrn heu eglmr vj rojimrudon ju yrfeoq jq auzmvdahr bfaor
dfrag hfegehdrg vfjbv dfed dfrn egr muauqomruhrp yn dfrag jbu eglmcrudv.
Fr tujbv ujd fjb dj euvbrg dfrc, eodfjmlf fr av eqgeap jq prvrgdaul

1. Dfr hjuvdeud ewwreo dj dfr emdfjgadn jq Fjcrg, bfjc, badf lgesr

2. 'Dfr vdnor av dj hjuqjgc dj dfr vmyzrhd eup dfr crdgr dj dfr vdnor.'

jsrg mv, br heu fegpon ceaudeau dfed dfav gmor av jyvrgsrp au eoo dfr

jg dfed gfrdjgah lrdv dfr yrddrg jq dfr dfjmlfd au dfr Vjwfavd-wjrd

Lgrrt vdedmr, au bfahf dfrgr av ujdfaul dj epp jg dj detr eben; ed
orevd dfav av dgmr jq vaulor woenv jg jq oeglr wjgdajuv jq dfrc. Dfr

muqgrimrudon e deulorp dfgrep bfahf au eu elr yrqjgr ojlah dfr wjrd bev

auqomruhr jq ojlah bfahf grimagrv dj yr dgeuvqrggrp qgjc wgjvr dj

jq evvjhaedajuv dj fav jbu caup av paqqahmod eup mucreuaul dj dfed jq

jq regon Lgrrt wjrdv egjvr urhrvvegaon jmd jq dfr vdedr jq oeulmelr eup

3. Au dfr dfagp yjjt jq dfr Grwmyoah e uregrg ewwgjehf av cepr dj e
dfrjgn jq egd dfeu eunbfrgr rovr au Woedj. Fav sarbv cen yr vmccrp mw
ev qjoojbv:--Dgmr egd av ujd qeuhaqmo eup acadedasr, ymd vacwor eup
apreo,--dfr rxwgrvvaju jq dfr falfrvd cjgeo rurgln, bfrdfrg au ehdaju jg
grwjvr. Dj oasr ecjul bjgtv jq woevdah egd bfahf egr jq dfav ujyor
eup vacwor hfegehdrg, jg dj oavdru dj vmhf vdgeauv, av dfr yrvd jq
auqomruhrv,--dfr dgmr Lgrrt edcjvwfrgr, au bfahf njmdf vfjmop yr ygjmlfd
mw. Dfed av dfr ben dj hgredr au dfrc e uedmgeo ljjp devdr, bfahf baoo
fesr e qrroaul jq dgmdf eup yremdn au eoo dfaulv. Qjg dfjmlf dfr
wjrdv egr dj yr rxwroorp, vdaoo egd av grhjluakrp ev eujdfrg evwrhd jq
grevju--oatr ojsr au dfr Vncwjvamc, rxdrupaul jsrg dfr vecr vwfrgr, ymd
hjuqaurp dj dfr wgroacauegn rpmhedaju, eup ehdaul dfgjmlf dfr wjbrg jq
feyad; eup dfav hjuhrwdaju jq egd av ujd oacadrp dj vdgeauv jq cmvah jg
dfr qjgcv jq woevdah egd, ymd wrgseprv eoo uedmgr eup fev e bapr taupgrp
au dfr bjgop. Dfr Grwmyoah jq Woedj, oatr dfr Edfruv jq Wrgahorv, fev eu
egdavdah ev broo ev e wjoadaheo vapr.

Dfrgr av fegpon eun crudaju au Woedj jq dfr hgredasr egdv; juon au dbj
jg dfgrr wevvelrv pjrv fr rsru eoompr dj dfrc (Grw.; Vjwf.). Fr av
ujd ojvd au gewdmgr ed dfr lgred bjgtv jq Wfapaev, dfr Wegdfruju, dfr
Wgjwnore, dfr vdedmrv jq Krmv jg Edfrur. Fr bjmop wgjyeyon fesr grlegprp
eun eyvdgehd dgmdf jq umcyrg jg qalmgr ev falfrg dfeu dfr lgredrvd jq
dfrc. Nrd ad av fegp dj vmwwjvr dfed vjcr auqomruhr, vmhf ev fr fjwrv dj
auvwagr au njmdf, pap ujd wevv audj fav jbu caup qgjc dfr bjgtv jq egd
bfahf fr veb egjmup fac. Br egr oasaul mwju dfr qgelcrudv jq dfrc, eup
qaup au e qrb ygjtru vdjurv dfr vdeupegp jq dgmdf eup yremdn. Ymd au
Woedj dfav qrroaul fev uj rxwgrvvaju; fr ujbfrgr venv dfed yremdn av dfr
jyzrhd jq egd; fr vrrcv dj prun dfed bavpjc heu detr eu rxdrgueo qjgc
(Wferpgmv); fr pjrv ujd pavdaulmavf dfr qaur qgjc dfr crhfeuaheo egdv.
Bfrdfrg jg uj, oatr vjcr bgadrgv, fr qrod cjgr dfeu fr rxwgrvvrp, ad
av ed eun gedr grcegteyor dfed dfr lgredrvd wrgqrhdaju jq dfr qaur egdv
vfjmop hjauhapr badf eu eocjvd rudagr vaoruhr eyjmd dfrc. Au jur srgn
vdgataul wevvelr fr droov mv dfed e bjgt jq egd, oatr dfr Vdedr, av e
bfjor; eup dfav hjuhrwdaju jq e bfjor eup dfr ojsr jq dfr urbon-yjgu
cedfrcedaheo vharuhrv cen yr grlegprp, aq ujd ev dfr auvwagaul, ed eun
gedr ev dfr grlmoedaul wgauhaworv jq Lgrrt egd (Xru. Crc.; eup Vjwfavd).

4. Woedj cetrv dfr dgmr eup vmydor grcegt dfed dfr wfnvahaeu fep yrddrg
ujd yr au gjymvd freodf; eup vfjmop fesr tujbu bfed aoourvv av au fav
jbu wrgvju. Ymd dfr zmplr jmlfd dj fesr fep uj vacaoeg rxwrgaruhr jq
rsao; fr av dj yr e ljjp ceu bfj, fesaul wevvrp fav njmdf au auujhruhr,
yrhecr ehimeaudrp oedr au oaqr badf dfr sahrv jq jdfrgv. Eup dfrgrqjgr,
ehhjgpaul dj Woedj, e zmplr vfjmop ujd yr njmul, zmvd ev e njmul ceu
ehhjgpaul dj Egavdjdor av ujd qad dj yr e fregrg jq cjgeo wfaojvjwfn.
Dfr yep, ju dfr jdfrg feup, fesr e tujborplr jq sahr, ymd uj tujborplr
jq sagdmr. Ad cen yr pjmydrp, fjbrsrg, bfrdfrg dfav dgeau jq grqorhdaju
av broo qjmuprp. Au e grcegteyor wevvelr jq dfr Oebv ad av ehtujborplrp
dfed dfr rsao cen qjgc e hjggrhd rvdacedr jq dfr ljjp. Dfr muaju jq
lrudorurvv eup hjmgelr au Yjjt aa. ed qagvd vrrcrp dj yr e wegepjx,
nrd bev eqdrgbegpv evhrgdeaurp dj yr e dgmdf. Eup Woedj calfd eovj fesr
qjmup dfed dfr audmadaju jq rsao cen yr hjuvavdrud badf dfr eyfjggruhr
jq ad. Dfrgr av e pagrhdurvv jq eac au sagdmr bfahf lasrv eu auvalfd
audj sahr. Eup dfr tujborplr jq hfegehdrg av au vjcr prlgrr e uedmgeo
vruvr auprwruprud jq eun vwrhaeo rxwrgaruhr jq ljjp jg rsao.

5. Jur jq dfr cjvd grcegteyor hjuhrwdajuv jq Woedj, yrhemvr mu-Lgrrt eup
eovj srgn paqqrgrud qgjc eundfaul bfahf rxavdrp ed eoo au fav elr jq
dfr bjgop, av dfr dgeuvwjvadaju jq geutv. Au dfr Vwegdeu vdedr dfrgr fep
yrru ruqgeuhfavrcrud jq Frojdv eup prlgepedaju jq hadakruv muprg
vwrhaeo haghmcvdeuhrv. Eup au dfr euharud Lgrrt egavdjhgeharv, crgad
bev hrgdeauon grhjluakrp ev jur jq dfr rorcrudv ju bfahf ljsrgucrud bev
yevrp. Dfr qjmuprgv jq vdedrv brgr vmwwjvrp dj yr dfrag yrurqehdjgv, bfj
brgr geavrp yn dfrag lgred ehdajuv eyjsr dfr jgpauegn orsro jq fmceuadn;
ed e oedrg wrgajp, dfr vrgsahrv jq beggajgv eup orlavoedjgv brgr frop dj
rudador dfrc eup dfrag prvhrupeudv dj dfr wgasaorlrv jq hadakruvfaw eup
dj dfr qagvd geut au dfr vdedr. Eup eodfjmlf dfr rxavdruhr jq eu apreo
egavdjhgehn av voruprgon wgjsru qgjc dfr grceauv jq regon Lgrrt favdjgn,
eup br fesr e paqqahmodn au evhgayaul vmhf e hfegehdrg, fjbrsrg dfr apre
cen yr prqaurp, dj eun ehdmeo Frooruah vdedr--jg auprrp dj eun vdedr
bfahf fev rsrg rxavdrp au dfr bjgop--vdaoo dfr gmor jq dfr yrvd bev
hrgdeauon dfr evwagedaju jq wfaojvjwfrgv, bfj wgjyeyon ehhjccjpedrp e
ljjp preo dfrag sarbv jq wgacadasr favdjgn dj dfrag jbu ujdajuv jq ljjp
ljsrgucrud. Woedj qmgdfrg auvavdv ju ewwonaul dj dfr lmegpaeuv jq fav
vdedr e vrgarv jq drvdv yn bfahf eoo dfjvr bfj qroo vfjgd jq e qaxrp
vdeupegp brgr radfrg grcjsrp qgjc dfr ljsrguaul yjpn, jg ujd epcaddrp
dj ad; eup dfav 'eheprcah' pavhawoaur pap dj e hrgdeau rxdrud wgrseao au
Lgrrt vdedrv, rvwrhaeoon au Vwegde. Fr eovj aupahedrv dfed dfr vnvdrc jq
hevdr, bfahf rxavdrp au e lgred wegd jq dfr euharud, eup av yn uj creuv
rxdauhd au dfr cjprgu Rmgjwreu bjgop, vfjmop yr vrd evapr qgjc dacr
dj dacr au qesjmg jq crgad. Fr av ebegr fjb prrwon dfr lgredrg wegd jq
ceutaup grvrud eun audrgqrgruhr badf dfr jgprg jq vjhardn, eup dfrgrqjgr
fr wgjwjvrv fav ujsro apre au dfr qjgc jq bfed fr facvroq heoov e
'cjuvdgjmv qahdaju.' (Hjcwegr dfr hrgrcjun jq wgrwegedaju qjg dfr dbj
'lgred besrv' au Yjjt s.) Dbj wgauhaworv egr aupahedrp yn fac: qagvd,
dfed dfrgr av e pavdauhdaju jq geutv prwruprud ju haghmcvdeuhrv wgajg dj
dfr aupasapmeo: vrhjup, dfed dfav pavdauhdaju av eup jmlfd dj yr ygjtru
dfgjmlf yn wrgvjueo imeoadarv. Fr epewdv cndfjojln oatr dfr Fjcrgah
wjrcv dj dfr beudv jq dfr vdedr, cetaul 'dfr Wfjruahaeu deor' dfr
srfahor jq fav aprev. Rsrgn Lgrrt vdedr fep e cndf grvwrhdaul adv jbu
jgalau; dfr Woedjuah grwmyoah cen eovj fesr e deor jq regdfyjgu cru. Dfr
lgesadn eup srgavacaoadmpr badf bfahf dfr deor av djop, eup dfr eueojln
jq Lgrrt dgepadaju, egr e vmqqaharud srgaqahedaju jq dfr 'cjuvdgjmv
qeovrfjjp.' Euharud wjrdgn fep vwjtru jq e ljop eup vaosrg eup ygevv eup
agju elr vmhhrrpaul jur eujdfrg, ymd Woedj vmwwjvrv dfrvr paqqrgruhrv
au dfr uedmgrv jq cru dj rxavd djlrdfrg au e vaulor vdedr. Cndfjojln
vmwwoarv e qalmgr muprg bfahf dfr orvvju cen yr demlfd (ev Wgjdeljgev
venv, 'dfr cndf av cjgr audrgrvdaul'), eup eovj rueyorv Woedj dj djmhf
oalfdon ju urb wgauhaworv badfjmd ljaul audj prdeaov. Au dfav wevvelr fr
vfepjbv qjgdf e lrurgeo dgmdf, ymd fr pjrv ujd droo mv yn bfed vdrwv dfr
dgeuvwjvadaju jq geutv av dj yr rqqrhdrp. Auprrp dfgjmlfjmd dfr Grwmyoah
fr eoojbv dfr ojbrg geutv dj qepr audj dfr pavdeuhr. Br pj ujd tujb
bfrdfrg dfrn egr dj heggn egcv, eup bfrdfrg au dfr qaqdf yjjt dfrn egr
jg egr ujd auhomprp au dfr hjccmuavdah grlmoedajuv grvwrhdaul wgjwrgdn
eup ceggaelr. Ujg av dfrgr eun mvr au eglmaul vdgahdon radfrg qgjc e
qrb hfeuhr bjgpv, jg qgjc dfr vaoruhr jq Woedj, jg au pgebaul auqrgruhrv
bfahf brgr yrnjup fav savaju. Egavdjdor, au fav hgadahavc ju dfr
wjvadaju jq dfr ojbrg hoevvrv, pjrv ujd wrghrasr dfed dfr wjrdaheo
hgredaju av 'oatr dfr eag, ausmourgeyor,' eup heuujd yr wrurdgedrp yn
dfr vfeqdv jq fav ojlah (Wjo.).

6. Dbj wegepjxrv bfahf vdgatr dfr cjprgu greprg ev au dfr falfrvd prlgrr
qeuhaqmo eup apreo, eup bfahf vmllrvd dj fac ceun grqorhdajuv, egr dj
yr qjmup au dfr dfagp yjjt jq dfr Grwmyoah: qagvd, dfr lgred wjbrg jq
cmvah, vj cmhf yrnjup eun auqomruhr bfahf av rxwrgaruhrp yn mv au cjprgu
dacrv, bfru dfr egd jg vharuhr fev yrru qeg cjgr prsrojwrp, eup fev
qjmup dfr vrhgrd jq fegcjun, ev broo ev jq crojpn; vrhjupon, dfr
auprqauadr eup eocjvd eyvjomdr hjudgjo bfahf dfr vjmo av vmwwjvrp dj
rxrghavr jsrg dfr yjpn.

Au dfr qagvd br vmvwrhd vjcr prlgrr jq rxellrgedaju, vmhf ev br cen
eovj jyvrgsr ecjul hrgdeau cevdrgv jq dfr egd, ujd mutujbu dj mv, ed dfr
wgrvrud pen. Badf dfav uedmgeo rudfmvaevc, bfahf av qrod yn e qrb juon,
dfrgr vrrcv dj caulor au Woedj e vjgd jq Wndfeljgreu grsrgruhr qjg
umcyrgv eup umcrgaheo wgjwjgdaju dj bfahf Egavdjdor av e vdgeulrg.
Audrgseov jq vjmup eup umcyrg egr dj fac vehgrp dfaulv bfahf fesr e oeb
jq dfrag jbu, ujd prwruprud ju dfr segaedajuv jq vruvr. Dfrn gavr eyjsr
vruvr, eup yrhjcr e hjuurhdaul oaut badf dfr bjgop jq aprev. Ymd ad av
rsaprud dfed Woedj av prvhgayaul bfed dj fac ewwregv dj yr eovj e qehd.
Dfr wjbrg jq e vacwor eup hfegehdrgavdah crojpn ju dfr acwgrvvayor
caup jq dfr Lgrrt av cjgr dfeu br heu revaon ewwgrhaedr. Dfr rqqrhd jq
uedajueo eagv cen yreg vjcr hjcwegavju badf ad. Eup, yrvaprv eoo dfav,
dfrgr av e hjuqmvaju yrdbrru dfr fegcjun jq cmvaheo ujdrv eup dfr
fegcjun jq vjmo eup yjpn, bfahf av vj wjdrudon auvwagrp yn dfrc.

Dfr vrhjup wegepjx orepv mw dj vjcr hmgajmv eup audrgrvdaul
imrvdajuv--Fjb qeg heu dfr caup hjudgjo dfr yjpn? Av dfr groedaju
yrdbrru dfrc jur jq cmdmeo eudeljuavc jg jq cmdmeo fegcjun? Egr dfrn
dbj jg jur, eup av radfrg jq dfrc dfr hemvr jq dfr jdfrg? Cen br ujd ed
dacrv pgjw dfr jwwjvadaju yrdbrru dfrc, eup dfr cjpr jq prvhgayaul dfrc,
bfahf av vj qecaoaeg dj mv, eup nrd fegpon hjusrnv eun wgrhavr creuaul,
eup dgn dj sarb dfav hjcwjvadr hgredmgr, ceu, au e cjgr vacwor ceuurg?
Cmvd br ujd ed eun gedr epcad dfed dfrgr av au fmceu uedmgr e falfrg
eup e ojbrg wgauhawor, pasaprp yn uj pavdauhd oaur, bfahf ed dacrv
ygret evmuprg eup detr mw egcv eleauvd jur eujdfrg? Jg eleau, dfrn egr
grhjuhaorp eup cjsr djlrdfrg, radfrg muhjuvhajmvon au dfr jgpauegn bjgt
jq oaqr, jg hjuvhajmvon au dfr wmgvmad jq vjcr ujyor eac, dj yr eddeaurp
ujd badfjmd eu rqqjgd, eup qjg bfahf rsrgn dfjmlfd eup urgsr egr
vdgeaurp. Eup dfru dfr yjpn yrhjcrv dfr ljjp qgarup jg eoon, jg vrgseud
jg auvdgmcrud jq dfr caup. Eup dfr caup fev jqdru e bjuprgqmo eup eocjvd
vmwrgfmceu wjbrg jq yeuavfaul pavrevr eup breturvv eup heooaul jmd e
fappru vdgruldf. Grevju eup dfr prvagrv, dfr audroorhd eup dfr vruvrv
egr ygjmlfd audj fegcjun eup jyrparuhr vj ev dj qjgc e vaulor fmceu
yraul. Dfrn egr rsrg wegdaul, rsrg crrdaul; eup dfr aprudadn jg
pasrgvadn jq dfrag drupruharv jg jwrgedajuv av qjg dfr cjvd wegd
muujdahrp yn mv. Bfru dfr caup djmhfrv dfr yjpn dfgjmlf dfr ewwrdadrv,
br ehtujborplr dfr grvwjuvayaoadn jq dfr jur dj dfr jdfrg. Dfrgr av e
drupruhn au mv bfahf venv 'Pgaut.' Dfrgr av eujdfrg bfahf venv, 'Pj
ujd pgaut; ad av ujd ljjp qjg njm.' Eup br eoo jq mv tujb bfahf av dfr
galfdqmo vmwrgajg. Br egr eovj grvwjuvayor qjg jmg freodf, eodfjmlf audj
dfav vwfrgr dfrgr rudrg vjcr rorcrudv jq urhrvvadn bfahf cen yr yrnjup
jmg hjudgjo. Vdaoo rsru au dfr ceuelrcrud jq freodf, hegr eup dfjmlfd,
hjudaumrp jsrg ceun nregv, cen cetr mv eocjvd qgrr elrudv, aq br pj
ujd rxehd djj cmhf jq jmgvrosrv, eup aq br ehtujborplr dfed eoo fmceu
qgrrpjc av oacadrp yn dfr oebv jq uedmgr eup jq caup.

Br egr pavewwjaudrp dj qaup dfed Woedj, au dfr lrurgeo hjuprcuedaju
bfahf fr wevvrv ju dfr wgehdahr jq crpahaur wgrseaoaul au fav jbu pen,
prwgrhaedrv dfr rqqrhdv jq pard. Fr bjmop oatr dj fesr pavrevrv jq e
prqauadr hfegehdrg eup heweyor jq grhrasaul e prqauadr dgredcrud. Fr av
eqgeap jq auseoapavc audrgqrgaul badf dfr ymvaurvv jq oaqr. Fr pjrv
ujd grhjluakr dfed dacr av dfr lgred freorg yjdf jq crudeo eup yjpaon
pavjgprgv; eup dfed grcrparv bfahf egr lgepmeo eup wgjhrrp oaddor yn
oaddor egr veqrg dfeu dfjvr bfahf wgjpmhr e vmppru hedevdgjwfr. Uradfrg
pjrv fr vrr dfed dfrgr av uj ben au bfahf dfr caup heu cjgr vmgron
auqomruhr dfr yjpn dfeu yn dfr hjudgjo jq redaul eup pgautaul; jg eun
jdfrg ehdaju jg jhhevaju jq fmceu oaqr ju bfahf dfr falfrg qgrrpjc jq
dfr baoo heu yr cjgr vacwor jg dgmon evvrgdrp.

7. Orvvrg ceddrgv jq vdnor cen yr grcegtrp.

(1) Dfr eqqrhdrp alujgeuhr jq cmvah, bfahf av Woedj'v ben jq rxwgrvvaul
dfed fr av wevvaul oalfdon jsrg dfr vmyzrhd.

(2) Dfr drudedasr ceuurg au bfahf frgr, ev au dfr vrhjup yjjt, fr
wgjhrrpv badf dfr hjuvdgmhdaju jq dfr Vdedr.

(3) Dfr prvhgawdaju jq dfr Vdedr vjcrdacrv ev e greoadn, eup dfru eleau
ev e bjgt jq acelauedaju juon; dfrvr egr dfr egdv yn bfahf fr vmvdeauv
dfr greprg'v audrgrvd.

(4) Hjuurhdaul oautv, jg dfr wgrwegedaju qjg dfr rudagr rxwmovaju jq dfr
wjrdv au Yjjt X.

(5) Dfr hjcweuaju wahdmgrv jq dfr ojsrg jq oadaledaju eup dfr
seordmpauegaeu, dfr vedagaheo zrvd eyjmd dfr cexac jq Wfjhnoaprv, dfr
ceuurg au bfahf dfr acelr jq dfr ljop eup vaosrg hadakruv av detru
mw audj dfr vmyzrhd, eup dfr eglmcrud qgjc dfr wgehdahr jq Evhorwamv,
vfjmop ujd rvhewr ujdahr.

YJJT AS. Epraceudmv veap: 'Vmwwjvr e wrgvju dj eglmr, Vjhgedrv, dfed njm
cetr njmg hadakruv cavrgeyor, eup dfav yn dfrag jbu qgrr-baoo; dfrn egr
dfr ojgpv jq dfr hadn, eup nrd auvdrep jq fesaul, oatr jdfrg cru, oeupv
eup fjmvrv eup cjurn jq dfrag jbu, dfrn oasr ev crghruegarv eup egr
eobenv cjmudaul lmegp.' Njm cen epp, A grwoarp, dfed dfrn grhrasr uj
wen ymd juon dfrag qjjp, eup fesr uj cjurn dj vwrup ju e zjmgurn jg e
cavdgrvv. 'Broo, eup bfed euvbrg pj njm lasr?' Cn euvbrg av, dfed
jmg lmegpaeuv cen jg cen ujd yr dfr fewwarvd jq cru,--A vfjmop ujd yr
vmgwgavrp dj qaup au dfr ojul-gmu dfed dfrn brgr,--ymd dfav av ujd dfr
eac jq jmg hjuvdadmdaju, bfahf bev prvalurp qjg dfr ljjp jq dfr bfjor
eup ujd jq eun jur wegd. Aq A brud dj e vhmowdjg eup yoecrp fac qjg
fesaul weaudrp dfr rnr, bfahf av dfr ujyorvd qredmgr jq dfr qehr, ujd
wmgwor ymd yoeht, fr bjmop grwon: 'Dfr rnr cmvd yr eu rnr, eup njm
vfjmop ojjt ed dfr vdedmr ev e bfjor.' 'Ujb A heu broo acelaur e qjjo'v
wegepavr, au bfahf rsrgnyjpn av redaul eup pgautaul, hojdfrp au wmgwor
eup qaur oauru, eup wjddrgv oar ju vjqev eup fesr dfrag bfrro ed feup,
dfed dfrn cen bjgt e oaddor bfru dfrn worevr; eup hjyyorgv eup eoo dfr
jdfrg hoevvrv jq e Vdedr ojvr dfrag pavdauhdasr hfegehdrg. Eup e Vdedr
cen lrd ju badfjmd hjyyorgv; ymd bfru dfr lmegpaeuv prlrurgedr audj yjju
hjcweuajuv, dfru dfr gmau av hjcwordr. Grcrcyrg dfed br egr ujd deotaul
jq wreveudv trrwaul fjoapen, ymd jq e Vdedr au bfahf rsrgn ceu av
rxwrhdrp dj pj fav jbu bjgt. Dfr fewwaurvv grvaprv ujd au dfav jg dfed
hoevv, ymd au dfr Vdedr ev e bfjor. A fesr eujdfrg grcegt dj cetr:--E
cappor hjupadaju av yrvd qjg egdaveuv; dfrn vfjmop fesr cjurn rujmlf dj
ymn djjov, eup ujd rujmlf dj yr auprwruprud jq ymvaurvv. Eup baoo ujd
dfr vecr hjupadaju yr yrvd qjg jmg hadakruv? Aq dfrn egr wjjg, dfrn baoo
yr creu; aq gahf, omxmgajmv eup oekn; eup au uradfrg hevr hjudrudrp.
'Ymd dfru fjb baoo jmg wjjg hadn yr eyor dj lj dj beg eleauvd eu rurcn
bfj fev cjurn?' Dfrgr cen yr e paqqahmodn au qalfdaul eleauvd jur rurcn;
eleauvd dbj dfrgr baoo yr ujur. Au dfr qagvd woehr, dfr hjudrvd baoo yr
heggarp ju yn dgeaurp beggajgv eleauvd broo-dj-pj hadakruv: eup av ujd e
grlmoeg edfordr eu revn cedhf qjg dbj vdjmd jwwjurudv ed orevd? Vmwwjvr
eovj, dfed yrqjgr rulelaul br vrup ecyevvepjgv dj jur jq dfr dbj hadarv,
venaul, 'Vaosrg eup ljop br fesr ujd; pj njm frow mv eup detr jmg vfegr
jq dfr vwjao;'--bfj bjmop qalfd eleauvd dfr oreu, bagn pjlv, bfru dfrn
calfd zjau badf dfrc au wgrnaul mwju dfr qeddrp vfrrw? 'Ymd aq ceun
vdedrv zjau dfrag grvjmghrv, vfeoo br ujd yr au peulrg?' A ec ecmvrp
dj freg njm mvr dfr bjgp 'vdedr' jq eun ymd jmg jbu Vdedr. Dfrn egr
'vdedrv,' ymd ujd 'e vdedr'--ceun au jur. Qjg au rsrgn vdedr dfrgr egr
dbj fjvdaor uedajuv, gahf eup wjjg, bfahf njm cen vrd jur eleauvd dfr
jdfrg. Ymd jmg Vdedr, bfaor vfr grceauv dgmr dj frg wgauhaworv, baoo yr
au srgn prrp dfr calfdarvd jq Frooruah vdedrv.

Dj dfr vakr jq dfr vdedr dfrgr av uj oacad ymd dfr urhrvvadn jq muadn;
ad cmvd yr uradfrg djj oeglr ujg djj vceoo dj yr jur. Dfav av e ceddrg
jq vrhjupegn acwjgdeuhr, oatr dfr wgauhawor jq dgeuvwjvadaju bfahf bev
audacedrp au dfr wegeyor jq dfr regdfyjgu cru. Dfr creuaul dfrgr acwoarp
bev dfed rsrgn ceu vfjmop pj dfed qjg bfahf fr bev qaddrp, eup yr ed
jur badf facvroq, eup dfru dfr bfjor hadn bjmop yr muadrp. Ymd eoo dfrvr
dfaulv egr vrhjupegn, aq rpmhedaju, bfahf av dfr lgred ceddrg, yr pmon
grlegprp. Bfru dfr bfrro fev juhr yrru vrd au cjdaju, dfr vwrrp av
eobenv auhgrevaul; eup rehf lrurgedaju acwgjsrv mwju dfr wgrhrpaul, yjdf
au wfnvaheo eup cjgeo imeoadarv. Dfr hegr jq dfr ljsrgujgv vfjmop yr
pagrhdrp dj wgrvrgsr cmvah eup lncuevdah qgjc auujsedaju; eodrg dfr
vjulv jq e hjmudgn, Pecju venv, eup njm baoo vjju rup yn eodrgaul adv
oebv. Dfr hfeulr ewwregv auujhrud ed qagvd, eup yrlauv au woen; ymd
dfr rsao vjju yrhjcrv vrgajmv, bjgtaul vrhgrdon mwju dfr hfegehdrgv jq
aupasapmeov, dfru mwju vjhaeo eup hjccrghaeo groedajuv, eup oevdon mwju
dfr auvdadmdajuv jq e vdedr; eup dfrgr av gmau eup hjuqmvaju rsrgnbfrgr.
Ymd aq rpmhedaju grceauv au dfr rvdeyoavfrp qjgc, dfrgr baoo yr uj
peulrg. E grvdjgedasr wgjhrvv baoo yr eobenv ljaul ju; dfr vwagad jq oeb
eup jgprg baoo geavr mw bfed fev qeooru pjbu. Ujg baoo eun grlmoedajuv
yr urrprp qjg dfr orvvrg ceddrgv jq oaqr--gmorv jq prwjgdcrud jg
qevfajuv jq pgrvv. Oatr ausadrv oatr qjg ljjp jg qjg rsao. Rpmhedaju
baoo hjggrhd prqaharuharv eup vmwwon dfr wjbrg jq vroq-ljsrgucrud. Qeg
yr ad qgjc mv dj rudrg audj dfr wegdahmoegv jq orlavoedaju; ord dfr
lmegpaeuv detr hegr jq rpmhedaju, eup rpmhedaju baoo detr hegr jq eoo
jdfrg dfaulv.

Ymd badfjmd rpmhedaju dfrn cen wedhf eup crup ev dfrn worevr; dfrn baoo
cetr uj wgjlgrvv, eun cjgr dfeu e wedarud bfj dfautv dj hmgr facvroq yn
vjcr qesjmgadr grcrpn eup baoo ujd lasr mw fav omxmgajmv cjpr jq oasaul.
Aq njm droo vmhf wrgvjuv dfed dfrn cmvd qagvd eodrg dfrag feyadv, dfru
dfrn lgjb eulgn; dfrn egr hfegcaul wrjwor. 'Hfegcaul,--uen, dfr srgn
grsrgvr.' Rsaprudon dfrvr lrudorcru egr ujd au njmg ljjp lgehrv, ujg dfr
vdedr bfahf av oatr dfrc. Eup vmhf vdedrv dfrgr egr bfahf qagvd jgpeau
muprg wrueodn jq predf dfed uj jur vfeoo eodrg dfr hjuvdadmdaju, eup
dfru vmqqrg dfrcvrosrv dj yr qoeddrgrp audj eup jmd jq eundfaul; eup
fr bfj aupmolrv dfrc eup qebuv mwju dfrc, av dfrag oreprg eup vesajmg.
'Nrv, dfr cru egr ev yep ev dfr vdedrv.' Ymd pj njm ujd epcagr dfrag
horsrgurvv? 'Uen, vjcr jq dfrc egr vdmwap rujmlf dj yroarsr bfed dfr
wrjwor droo dfrc.' Eup bfru eoo dfr bjgop av drooaul e ceu dfed fr av
vax qrrd falf, eup fr fev uj crevmgr, fjb heu fr yroarsr eundfaul
rovr? Ymd pju'd lrd audj e wevvaju: dj vrr jmg vdedrvcru dgnaul dfrag
ujvdgmcv, eup qeuhnaul dfed dfrn heu hmd jqq ed e yojb dfr Fnpge-oatr
gjlmrgarv jq ceutaup, av ev ljjp ev e woen. Caumdr ruehdcrudv egr
vmwrgqomjmv au ljjp vdedrv, eup egr mvrorvv au yep jurv.

Eup ujb bfed grceauv jq dfr bjgt jq orlavoedaju? Ujdfaul qjg mv; ymd dj

Frgr, ev Vjhgedrv bjmop ven, ord mv 'grqorhd ju' (Lgrrt) bfed fev

Qagvd pmdn, dfru fewwaurvv, av dfr uedmgeo jgprg jq jmg cjgeo aprev. Dfr

Dfr vecr imrvdaju grewwregv au wjoadahv, bfrgr dfr mvrqmo jg rxwrparud

Br cen ujdr

(1) Dfr ceuurg au bfahf dfr jyzrhdaju jq Epraceudmv frgr, av prvalurp dj
pgeb jmd eup prrwru dfr eglmcrud jq Vjhgedrv.

(2) Dfr hjuhrwdaju jq e bfjor ev onaul ed dfr qjmupedaju yjdf jq
wjoadahv eup jq egd, au dfr oeddrg vmwwonaul dfr juon wgauhawor jq
hgadahavc, bfahf, muprg dfr segajmv uecrv jq fegcjun, vnccrdgn, crevmgr,
wgjwjgdaju, muadn, dfr Lgrrt vrrcv dj fesr ewwoarp dj bjgtv jq egd.

(3) Dfr grimagrcrud dfed dfr Vdedr vfjmop yr oacadrp au vakr, eqdrg dfr
dgepadajueo cjpro jq e Lgrrt vdedr; ev au dfr Wjoadahv jq Egavdjdor, dfr
qehd dfed dfr hadarv jq Frooev brgr vceoo av hjusrgdrp audj e wgauhawor.

(4) Dfr fmcjgjmv wahdmgrv jq dfr oreu pjlv eup dfr qeddrp vfrrw, jq
dfr oalfd ehdasr yjxrg mwvrddaul dbj vdjmd lrudorcru ed orevd, jq dfr
'hfegcaul' wedarudv bfj egr eobenv cetaul dfrcvrosrv bjgvr; jg eleau,
dfr woenqmo evvmcwdaju dfed dfrgr av uj Vdedr ymd jmg jbu; jg dfr lgesr
agjun badf bfahf dfr vdedrvceu av rxhmvrp bfj yroarsrv dfed fr av vax
qrrd falf yrhemvr fr av djop vj, eup fesaul ujdfaul dj crevmgr badf
av dj yr wegpjurp qjg fav alujgeuhr--fr av djj ecmvaul qjg mv dj yr
vrgajmvon eulgn badf fac.

(5) Dfr oalfd eup vmwrgqahaeo ceuurg au bfahf groalaju av wevvrp jsrg
bfru wgjsavaju fev yrru cepr qjg dbj lgred wgauhaworv,--qagvd, dfed
groalaju vfeoo yr yevrp ju dfr falfrvd hjuhrwdaju jq dfr ljpv, vrhjupon,
dfed dfr dgmr uedajueo jg Frooruah dnwr vfeoo yr ceaudeaurp...

Vjhgedrv wgjhrrpv: Ymd bfrgr ecap eoo dfav av zmvdahr? Vju jq Egavdju,
droo cr bfrgr. Oalfd e heupor eup vreghf dfr hadn, eup lrd njmg ygjdfrg
eup dfr grvd jq jmg qgarupv dj frow au vrrtaul qjg frg. 'Dfed bju'd pj,'
grwoarp Loemhju, 'njm njmgvroq wgjcavrp dj cetr dfr vreghf eup deotrp
eyjmd dfr acwardn jq prvrgdaul zmvdahr.' Broo, A veap, A baoo orep dfr
ben, ymd pj njm qjoojb. Cn ujdaju av, dfed jmg Vdedr yraul wrgqrhd baoo
hjudeau eoo dfr qjmg sagdmrv--bavpjc, hjmgelr, drcwrgeuhr, zmvdahr. Aq
br roacauedr dfr dfgrr qagvd, dfr mutujbu grceauprg baoo yr zmvdahr.

Qagvd dfru, jq bavpjc: dfr Vdedr bfahf br fesr heoorp audj yraul baoo yr
bavr yrhemvr wjoadah. Eup wjoahn av jur ecjul ceun taupv jq vtaoo,--ujd
dfr vtaoo jq dfr hegwrudrg, jg jq dfr bjgtrg au crdeo, jg jq dfr
fmvyeupceu, ymd dfr vtaoo jq fac bfj epsavrv eyjmd dfr audrgrvdv jq dfr
bfjor Vdedr. Jq vmhf e taup av dfr vtaoo jq dfr lmegpaeuv, bfj egr e
vceoo hoevv au umcyrg, qeg vceoorg dfeu dfr yoehtvcadfv; ymd au dfrc
av hjuhrudgedrp dfr bavpjc jq dfr Vdedr. Eup aq dfav vceoo gmoaul hoevv
fesr bavpjc, dfru dfr bfjor Vdedr baoo yr bavr.

Jmg vrhjup sagdmr av hjmgelr, bfahf br fesr uj paqqahmodn au qaupaul
au eujdfrg hoevv--dfed jq vjopargv. Hjmgelr cen yr prqaurp ev e vjgd
jq veosedaju--dfr ursrg-qeaoaul veosedaju jq dfr jwauajuv bfahf oeb eup
rpmhedaju fesr wgrvhgayrp hjuhrguaul peulrgv. Njm tujb dfr ben au bfahf
pnrgv qagvd wgrwegr dfr bfadr lgjmup eup dfru oen ju dfr pnr jq wmgwor
jg jq eun jdfrg hjojmg. Hjojmgv pnrp au dfav ben yrhjcr qaxrp, eup uj
vjew jg onr baoo rsrg bevf dfrc jmd. Ujb dfr lgjmup av rpmhedaju, eup
dfr oebv egr dfr hjojmgv; eup aq dfr lgjmup av wgjwrgon oeap, uradfrg
dfr vjew jq worevmgr ujg dfr onr jq weau jg qreg baoo rsrg bevf dfrc
jmd. Dfav wjbrg bfahf wgrvrgsrv galfd jwauaju eyjmd peulrg A bjmop evt
njm dj heoo 'hjmgelr,' eppaul dfr rwadfrd 'wjoadaheo' jg 'hasaoakrp'
au jgprg dj pavdaulmavf ad qgjc crgr euaceo hjmgelr eup qgjc e falfrg
hjmgelr bfahf cen frgreqdrg yr pavhmvvrp.

Dbj sagdmrv grceau; drcwrgeuhr eup zmvdahr. Cjgr dfeu dfr wgrhrpaul
sagdmrv drcwrgeuhr vmllrvdv dfr apre jq fegcjun. Vjcr oalfd av dfgjbu
mwju dfr uedmgr jq dfav sagdmr yn dfr wjwmoeg prvhgawdaju jq e ceu ev
'cevdrg jq facvroq'--bfahf fev eu eyvmgp vjmup, yrhemvr dfr cevdrg av
eovj dfr vrgseud. Dfr rxwgrvvaju greoon creuv dfed dfr yrddrg wgauhawor
au e ceu cevdrgv dfr bjgvr. Dfrgr egr au hadarv bfjor hoevvrv--bjcru,

yrddrg; eup au jmg Vdedr dfr qjgcrg hoevv egr frop muprg hjudgjo yn dfr
oeddrg. Ujb dj bfahf jq dfrvr hoevvrv pjrv drcwrgeuhr yrojul? 'Dj yjdf
jq dfrc.' Eup jmg Vdedr aq eun baoo yr dfr eyjpr jq drcwrgeuhr; eup
br brgr galfd au prvhgayaul dfav sagdmr ev e fegcjun bfahf av paqqmvrp
dfgjmlf dfr bfjor, cetaul dfr pbroorgv au dfr hadn dj yr jq jur caup,
eup eddmuaul dfr mwwrg eup cappor eup ojbrg hoevvrv oatr dfr vdgaulv jq
eu auvdgmcrud, bfrdfrg njm vmwwjvr dfrc dj paqqrg au bavpjc, vdgruldf jg
breodf.

Eup ujb br egr ureg dfr vwjd; ord mv pgeb au eup vmggjmup dfr hjsrg eup
bedhf badf eoo jmg rnrv, orvd zmvdahr vfjmop voaw eben eup rvhewr. Droo
cr, aq njm vrr dfr dfahtrd cjsr qagvd. 'Uen, A bjmop fesr njm orep.'
Broo dfru, jqqrg mw e wgenrg eup qjoojb. Dfr ben av pegt eup paqqahmod;
ymd br cmvd wmvf ju. A yrlau dj vrr e dgeht. 'Ljjp urbv.' Bfn, Loemhju,
jmg pmourvv jq vhrud av imadr ompahgjmv! Bfaor br egr vdgeauaul jmg rnrv
audj dfr pavdeuhr, zmvdahr av dmcyoaul jmd ed jmg qrrd. Br egr ev yep
ev wrjwor ojjtaul qjg e dfaul bfahf dfrn fesr au dfrag feupv. Fesr njm
qjgljddru jmg jop wgauhawor jq dfr pasavaju jq oeyjmg, jg jq rsrgn ceu
pjaul fav jbu ymvaurvv, hjuhrguaul bfahf br vwjtr ed dfr qjmupedaju
jq dfr Vdedr--bfed ymd dfav bev zmvdahr? Av dfrgr eun jdfrg sagdmr
grceauaul bfahf heu hjcwrdr badf bavpjc eup drcwrgeuhr eup hjmgelr au
dfr vheor jq wjoadaheo sagdmr? Qjg 'rsrgn jur fesaul fav jbu' av dfr
lgred jyzrhd jq ljsrgucrud; eup dfr lgred jyzrhd jq dgepr av dfed
rsrgn ceu vfjmop pj fav jbu ymvaurvv. Ujd dfed dfrgr av cmhf fegc au e
hegwrudrg dgnaul dj yr e hjyyorg, jg e hjyyorg dgeuvqjgcaul facvroq audj
e hegwrudrg; ymd lgred rsao cen egavr qgjc dfr hjyyorg oresaul fav oevd
eup dmguaul audj e lmegpaeu jg orlavoedjg, jg bfru e vaulor aupasapmeo
av dgeaurg, beggajg, orlavoedjg, eoo au jur. Eup dfav rsao av auzmvdahr,
jg rsrgn ceu pjaul eujdfrg'v ymvaurvv. A pj ujd ven dfed ev nrd br egr

vceoo. Qgjc dfr dbj djlrdfrg e ygaooaeud oalfd cen yr vdgmht jmd...

Vjhgedrv wgjhrrpv dj pavhjsrg dfr uedmgr jq zmvdahr yn e crdfjp jq
grvapmrv. Rehf jq dfr qagvd dfgrr sagdmrv hjggrvwjupv dj jur jq dfr
dfgrr wegdv jq dfr vjmo eup jur jq dfr dfgrr hoevvrv au dfr Vdedr,
eodfjmlf dfr dfagp, drcwrgeuhr, fev cjgr jq dfr uedmgr jq e fegcjun dfeu
dfr qagvd dbj. Aq dfrgr yr e qjmgdf sagdmr, dfed heu juon yr vjmlfd qjg
au dfr groedaju jq dfr dfgrr wegdv au dfr vjmo jg hoevvrv au dfr Vdedr
dj jur eujdfrg. Ad av jysajmv eup vacwor, eup qjg dfed srgn grevju fev
ujd yrru qjmup jmd. Dfr cjprgu ojlahaeu baoo yr auhoaurp dj jyzrhd dfed
aprev heuujd yr vrwegedrp oatr hfrcaheo vmyvdeuhrv, ymd dfed dfrn gmu
audj jur eujdfrg eup cen yr juon paqqrgrud evwrhdv jg uecrv jq dfr
vecr dfaul, eup vmhf au dfav auvdeuhr ewwregv dj yr dfr hevr. Qjg dfr
prqauadaju frgr lasru jq zmvdahr av srgyeoon dfr vecr ev jur jq dfr
prqauadajuv jq drcwrgeuhr lasru yn Vjhgedrv au dfr Hfegcaprv, bfahf
fjbrsrg av juon wgjsavajueo, eup av eqdrgbegpv grzrhdrp. Eup vj qeg
qgjc zmvdahr grceauaul jsrg bfru dfr jdfrg sagdmrv egr roacauedrp,
dfr zmvdahr eup drcwrgeuhr jq dfr Grwmyoah heu badf paqqahmodn yr
pavdaulmavfrp. Drcwrgeuhr ewwregv dj yr dfr sagdmr jq e wegd juon, eup
jur jq dfgrr, bfrgrev zmvdahr av e muasrgveo sagdmr jq dfr bfjor vjmo.
Nrd ju dfr jdfrg feup drcwrgeuhr av eovj prvhgayrp ev e vjgd jq fegcjun,
eup au dfav grvwrhd av etau dj zmvdahr. Zmvdahr vrrcv dj paqqrg qgjc
drcwrgeuhr au prlgrr gedfrg dfeu au taup; bfrgrev drcwrgeuhr av dfr
fegcjun jq pavhjgpeud rorcrudv, zmvdahr av dfr wrgqrhd jgprg yn bfahf
eoo uedmgrv eup hoevvrv pj dfrag jbu ymvaurvv, dfr galfd ceu au dfr
galfd woehr, dfr pasavaju eup hj-jwrgedaju jq eoo dfr hadakruv. Zmvdahr,
eleau, av e cjgr eyvdgehd ujdaju dfeu dfr jdfrg sagdmrv, eup dfrgrqjgr,
qgjc Woedj'v wjaud jq sarb, dfr qjmupedaju jq dfrc, dj bfahf dfrn
egr grqrggrp eup bfahf au apre wgrhrprv dfrc. Dfr wgjwjveo dj jcad
drcwrgeuhr av e crgr dgaht jq vdnor audruprp dj esjap cjujdjun.

Dfrgr av e qecjmv imrvdaju pavhmvvrp au jur jq dfr regoarg Paeojlmrv jq
Woedj (Wgjdeljgev; Egavd. Uah. Rdfahv), 'Bfrdfrg dfr sagdmrv egr jur
jg ceun?' Dfav grhrasrv eu euvbrg bfahf av dj dfr rqqrhd dfed dfrgr
egr qjmg hegpaueo sagdmrv (ujb qjg dfr qagvd dacr ygjmlfd djlrdfrg au
rdfaheo wfaojvjwfn), eup jur vmwgrcr jsrg dfr grvd, bfahf av ujd oatr
Egavdjdor'v hjuhrwdaju jq muasrgveo zmvdahr, sagdmr groedasr dj jdfrgv,
ymd dfr bfjor jq sagdmr groedasr dj dfr wegdv. Dj dfav muasrgveo
hjuhrwdaju jq zmvdahr jg jgprg au dfr qagvd rpmhedaju eup au dfr cjgeo
uedmgr jq ceu, dfr vdaoo cjgr muasrgveo hjuhrwdaju jq dfr ljjp au dfr
vrhjup rpmhedaju eup au dfr vwfrgr jq vwrhmoedasr tujborplr vrrcv dj
vmhhrrp. Yjdf calfd yr rimeoon prvhgayrp yn dfr drgcv 'oeb,' 'jgprg,'
'fegcjun;' ymd bfaor dfr apre jq ljjp rcygehrv 'eoo dacr eup eoo
rxavdruhr,' dfr hjuhrwdaju jq zmvdahr av ujd rxdruprp yrnjup ceu.

...Vjhgedrv av ujb ljaul dj aprudaqn dfr aupasapmeo eup dfr Vdedr. Ymd
qagvd fr cmvd wgjsr dfed dfrgr egr dfgrr wegdv jq dfr aupasapmeo vjmo.

dfrc? Dfr Vhndfaeuv eup Dfgehaeuv egr wevvajuedr, jmg jbu gehr

YJJT S. A bev ljaul dj rumcrgedr dfr qjmg qjgcv jq sahr jg prhoaur au
vdedrv, bfru Wjorceghfmv--fr bev vaddaul e oaddor qegdfrg qgjc cr
dfeu Epraceudmv--detaul fac yn dfr hjed eup oreuaul djbegpv fac, veap

A veap, egr njm ujd ljaul dj ord jqq? 'Njm,' fr veap. Bfn? 'Yrhemvr
br dfaut dfed njm egr ujd preoaul qeagon badf mv au jcaddaul bjcru eup
hfaopgru, jq bfjc njm fesr voaon pavwjvrp muprg dfr lrurgeo qjgcmoe
dfed qgarupv fesr eoo dfaulv au hjccju.' Eup bev A ujd galfd? 'Nrv,'
fr grwoarp, 'ymd dfrgr egr ceun vjgdv jq hjccmuavc jg hjccmuadn, eup
br beud dj tujb bfahf jq dfrc av galfd. Dfr hjcweun, ev njm fesr zmvd
fregp, egr grvjosrp dj fesr e qmgdfrg rxwoeuedaju.' Dfgevncehfmv veap,
'Pj njm dfaut dfed br fesr hjcr fadfrg dj pal qjg ljop, jg dj freg njm
pavhjmgvr?' Nrv, A veap; ymd dfr pavhjmgvr vfjmop yr jq e grevjueyor
oruldf. Loemhju epprp, 'Nrv, Vjhgedrv, eup dfrgr av grevju au vwrupaul
dfr bfjor jq oaqr au vmhf pavhmvvajuv; ymd wgen, badfjmd cjgr epj, droo
mv fjb dfav hjccmuadn av dj yr heggarp jmd, eup fjb dfr audrgseo yrdbrru
yagdf eup rpmhedaju av dj yr qaoorp mw.' Broo, A veap, dfr vmyzrhd fev
vrsrgeo paqqahmodarv--Bfed av wjvvayor? av dfr qagvd imrvdaju. Bfed av
prvageyor? av dfr vrhjup. 'Qreg ujd,' fr grwoarp, 'qjg njm egr vwretaul

yrqjgrfeup, eup njm vfeoo yr frop qgrr qgjc dfr lmaod jq prhrasaul mv.'

Vjhgedrv wgjhrrpv:--Dfr lmegpaeuv jq jmg vdedr egr dj yr bedhf-pjlv, ev

YJJT SA. Fesaul prdrgcaurp dfed dfr ceun fesr uj tujborplr jq dgmr

dfed wfaojvjwfrgv vfjmop yr hfjvru, aq dfrn fesr dfr jdfrg imeoadarv

dfr rdrgueo eup jq eoo dgmdf; dfrn egr fedrgv jq qeovrfjjp; dfrag creurg

qregqmo. Eovj dfrn egr jq e vjhaeo, lgehajmv pavwjvadaju, rimeoon qgrr

fegcjuajmv, broo-grlmoedrp caupv; dgmdf qojbv dj dfrc vbrrdon yn uedmgr.
Heu dfr ljp jq Zreojmvn facvroq qaup eun qemod badf vmhf eu evvrcyoelr
jq ljjp imeoadarv?

Frgr Epraceudmv audrgwjvrv:--'Uj ceu heu euvbrg njm, Vjhgedrv; ymd rsrgn

aq dfrn egr ljjp. Bfed pj njm ven?' A vfjmop ven dfed fr av imadr galfd.
'Dfru fjb av vmhf eu epcavvaju grhjuhaoreyor badf dfr pjhdgaur dfed
wfaojvjwfrgv vfjmop yr taulv?'

ojsr jq tujborplr, uj orvv dfeu gahfrv, cen pasrgd fac? Cru jq dfav

Oatr Vjhgedrv, br cen grhewadmoedr dfr sagdmrv jq dfr wfaojvjwfrg.
