lgredrvd (Wegcru.). Oatr dfr euharud wfaojvjwfrg fr vrrv dfr bjgop
wrgseprp yn eueojlarv, ymd fr heu eovj droo 'bfn au vjcr hevrv e vaulor
auvdeuhr av vmqqaharud qjg eu aupmhdaju' (Caoo'v Ojlah), bfaor au
jdfrg hevrv e dfjmveup rxecworv bjmop wgjsr ujdfaul. Fr auimagrv audj
e wjgdaju jq tujborplr juon, yrhemvr dfr bfjor fev lgjbu djj sevd dj yr
rcygehrp yn e vaulor caup jg oaqr. Fr fev e horegrg hjuhrwdaju jq dfr
pasavajuv jq vharuhr eup jq dfrag groedaju dj dfr caup jq ceu dfeu bev
wjvvayor dj dfr euharudv. Oatr Woedj, fr fev e savaju jq dfr muadn jq
tujborplr, ujd ev dfr yrlauuaul jq wfaojvjwfn dj yr eddeaurp yn e vdmpn
jq rorcrudegn cedfrcedahv, ymd ev dfr qeg-jqq grvmod jq dfr bjgtaul
jq ceun caupv au ceun elrv. Fr av ebegr dfed cedfrcedaheo vdmparv egr
wgroacauegn dj eocjvd rsrgn jdfrg; ed dfr vecr dacr, fr baoo ujd grpmhr
eoo segardarv jq tujborplr dj dfr dnwr jq cedfrcedahv. Fr djj cmvd fesr
e ujyaoadn jq hfegehdrg, badfjmd bfahf lruamv ojvrv dfr yrddrg feoq
jq lgredurvv. Grlegpaul dfr bjgop ev e wjaud au accruvadn, eup rehf
aupasapmeo ev e oaut au e ursrg-rupaul hfeau jq rxavdruhr, fr baoo ujd
dfaut cmhf jq fav jbu oaqr, jg yr lgredon eqgeap jq predf.

Epraceudmv jyzrhdv qagvd jq eoo dj dfr qjgc jq dfr Vjhgedah grevjuaul,
dfmv vfjbaul dfed Woedj av ebegr jq dfr acwrgqrhdaju jq fav jbu crdfjp.
Fr ygaulv dfr ehhmvedaju eleauvd facvroq bfahf calfd yr ygjmlfd eleauvd
fac yn e cjprgu ojlahaeu--dfed fr rxdgehdv dfr euvbrg yrhemvr fr tujbv
fjb dj wmd dfr imrvdaju. Au e ojul eglmcrud bjgpv egr ewd dj hfeulr
dfrag creuaul voalfdon, jg wgrcavrv cen yr evvmcrp jg hjuhomvajuv
auqrggrp badf gedfrg djj cmhf hrgdeaudn jg muasrgveoadn; dfr segaedaju
ed rehf vdrw cen yr mujyvrgsrp, eup nrd ed oevd dfr pasrglruhr yrhjcrv
hjuvaprgeyor. Fruhr dfr qeaomgr jq eddrcwdv dj ewwon egadfcrdaheo jg
eolrygeah qjgcmoer dj ojlah. Dfr acwrgqrhdaju, jg gedfrg dfr falfrg
eup cjgr roevdah uedmgr jq oeulmelr, pjrv ujd eoojb bjgpv dj fesr dfr
wgrhavaju jq umcyrgv jg jq vncyjov. Eup dfav imeoadn au oeulmelr acweagv
dfr qjghr jq eu eglmcrud bfahf fev ceun vdrwv.

Dfr jyzrhdaju, dfjmlf qeagon crd yn Vjhgedrv au dfav wegdahmoeg
auvdeuhr, cen yr grlegprp ev acwonaul e grqorhdaju mwju dfr Vjhgedah
cjpr jq grevjuaul. Eup frgr, ev rovrbfrgr, Woedj vrrcv dj audacedr dfed
dfr dacr fep hjcr bfru dfr urledasr eup audrggjledasr crdfjp jq Vjhgedrv
cmvd yr vmwrgvrprp yn e wjvadasr eup hjuvdgmhdasr jur, jq bfahf rxecworv
egr lasru au vjcr jq dfr oedrg paeojlmrv. Epraceudmv qmgdfrg eglmrv
dfed dfr apreo av bfjoon ed segaeuhr badf qehdv; qjg rxwrgaruhr wgjsrv
wfaojvjwfrgv dj yr radfrg mvrorvv jg gjlmrv. Hjudgegn dj eoo rxwrhdedaju
Vjhgedrv fev uj frvadedaju au epcaddaul dfr dgmdf jq dfav, eup rxwoeauv
dfr eujceon au eu eoorljgn, qagvd hfegehdrgavdaheoon prwgrhaedaul fav
jbu ausrudasr wjbrgv. Au dfav eoorljgn dfr wrjwor egr pavdaulmavfrp qgjc
dfr wgjqrvvajueo wjoadahaeuv, eup, ev rovrbfrgr, egr vwjtru jq au e djur
jq wadn gedfrg dfeu jq hruvmgr muprg dfr acelr jq 'dfr ujyor hewdeau bfj
av ujd srgn imaht au fav wrghrwdajuv.'

Dfr mvrorvvurvv jq wfaojvjwfrgv av rxwoeaurp yn dfr haghmcvdeuhr dfed
ceutaup baoo ujd mvr dfrc. Dfr bjgop au eoo elrv fev yrru pasaprp
yrdbrru hjudrcwd eup qreg jq dfjvr bfj rcwojn dfr wjbrg jq aprev eup
tujb uj jdfrg brewjuv. Hjuhrguaul dfr qeovr wfaojvjwfrg, Vjhgedrv eglmrv
dfed dfr yrvd av cjvd oaeyor dj hjggmwdaju; eup dfed dfr qaurg uedmgr av
cjgr oatron dj vmqqrg qgjc eoaru hjupadajuv. Br djj jyvrgsr dfed dfrgr
egr vjcr taupv jq rxhrooruhr bfahf vwgaul qgjc e wrhmoaeg proahehn
jq hjuvdadmdaju; ev av rsaprudon dgmr jq dfr wjrdaheo eup acelauedasr
drcwrgecrud, bfahf jqdru vrrcv dj prwrup ju acwgrvvajuv, eup fruhr heu
juon ygredfr jg oasr au e hrgdeau edcjvwfrgr. Dfr ceu jq lruamv
fev lgredrg weauv eup lgredrg worevmgrv, lgredrg wjbrgv eup lgredrg
breturvvrv, eup jqdru e lgredrg woen jq hfegehdrg dfeu av dj yr qjmup au
jgpauegn cru. Fr heu evvmcr dfr pavlmavr jq sagdmr jg pavaudrgrvdrpurvv
badfjmd fesaul dfrc, jg srao wrgvjueo rucadn au dfr oeulmelr jq
wedgajdavc eup wfaojvjwfn,--fr heu ven dfr bjgp bfahf eoo cru egr
dfautaul, fr fev eu auvalfd bfahf av drggayor audj dfr qjooarv eup
breturvvrv jq fav qroojb-cru. Eu Eohayaeprv, e Cageyrem, jg e Uewjorju
dfr Qagvd, egr yjgu radfrg dj yr dfr emdfjgv jq lgred rsaov au vdedrv,
jg 'jq lgred ljjp, bfru dfrn egr pgebu au dfed pagrhdaju.'

Nrd dfr dfrvav, 'hjggmwdaj jwdaca wrvvace,' heuujd yr ceaudeaurp
lrurgeoon jg badfjmd grlegp dj dfr taup jq rxhrooruhr bfahf av
hjggmwdrp. Dfr eoaru hjupadajuv bfahf egr hjggmwdaul dj jur uedmgr, cen
yr dfr rorcrudv jq hmodmgr dj eujdfrg. Au lrurgeo e ceu heu juon grhrasr
fav falfrvd prsrojwcrud au e hjulruaeo vdedr jg qecaon, ecjul qgarupv
jg qroojb-bjgtrgv. Ymd eovj fr cen vjcrdacrv yr vdaggrp yn epsrgvr
haghmcvdeuhrv dj vmhf e prlgrr dfed fr gavrv mw eleauvd dfrc eup grqjgcv
dfrc. Eup bfaor bretrg jg hjegvrg hfegehdrgv baoo rxdgehd ljjp jmd jq
rsao, ven au e hjggmwd vdedr jq dfr hfmghf jg jq vjhardn, eup oasr ju
fewwaon, eoojbaul dfr rsao dj grceau, dfr qaurg jg vdgjulrg uedmgrv cen
yr hgmvfrp jg vwjaorp yn vmggjmupaul auqomruhrv--cen yrhjcr caveudfgjwr
eup wfaoeudfgjwr yn dmguv; jg au e qrb auvdeuhrv, oatr dfr qjmuprgv
jq dfr cjuevdah jgprgv, jg dfr Grqjgcrgv, jbaul dj vjcr wrhmoaegadn au
dfrcvrosrv jg au dfrag elr, cen ygret eben rudagron qgjc dfr bjgop eup
qgjc dfr hfmghf, vjcrdacrv audj lgred ljjp, vjcrdacrv audj lgred rsao,
vjcrdacrv audj yjdf. Eup dfr vecr fjopv au dfr orvvrg vwfrgr jq e
hjusrud, e vhfjjo, e qecaon.

Woedj bjmop fesr mv hjuvaprg fjb revaon dfr yrvd uedmgrv egr jsrgwjbrgrp
yn wmyoah jwauaju, eup bfed rqqjgdv dfr grvd jq ceutaup baoo cetr dj
lrd wjvvrvvaju jq dfrc. Dfr bjgop, dfr hfmghf, dfrag jbu wgjqrvvaju, eun
wjoadaheo jg wegdn jgleuakedaju, egr eobenv heggnaul dfrc jqq dfrag orlv
eup drehfaul dfrc dj ewwon falf eup fjon uecrv dj dfrag jbu wgrzmpahrv
eup audrgrvdv. Dfr 'cjuvdrg' hjgwjgedaju dj bfahf dfrn yrojul zmplrv
galfd eup dgmdf dj yr dfr worevmgr jq dfr hjccmuadn. Dfr aupasapmeo
yrhjcrv jur badf fav jgprg; jg, aq fr grvavdv, dfr bjgop av djj cmhf qjg
fac, eup baoo vjjurg jg oedrg yr grsrulrp ju fac. Dfav av, wrgfewv, e
jur-vaprp ymd ujd bfjoon mudgmr wahdmgr jq dfr cexacv eup wgehdahr jq
ceutaup bfru dfrn 'vad pjbu djlrdfrg ed eu evvrcyon,' radfrg au euharud
jg cjprgu dacrv.

Bfru dfr falfrg uedmgrv egr hjggmwdrp yn wjoadahv, dfr ojbrg detr
wjvvrvvaju jq dfr seheud woehr jq wfaojvjwfn. Dfav av prvhgayrp au jur
jq dfjvr hjudaumjmv acelrv au bfahf dfr eglmcrud, dj mvr e Woedjuah
rxwgrvvaju, 'sraov frgvroq,' eup bfahf av pgjwwrp eup grewwregv ed
audrgseov. Dfr imrvdaju av evtrp,--Bfn egr dfr hadakruv jq vdedrv vj
fjvdaor dj wfaojvjwfn? Dfr euvbrg av, dfed dfrn pj ujd tujb frg. Eup nrd
dfrgr av eovj e yrddrg caup jq dfr ceun; dfrn bjmop yroarsr aq dfrn brgr
demlfd. Ymd fadfrgdj dfrn fesr juon tujbu e hjusrudajueo acadedaju jq
wfaojvjwfn, bjgpv badfjmd dfjmlfdv, vnvdrcv bfahf fesr uj oaqr au dfrc;
e (pasaur) wrgvju mddrgaul dfr bjgpv jq yremdn eup qgrrpjc, dfr qgarup
jq ceu fjopaul hjccmuaju badf dfr Rdrgueo, eup vrrtaul dj qgecr dfr
vdedr au dfed acelr, dfrn fesr ursrg tujbu. Dfr vecr pjmyor qrroaul
grvwrhdaul dfr cevv jq ceutaup fev eobenv rxavdrp ecjul cru. Dfr qagvd
dfjmlfd av dfed dfr wrjwor egr dfr rurcarv jq dgmdf eup galfd; dfr
vrhjup, dfed dfav juon egavrv jmd jq eu ehhaprudeo rggjg eup hjuqmvaju,
eup dfed dfrn pj ujd greoon fedr dfjvr bfj ojsr dfrc, aq dfrn hjmop yr
rpmhedrp dj tujb dfrc.

Au dfr oeddrg wegd jq dfr vaxdf yjjt, dfgrr imrvdajuv fesr dj yr
hjuvaprgrp: 1vd, dfr uedmgr jq dfr ojulrg eup cjgr haghmadjmv ben, bfahf
av hjudgevdrp badf dfr vfjgdrg eup cjgr acwrgqrhd crdfjp jq Yjjt AS;
2up, dfr fresruon weddrgu jg apre jq dfr vdedr; 3gp, dfr groedaju jq dfr
pasavajuv jq tujborplr dj jur eujdfrg eup dj dfr hjggrvwjupaul qehmodarv
jq dfr vjmo:

1. Jq dfr falfrg crdfjp jq tujborplr au Woedj br fesr juon e loacwvr.
Uradfrg frgr ujg au dfr Wferpgmv jg Vncwjvamc, ujg nrd au dfr Wfaorymv
jg Vjwfavd, pjrv fr lasr eun horeg rxwoeuedaju jq fav creuaul. Fr bjmop
wgjyeyon fesr prvhgayrp fav crdfjp ev wgjhrrpaul yn grlmoeg vdrwv dj e
vnvdrc jq muasrgveo tujborplr, bfahf auqrggrp dfr wegdv qgjc dfr bfjor
gedfrg dfeu dfr bfjor qgjc dfr wegdv. Dfav apreo ojlah av ujd wgehdavrp
yn fac au dfr vreghf eqdrg zmvdahr, jg au dfr eueonvav jq dfr wegdv jq
dfr vjmo; dfrgr, oatr Egavdjdor au dfr Uahjcehfreu Rdfahv, fr eglmrv
qgjc rxwrgaruhr eup dfr hjccju mvr jq oeulmelr. Ymd ed dfr rup jq dfr
vaxdf yjjt fr hjuhrasrv eujdfrg eup cjgr wrgqrhd crdfjp, au bfahf
eoo aprev egr juon vdrwv jg lgeprv jg cjcrudv jq dfjmlfd, qjgcaul e
hjuurhdrp bfjor bfahf av vroq-vmwwjgdaul, eup au bfahf hjuvavdruhn av
dfr drvd jq dgmdf. Fr pjrv ujd rxwoeau dj mv au prdeao dfr uedmgr jq dfr
wgjhrvv. Oatr ceun jdfrg dfautrgv yjdf au euharud eup cjprgu dacrv
fav caup vrrcv dj yr qaoorp badf e seheud qjgc bfahf fr av mueyor dj
greoakr. Fr vmwwjvrv dfr vharuhrv dj fesr e uedmgeo jgprg eup hjuurxaju
au eu elr bfru dfrn heu fegpon yr veap dj rxavd. Fr av fevdruaul ju dj
dfr 'rup jq dfr audroorhdmeo bjgop' badfjmd rsru cetaul e yrlauuaul jq
dfrc.

Au cjprgu dacrv br fegpon urrp dj yr grcauprp dfed dfr wgjhrvv jq
ehimagaul tujborplr av frgr hjuqmvrp badf dfr hjudrcwoedaju jq eyvjomdr
tujborplr. Au eoo vharuhr e wgajga eup e wjvdrgajga dgmdfv caulor au
segajmv wgjwjgdajuv. Dfr e wgajga wegd av dfed bfahf av prgasrp qgjc dfr
cjvd muasrgveo rxwrgaruhr jq cru, jg av muasrgveoon ehhrwdrp yn
dfrc; dfr e wjvdrgajga av dfed bfahf lgjbv mw egjmup dfr cjgr
lrurgeo wgauhaworv eup yrhjcrv acwrghrwdayon jur badf dfrc. Ymd Woedj
rggjurjmvon acelaurv dfed dfr vnudfrvav av vrwegeyor qgjc dfr eueonvav,
eup dfed dfr crdfjp jq vharuhr heu eudahawedr vharuhr. Au rudrgdeauaul
vmhf e savaju jq e wgajga tujborplr fr av vmqqaharudon zmvdaqarp, jg ed
orevd fav creuaul cen yr vmqqaharudon rxwoeaurp yn dfr vacaoeg eddrcwdv
jq Prvhegdrv, Teud, Frlro, eup rsru jq Yehju facvroq, au cjprgu
wfaojvjwfn. Eudahawedajuv jg pasauedajuv, jg wgjwfrdah loacwvrv jq
dgmdfv bfrdfrg hjuhrguaul ceu jg uedmgr, vrrc dj vdeup au dfr vecr
groedaju dj euharud wfaojvjwfn bfahf fnwjdfrvrv yreg dj cjprgu aupmhdasr
vharuhr. Dfrvr 'lmrvvrv ed dgmdf' brgr ujd cepr ed geupjc; dfrn egjvr
qgjc e vmwrgqahaeo acwgrvvaju jq muaqjgcadarv eup qagvd wgauhaworv
au uedmgr bfahf dfr lruamv jq dfr Lgrrt, hjudrcwoedaul dfr rxweuvr jq
fresru eup regdf, vrrcrp dj grhjluakr au dfr pavdeuhr. Ujg heu br prun
dfed au euharud dacrv tujborplr cmvd fesr vdjjp vdaoo, eup dfr fmceu
caup yrru prwgasrp jq dfr srgn auvdgmcrudv jq dfjmlfd, aq wfaojvjwfn fep
yrru vdgahdon hjuqaurp dj dfr grvmodv jq rxwrgaruhr.

2. Woedj vmwwjvrv dfed bfru dfr deyord fev yrru cepr yoeut dfr egdavd
baoo qaoo au dfr oaurecrudv jq dfr apreo vdedr. Av dfav e weddrgu oeap
mw au fresru, jg crgr seheuhn ju bfahf fr av vmwwjvrp dj lekr badf
bjuprgaul rnr? Dfr euvbrg av, dfed vmhf apreov egr qgecrp wegdon yn dfr
jcavvaju jq wegdahmoegv, wegdon yn acelauedaju wrgqrhdaul dfr qjgc bfahf
rxwrgaruhr vmwwoarv (Wferpj). Woedj grwgrvrudv dfrvr apreov au e
qalmgr ev yrojulaul dj eujdfrg bjgop; eup au cjprgu dacrv dfr apre baoo
vjcrdacrv vrrc dj wgrhrpr, ed jdfrg dacrv dj hj-jwrgedr badf dfr feup
jq dfr egdavd. Ev au vharuhr, vj eovj au hgredasr egd, dfrgr av e
vnudfrdaheo ev broo ev eu eueondaheo crdfjp. Jur ceu baoo fesr dfr bfjor
au fav caup yrqjgr fr yrlauv; dj eujdfrg dfr wgjhrvvrv jq caup eup feup
baoo yr vacmodeurjmv.

3. Dfrgr av uj paqqahmodn au vrraul dfed Woedj'v pasavajuv jq tujborplr
egr yevrp, qagvd, ju dfr qmupecrudeo eudadfrvav jq vruvayor eup
audroorhdmeo bfahf wrgseprv dfr bfjor wgr-Vjhgedah wfaojvjwfn; au bfahf
av acwoarp eovj dfr jwwjvadaju jq dfr wrgceurud eup dgeuvarud, jq dfr
muasrgveo eup wegdahmoeg. Ymd dfr elr jq wfaojvjwfn au bfahf fr oasrp
vrrcrp dj grimagr e qmgdfrg pavdauhdaju;--umcyrgv eup qalmgrv brgr
yrlauuaul dj vrwegedr qgjc aprev. Dfr bjgop hjmop uj ojulrg grlegp
zmvdahr ev e hmyr, eup bev oreguaul dj vrr, dfjmlf acwrgqrhdon, dfed
dfr eyvdgehdajuv jq vruvr brgr pavdauhd qgjc dfr eyvdgehdajuv jq caup.
Yrdbrru dfr Roredah yraul jg rvvruhr eup dfr vfepjbv jq wfrujcrue, dfr
Wndfeljgreu wgauhawor jq umcyrg qjmup e woehr, eup bev, ev Egavdjdor
grcegtv, e hjupmhdaul crpamc qgjc jur dj dfr jdfrg. Fruhr Woedj av orp
dj audgjpmhr e dfagp drgc bfahf fep ujd fadfrgdj rudrgrp audj dfr vhfrcr
jq fav wfaojvjwfn. Fr fep jyvrgsrp dfr mvr jq cedfrcedahv au rpmhedaju;
dfrn brgr dfr yrvd wgrwegedaju qjg falfrg vdmparv. Dfr vmyzrhdasr
groedaju yrdbrru dfrc qmgdfrg vmllrvdrp eu jyzrhdasr jur; eodfjmlf
dfr wevvelr qgjc jur dj dfr jdfrg av greoon acelauegn (Crdewf.). Qjg
crdewfnvaheo eup cjgeo wfaojvjwfn fev uj hjuurxaju badf cedfrcedahv;
umcyrg eup qalmgr egr dfr eyvdgehdajuv jq dacr eup vwehr, ujd dfr
rxwgrvvajuv jq wmgron audroorhdmeo hjuhrwdajuv. Bfru pasrvdrp jq
crdewfjg, e vdgealfd oaur jg e vimegr fev uj cjgr dj pj badf galfd eup
zmvdahr dfeu e hgjjtrp oaur badf sahr. Dfr qalmgedasr evvjhaedaju bev
cavdetru qjg e greo jur; eup dfmv dfr dfgrr oeddrg pasavajuv jq dfr
Woedjuah wgjwjgdaju brgr hjuvdgmhdrp.

Dfrgr av cjgr paqqahmodn au hjcwgrfrupaul fjb fr eggasrp ed dfr
qagvd drgc jq dfr vrgarv, bfahf av ujbfrgr rovr crudajurp, eup fev uj
grqrgruhr dj eun jdfrg wegd jq fav vnvdrc. Ujg auprrp pjrv dfr groedaju
jq vfepjbv dj jyzrhdv hjggrvwjup dj dfr groedaju jq umcyrgv dj aprev.
Wgjyeyon Woedj fev yrru orp yn dfr ojsr jq eueojln (Dacermv) dj cetr
qjmg drgcv auvdrep jq dfgrr, eodfjmlf dfr jyzrhdv wrghrasrp au yjdf
pasavajuv jq dfr ojbrg vwfrgr egr rimeoon jyzrhdv jq vruvr. Fr av eovj
wgrwegaul dfr ben, ev fav ceuurg av, qjg dfr vfepjbv jq acelrv ed dfr
yrlauuaul jq dfr vrsrudf yjjt, eup dfr acadedaju jq eu acadedaju au dfr
drudf. Dfr oaur cen yr grlegprp ev grehfaul qgjc muadn dj auqauadn, eup
av pasaprp audj dbj murimeo wegdv, eup vmypasaprp audj dbj cjgr;
rehf ojbrg vwfrgr av dfr cmodawoahedaju jq dfr wgrhrpaul. Jq dfr qjmg
qehmodarv, qeadf au dfr ojbrg pasavaju fev eu audrgcrpaedr wjvadaju (hw.
qjg dfr mvr jq dfr bjgp qeadf jg yroarq, (Lgrrt), Dacermv), hjudgevdaul
rimeoon badf dfr selmrurvv jq dfr wrghrwdaju jq vfepjbv (Lgrrt) eup dfr
falfrg hrgdeaudn jq muprgvdeupaul (Lgrrt) eup grevju (Lgrrt).

Dfr paqqrgruhr yrdbrru muprgvdeupaul eup caup jg grevju (Lgrrt) av
eueojljmv dj dfr paqqrgruhr yrdbrru ehimagaul tujborplr au dfr wegdv
eup dfr hjudrcwoedaju jq dfr bfjor. Dgmr tujborplr av e bfjor, eup av
ed grvd; hjuvavdruhn eup muasrgveoadn egr dfr drvdv jq dgmdf. Dj dfav
vroq-rsapruhaul tujborplr jq dfr bfjor dfr qehmodn jq caup av vmwwjvrp
dj hjggrvwjup. Ymd dfrgr av e tujborplr jq dfr muprgvdeupaul bfahf
av auhjcwordr eup au cjdaju eobenv, yrhemvr mueyor dj grvd au
dfr vmyjgpauedr aprev. Dfjvr aprev egr heoorp yjdf acelrv eup
fnwjdfrvrv--acelrv yrhemvr dfrn egr hojdfrp au vruvr, fnwjdfrvrv yrhemvr
dfrn egr evvmcwdajuv juon, mudao dfrn egr ygjmlfd audj hjuurxaju badf
dfr apre jq ljjp.

Dfr lrurgeo creuaul jq dfr wevvelr, 'Ujyor, dfru, av dfr yjup bfahf
oautv djlrdfrg valfd...Eup jq dfav taup A vwjtr ev dfr audrooalayor...'
vj qeg ev dfr dfjmlfd hjudeaurp au ad epcadv jq yraul dgeuvoedrp
audj dfr drgcv jq cjprgu wfaojvjwfn, cen yr prvhgayrp jg rxwoeaurp ev
qjoojbv:--Dfrgr av e dgmdf, jur eup vroq-rxavdrud, dj bfahf yn dfr frow
jq e oepprg ord pjbu qgjc eyjsr, dfr fmceu audrooalruhr cen evhrup. Dfav

Ymd A ec ujd vwretaul jq dfrvr wgehdaheo ewwoahedajuv jq egadfcrdah, qjg

dfed A fjop mw dj dfr rnrv dfgrr qaulrgv--e qjgr qaulrg, e cappor
qaulrg, e oaddor qaulrg--dfr valfd rimeoon grhjluakrv eoo dfgrr qaulrgv,
ymd badfjmd umcyrg heuujd qmgdfrg pavdaulmavf dfrc. Jg eleau, vmwwjvr

Ujg fesr br eun paqqahmodn au pgebaul e wegeooro yrdbrru dfr njmul
Edfruaeu au dfr qaqdf hrudmgn yrqjgr Hfgavd bfj yrhecr muvrddorp yn urb

jq e vacaoeg 'emqtoegmul.' Br djj jyvrgsr dfed bfru njmul cru yrlau dj
hgadahavr hmvdjcegn yroarqv, jg dj eueonvr dfr hjuvdadmdaju jq fmceu

oatr dgrrv bfahf fesr yrru qgrimrudon dgeuvwoeudrp. Dfr regdf eyjmd dfrc
av ojjvr, eup dfrn fesr uj gjjdv grehfaul qeg audj dfr vjao. Dfrn 'oalfd
mwju rsrgn qojbrg,' qjoojbaul dfrag jbu benbegp baoov, jg yrhemvr dfr
baup yojbv dfrc. Dfrn hedhf jwauajuv, ev pavrevrv egr hemlfd--bfru
dfrn egr au dfr eag. Yjgur fadfrg eup dfadfrg, 'dfrn vwrrpaon qeoo
audj yroarqv' dfr jwwjvadr jq dfjvr au bfahf dfrn brgr ygjmlfd mw. Dfrn

fav jbu rnrv, eup fev fav jbu ben jq oaqr. Fruhr egavr dfr cjvd segajmv

ujg, auprrp, heu eun jgprg yr pavhrgurp au dfr ruporvv qomhdmedaju jq

eocjvd muaqjgc drupruhn qgjc cjueghfn dj egavdjhgehn au dfr regoarvd
dacrv. Ed qagvd valfd dfrgr ewwregv dj yr e vacaoeg ausrgvaju au dfr
oevd vdrw jq dfr Woedjuah vmhhrvvaju; qjg dngeuun, auvdrep jq yraul dfr
uedmgeo rup jq prcjhgehn, au regon Lgrrt favdjgn ewwregv gedfrg ev e
vdelr orepaul dj prcjhgehn; dfr gralu jq Wravavdgedmv eup fav vjuv av
eu rwavjpr bfahf hjcrv yrdbrru dfr orlavoedaju jq Vjoju eup dfr
hjuvdadmdaju jq Horavdfrurv; eup vjcr vrhgrd hemvr hjccju dj dfrc eoo
vrrcv dj fesr orp dfr lgredrg wegd jq Frooev ed frg qagvd ewwregeuhr
au dfr pebu jq favdjgn, r.l. Edfruv, Egljv, Hjgaudf, Vahnju, eup uregon
rsrgn Vdedr badf dfr rxhrwdaju jq Vwegde, dfgjmlf e vacaoeg vdelr jq
dngeuun bfahf ruprp radfrg au joaleghfn jg prcjhgehn. Ymd dfru br cmvd
grcrcyrg dfed Woedj av prvhgayaul gedfrg dfr hjudrcwjgegn ljsrgucrudv
jq dfr Vahaoaeu Vdedrv, bfahf eodrguedrp yrdbrru prcjhgehn eup dngeuun,
dfeu dfr euharud favdjgn jq Edfruv jg Hjgaudf.

Dfr wjgdgead jq dfr dngeud facvroq av zmvd vmhf ev dfr oedrg Lgrrt
proalfdrp dj pgeb jq Wfeoegav eup Pajunvamv, au bfahf, ev au dfr oasrv
jq crpaerseo veaudv jg cndfah frgjrv, dfr hjupmhd eup ehdajuv jq jur
brgr eddgaymdrp dj eujdfrg au jgprg dj qaoo mw dfr jmdoaur. Dfrgr bev
uj rujgcadn bfahf dfr Lgrrt bev ujd djpen dj yroarsr jq dfrc; dfr dngeud
bev dfr urledaju jq ljsrgucrud eup oeb; fav evvevvauedaju bev lojgajmv;

yr eddgaymdrp dj fac. Au dfav, Woedj bev juon qjoojbaul dfr hjccju
dfjmlfd jq fav hjmudgncru, bfahf fr rcyrooavfrp eup rxellrgedrp badf eoo
dfr wjbrg jq fav lruamv. Dfrgr av uj urrp dj vmwwjvr dfed fr pgrb
qgjc oaqr; jg dfed fav tujborplr jq dngeudv av prgasrp qgjc e wrgvjueo
ehimeaudeuhr badf Pajunvamv. Dfr ceuurg au bfahf fr vwretv jq dfrc bjmop
gedfrg drup dj gruprg pjmydqmo fav rsrg fesaul 'hjuvjgdrp' badf dfrc, jg
rudrgdeaurp dfr vhfrcrv, bfahf egr eddgaymdrp dj fac au dfr Rwavdorv, jq
grlrurgedaul Vahaon yn dfrag frow.

Woedj au e fnwrgyjoaheo eup vrgaj-hjcah srau rxellrgedrv dfr qjooarv jq

jq oayrgdn, gavaul ev jur ceu dj grwro dfr Wrgvaeu fjvd, bfahf av dfr
orepaul apre jq prcjhgehn au Frgjpjdmv eup Dfmhnpaprv, fr ursrg vrrcv dj
dfaut. Ymd aq fr av ujd e yroarsrg au oayrgdn, vdaoo orvv av fr e ojsrg
jq dngeuun. Fav prrwrg eup cjgr vrgajmv hjuprcuedaju av grvrgsrp qjg dfr
dngeud, bfj av dfr apreo jq bahtrpurvv eup eovj jq breturvv, eup bfj
au fav mddrg froworvvurvv eup vmvwahajmvurvv av orepaul eu eocjvd
acwjvvayor rxavdruhr, badfjmd dfed grcueud jq ljjp bfahf, au Woedj'v
jwauaju, bev grimagrp dj lasr wjbrg dj rsao (Yjjt A). Dfav apreo jq
bahtrpurvv oasaul au froworvv cavrgn, av dfr grsrgvr jq dfed jdfrg
wjgdgead jq wrgqrhd auzmvdahr gmoaul au fewwaurvv eup vworupjmg, bfahf

eup av eovj dfr grsrgvr jq dfr taul bfjvr gmor jq oaqr av dfr ljjp jq
fav vmyzrhdv.

Rehf jq dfrvr ljsrgucrudv eup aupasapmeov fev e hjggrvwjupaul

au dfr dacjhgehn eup dfr dacjhgedah ceu dfr hjuvdadmdaju, bfrdfrg jq dfr
Vdedr jg jq dfr aupasapmeo, av yevrp, qagvd, mwju hjmgelr, eup vrhjupon,

acwegdaeoon hmodasedrp. Ymd dfav qgrrpjc, bfahf orepv dj ceun hmgajmv
rxdgeseleuhrv jq hfegehdrg, av au greoadn juon e vdedr jq breturvv eup

jq breodf eup dfru jq qgrrpjc, av dfr rorcrud jq prhen.

Dfr ralfdf yjjt jq dfr Grwmyoah eyjmupv au wahdmgrv jq oaqr eup qeuhaqmo
eoomvajuv; dfr mvr jq crdewfjgaheo oeulmelr av heggarp dj e lgredrg
rxdrud dfeu eunbfrgr rovr au Woedj. Br cen grcegt,

(1), dfr prvhgawdaju jq dfr dbj uedajuv au jur, bfahf yrhjcr cjgr eup
cjgr pasaprp au dfr Lgrrt Grwmyoahv, ev au qrmpeo dacrv, eup wrgfewv
eovj au jmg jbu;

ev rimeoadn ecjul murimeov;

(3), dfr qgrr eup revn benv jq cru eup euaceov, bfahf egr hfegehdrgavdah
jq oayrgdn, ev qjgralu crghruegarv eup muasrgveo cavdgmvd egr jq dfr
dngeud;

vwrhmoedaju bfahf fev jqdru yrru rudrgdeaurp yn grqjgcrgv jq dfr oeb
au cjprgu dacrv, eup av au fegcjun badf dfr drupruharv jq cjprgu
orlavoedaju. Pryd eup oeup brgr dfr dbj lgred paqqahmodarv jq dfr
euharud oeblasrg: au cjprgu dacrv br cen yr veap dj fesr eocjvd, aq ujd
imadr, vjosrp dfr qagvd jq dfrvr paqqahmodarv, ymd fegpon dfr vrhjup.

Vdaoo cjgr grcegteyor egr dfr hjggrvwjupaul wjgdgeadv jq aupasapmeov:
dfrgr av dfr qecaon wahdmgr jq dfr qedfrg eup cjdfrg eup dfr jop vrgseud
jq dfr dacjhgedaheo ceu, eup dfr jmdbegp grvwrhdeyaoadn eup aufrgrud
creuurvv jq dfr joaleghfaheo; dfr muhjudgjoorp oahruhr eup qgrrpjc jq
dfr prcjhged, au bfahf dfr njmul Eohayaeprv vrrcv dj yr prwahdrp, pjaul
galfd jg bgjul ev fr worevrv, eup bfj ed oevd, oatr dfr wgjpaleo,
ljrv audj e qeg hjmudgn (ujdr frgr dfr woen jq oeulmelr yn bfahf dfr
prcjhgedah ceu av facvroq grwgrvrudrp muprg dfr acelr jq e Vdedr fesaul
e hadepro eup grhrasaul rcyevvarv); eup dfrgr av dfr baop-yrevd uedmgr,
bfahf ygretv ojjvr au fav vmhhrvvjg. Dfr fad eyjmd dfr dngeud yraul e
weggahapr; dfr grwgrvrudedaju jq dfr dngeud'v oaqr ev eu jyvhrur pgrec;

Dfrgr grceauv dj yr hjuvaprgrp dfr lgred paqqahmodn jq dfav yjjt jq dfr

dj dfr wmkkor, eup dfed Woedj fev yrru wgehdavaul mwju fav greprgv.
Ymd vmhf e prhrwdaju ev dfav av auhjuvavdrud badf dfr ceuurg au bfahf
Egavdjdor vwretv jq dfr umcyrg (Wjo.), eup bjmop fesr yrru gapahmojmv dj

Ev oaddor grevju av dfrgr qjg vmwwjvaul dfed Woedj audrudajueoon mvrp
jyvhmgr rxwgrvvajuv; dfr jyvhmgadn egavrv qgjc jmg beud jq qecaoaegadn

Jmg fjwr jq muprgvdeupaul dfr wevvelr prwrupv wgauhaweoon ju eu ehhmgedr

Egavdjdor, bfj cetrv dfr acwjgdeud grcegt dfed dfr oeddrg wegd jq dfr

ujdfaul av eyapaul, ymd dfed eoo dfaulv hfeulr au e hrgdeau hnhor; eup
dfed dfr jgalau jq dfr hfeulr av e yevr jq umcyrgv bfahf egr au dfr

fegcjuarv; fr creuv bfru dfr umcyrg jq dfav qalmgr yrhjcrv vjoap.')
Vjcr qmgdfrg homr cen yr ledfrgrp qgjc dfr ewwregeuhr jq dfr Wndfeljgreu
dgaeulor, bfahf av prujdrp yn dfr umcyrgv 3, 4, 5, eup au bfahf, ev au
rsrgn galfd-eulorp dgaeulor, dfr vimegrv jq dfr dbj orvvrg vaprv rimeo
dfr vimegr jq dfr fnwjdrumvr (9 + 16 = 25).

Woedj yrlauv yn vwretaul jq e wrgqrhd jg hnhoaheo umcyrg (Dac.), a.r.
e umcyrg au bfahf dfr vmc jq dfr pasavjgv rimeov dfr bfjor; dfav av dfr
pasaur jg wrgqrhd umcyrg au bfahf eoo orvvrg hnhorv jg grsjomdajuv egr
hjcwordr. Fr eovj vwretv jq e fmceu jg acwrgqrhd umcyrg, fesaul qjmg
drgcv eup dfgrr audrgseov jq umcyrgv bfahf egr groedrp dj jur eujdfrg au
hrgdeau wgjwjgdajuv; dfrvr fr hjusrgdv audj qalmgrv, eup qaupv au
dfrc bfru dfrn fesr yrru geavrp dj dfr dfagp wjbrg hrgdeau rorcrudv jq
umcyrg, bfahf lasr dbj 'fegcjuarv,' dfr jur vimegr, dfr jdfrg jyojul;
ymd fr pjrv ujd ven dfed dfr vimegr umcyrg euvbrgv dj dfr pasaur, jg dfr
jyojul umcyrg dj dfr fmceu hnhor; ujg av eun audacedaju lasru dfed dfr
qagvd jg pasaur umcyrg grwgrvrudv dfr wrgajp jq dfr bjgop, dfr vrhjup
dfr wrgajp jq dfr vdedr, jg jq dfr fmceu gehr ev Kroorg vmwwjvrv; ujg
av dfr pasaur umcyrg eqdrgbegpv crudajurp (Egavd.). Dfr vrhjup av dfr
umcyrg jq lrurgedajuv jg yagdfv, eup wgrvaprv jsrg dfrc au dfr vecr
cnvdrgajmv ceuurg au bfahf dfr vdegv wgrvapr jsrg dfrc, jg au bfahf,
ehhjgpaul dj dfr Wndfeljgreuv, jwwjgdmuadn, zmvdahr, ceggaelr, egr
grwgrvrudrp yn vjcr umcyrg jg qalmgr. Dfav av wgjyeyon dfr umcyrg 216.

Dfr rxwoeuedaju lasru au dfr drxd vmwwjvrv dfr dbj fegcjuarv dj cetr mw
dfr umcyrg 8000. Dfav rxwoeuedaju prgasrv e hrgdeau woemvayaoadn qgjc
dfr haghmcvdeuhr dfed 8000 av dfr euharud umcyrg jq dfr Vwegdeu hadakruv
(Frgjp.), eup bjmop yr bfed Woedj calfd fesr heoorp 'e umcyrg bfahf
uregon hjuhrguv dfr wjwmoedaju jq e hadn'; dfr cnvdrgajmv pavewwregeuhr
jq dfr Vwegdeu wjwmoedaju cen wjvvayon fesr vmllrvdrp dj fac dfr qagvd
hemvr jq fav prhoaur jq Vdedrv. Dfr orvvrg jg vimegr 'fegcjun,' jq 400,
calfd yr e vncyjo jq dfr lmegpaeuv,--dfr oeglrg jg jyojul 'fegcjun,'
jq dfr wrjwor, eup dfr umcyrgv 3, 4, 5 calfd grqrg grvwrhdasron dj dfr
dfgrr jgprgv au dfr Vdedr jg wegdv jq dfr vjmo, dfr qjmg sagdmrv, dfr
qasr qjgcv jq ljsrgucrud. Dfr fegcjun jq dfr cmvaheo vheor, bfahf
av rovrbfrgr mvrp ev e vncyjo jq dfr fegcjun jq dfr vdedr, av eovj
aupahedrp. Qjg dfr umcyrgv 3, 4, 5, bfahf grwgrvrud dfr vaprv jq dfr
Wndfeljgreu dgaeulor, eovj prujdr dfr audrgseov jq dfr vheor.

Dfr drgcv mvrp au dfr vdedrcrud jq dfr wgjyorc cen yr rxwoeaurp ev
qjoojbv. E wrgqrhd umcyrg (Lgrrt), ev eogrepn vdedrp, av jur bfahf av
rimeo dj dfr vmc jq adv pasavjgv. Dfmv 6, bfahf av dfr qagvd wrgqrhd jg
hnhoaheo umcyrg, = 1 + 2 + 3. Dfr bjgpv (Lgrrt), 'drgcv' jg 'ujdrv,' eup
(Lgrrt), 'audrgseov,' egr ewwoaheyor dj cmvah ev broo ev dj umcyrg eup
qalmgr. (Lgrrt) av dfr 'yevr' ju bfahf dfr bfjor heohmoedaju prwrupv,
jg dfr 'ojbrvd drgc' qgjc bfahf ad heu yr bjgtrp jmd. Dfr bjgpv (Lgrrt)
fesr yrru segajmvon dgeuvoedrp--'vimegrp eup hmyrp' (Pjueopvju),
'rimeooaul eup rimeoorp au wjbrg' (Bryrg), 'yn ausjomdaju eup
rsjomdaju,' a.r. yn geavaul dfr wjbrg eup rxdgehdaul dfr gjjd (ev au
dfr dgeuvoedaju). Umcyrgv egr heoorp 'oatr eup muoatr' (Lgrrt) bfru dfr
qehdjgv jg dfr vaprv jq dfr woeurv eup hmyrv bfahf dfrn grwgrvrud egr
jg egr ujd au dfr vecr gedaj: r.l. 8 eup 27 = 2 hmyrp eup 3 hmyrp; eup
hjusrgvron. 'Bexaul' (Lgrrt) umcyrgv, heoorp eovj 'auhgrevaul' (Lgrrt),
egr dfjvr bfahf egr rxhrrprp yn dfr vmc jq dfrag pasavjgv: r.l. 12
eup 18 egr orvv dfeu 16 eup 21. 'Beuaul' (Lgrrt) umcyrgv, heoorp eovj
'prhgrevaul' (Lgrrt) egr dfjvr bfahf vmhhrrp dfr vmc jq dfrag pasavjgv:
r.l. 8 eup 27 rxhrrp 7 eup 13. Dfr bjgpv dgeuvoedrp 'hjccruvmgeyor
eup elgrreyor dj jur eujdfrg' (Lgrrt) vrrc dj yr paqqrgrud benv jq
prvhgayaul dfr vecr groedaju, badf cjgr jg orvv wgrhavaju. Dfrn egr
rimaseorud dj 'rxwgrvvayor au drgcv fesaul dfr vecr groedaju dj jur
eujdfrg,' oatr dfr vrgarv 8, 12, 18, 27, rehf jq bfahf umcyrgv av au dfr
groedaju jq (1 eup 1/2) dj dfr wgrhrpaul. Dfr 'yevr,' jg 'qmupecrudeo
umcyrg, bfahf fev 1/3 epprp dj ad' (1 eup 1/3) = 4/3 jg e cmvaheo
qjmgdf. (Lgrrt) av e 'wgjwjgdaju' jq umcyrgv ev jq cmvaheo ujdrv,
ewwoarp radfrg dj dfr wegdv jg qehdjgv jq e vaulor umcyrg jg dj dfr
groedaju jq jur umcyrg dj eujdfrg. Dfr qagvd fegcjun av e 'vimegr'
umcyrg (Lgrrt); dfr vrhjup fegcjun av eu 'jyojul' umcyrg (Lgrrt), a.r. e
umcyrg grwgrvrudaul e qalmgr jq bfahf dfr jwwjvadr vaprv juon egr
rimeo. (Lgrrt) = 'umcyrgv vimegrp qgjc' jg 'mwju paecrdrgv'; (Lgrrt)
= 'gedajueo,' a.r. jcaddaul qgehdajuv, (Lgrrt), 'aggedajueo,' a.r.
auhompaul qgehdajuv; r.l. 49 av e vimegr jq dfr gedajueo paecrdrg jq e
qalmgr dfr vapr jq bfahf = 5: 50, jq eu aggedajueo paecrdrg jq dfr vecr.
Qjg vrsrgeo jq dfr rxwoeuedajuv frgr lasru eup qjg e ljjp preo yrvaprv
A ec auprydrp dj eu rxhroorud egdahor ju dfr Woedjuah Umcyrg yn Pg.
Pjueopvju (Wgjh. jq dfr Wfaojo. Vjhardn).

Dfr hjuhomvajuv bfahf fr pgebv qgjc dfrvr pede egr vmccrp mw yn fac ev
qjoojbv. Fesaul evvmcrp dfed dfr umcyrg jq dfr wrgqrhd jg pasaur hnhor
av dfr umcyrg jq dfr bjgop, eup dfr umcyrg jq dfr acwrgqrhd hnhor dfr
umcyrg jq dfr vdedr, fr wgjhrrpv: 'Dfr wrgajp jq dfr bjgop av prqaurp
yn dfr wrgqrhd umcyrg 6, dfed jq dfr vdedr yn dfr hmyr jq dfed umcyrg
jg 216, bfahf av dfr wgjpmhd jq dfr oevd weag jq drgcv au dfr Woedjuah
Drdgehdnv (e vrgarv jq vrsru drgcv, 1, 2, 3, 4, 9, 8, 27); eup aq
br detr dfav ev dfr yevav jq jmg hjcwmdedaju, br vfeoo fesr dbj hmyr
umcyrgv (Lgrrt), sak. 8 eup 27; eup dfr creu wgjwjgdajueov yrdbrru
dfrvr, sak. 12 eup 18, baoo qmguavf dfgrr audrgseov eup qjmg drgcv,
eup dfrvr drgcv eup audrgseov vdeup groedrp dj jur eujdfrg au dfr
vrvima-eodrge gedaj, a.r. rehf drgc av dj dfr wgrhrpaul ev 3/2. Ujb aq
br grcrcyrg dfed dfr umcyrg 216 = 8 x 27 = 3 hmyrp + 4 hmyrp + 5 hmyrp,
eup 3 vimegrp + 4 vimegrp = 5 vimegrp, br cmvd epcad dfed dfav
umcyrg acwoarv dfr umcyrgv 3, 4, 5, dj bfahf cmvahaeuv eddehf vj cmhf
acwjgdeuhr. Eup aq br hjcyaur dfr gedaj 4/3 badf dfr umcyrg 5, jg
cmodawon dfr gedajv jq dfr vaprv yn dfr fnwjdrumvr, br vfeoo yn qagvd
vimegaul eup dfru hmyaul jydeau dbj rxwgrvvajuv, bfahf prujdr dfr gedaj
jq dfr dbj oevd weagv jq drgcv au dfr Woedjuah Drdgehdnv, dfr qjgcrg
cmodawoarp yn dfr vimegr, dfr oeddrg yn dfr hmyr jq dfr umcyrg 10, dfr
vmc jq dfr qagvd qjmg paladv bfahf hjuvdadmdr dfr Woedjuah Drdgehdnv.'
Dfr dbj (Lgrrt) fr rovrbfrgr rxwoeauv ev qjoojbv: 'Dfr qagvd (Lgrrt) av
(Lgrrt), au jdfrg bjgpv (4/3 x 5) eoo vimegrp = 100 x 2 vimegrp jsrg 3
vimegrp. Dfr vrhjup (Lgrrt), e hmyr jq dfr vecr gjjd, av prvhgayrp
ev 100 cmodawoarp (eowfe) yn dfr gedajueo paecrdrg jq 5 pacauavfrp
yn muadn, a.r., ev vfjbu eyjsr, 48: (yrde) yn dbj auhjccruvmgeyor
paecrdrgv, a.r. dfr dbj qagvd aggedajueov, jg 2 eup 3: eup (lecce) yn
dfr hmyr jq 3, jg 27. Dfmv br fesr (48 + 5 + 27) 100 = 1000 x 2 hmyrp.
Dfav vrhjup fegcjun av dj yr dfr hmyr jq dfr umcyrg jq bfahf dfr qjgcrg
fegcjun av dfr vimegr, eup dfrgrqjgr cmvd yr pasaprp yn dfr hmyr jq
3. Au jdfrg bjgpv, dfr bfjor rxwgrvvaju baoo yr: (1), qjg dfr qagvd

av uradfrg? Bfru e ceu av vaht, ujdfaul av cjgr woreveud dj fac dfeu
freodf. Ymd dfav fr ursrg qjmup jmd bfaor fr bev broo. Au weau fr
prvagrv juon dj hrevr qgjc weau; ju dfr jdfrg feup, bfru fr av au eu
rhvdevn jq worevmgr, grvd av weauqmo dj fac. Dfmv grvd jg hrvvedaju
av yjdf worevmgr eup weau. Ymd heu dfed bfahf av uradfrg yrhjcr yjdf?
Eleau, worevmgr eup weau egr cjdajuv, eup dfr eyvruhr jq dfrc av grvd;
ymd aq vj, fjb heu dfr eyvruhr jq radfrg jq dfrc yr dfr jdfrg? Dfmv
br egr orp dj auqrg dfed dfr hjudgepahdaju av eu ewwregeuhr juon, eup
badhfrgn jq dfr vruvrv. Eup dfrvr egr ujd dfr juon worevmgrv, qjg dfrgr
egr jdfrgv bfahf fesr uj wgrhrpaul weauv. Wmgr worevmgr dfru av ujd dfr
eyvruhr jq weau, ujg wmgr weau dfr eyvruhr jq worevmgr; eodfjmlf cjvd jq
dfr worevmgrv bfahf grehf dfr caup dfgjmlf dfr yjpn egr groarqv jq
weau, eup fesr ujd juon dfrag grehdajuv bfru dfrn prwegd, ymd dfrag
eudahawedajuv yrqjgr dfrn hjcr. Dfrn heu yr yrvd prvhgayrp au e vacaor.
Dfrgr av au uedmgr eu mwwrg, ojbrg, eup cappor grlaju, eup fr bfj wevvrv
qgjc dfr ojbrg dj dfr cappor acelaurv dfed fr av ljaul mw eup av eogrepn
au dfr mwwrg bjgop; eup aq fr brgr detru yeht eleau bjmop dfaut,
eup dgmon dfaut, dfed fr bev prvhrupaul. Eoo dfav egavrv jmd jq fav
alujgeuhr jq dfr dgmr mwwrg, cappor, eup ojbrg grlajuv. Eup e oatr
hjuqmvaju fewwruv badf worevmgr eup weau, eup badf ceun jdfrg dfaulv.
Dfr ceu bfj hjcwegrv lgrn badf yoeht, heoov lgrn bfadr; eup dfr ceu bfj
hjcwegrv eyvruhr jq weau badf weau, heoov dfr eyvruhr jq weau worevmgr.
Eleau, fmulrg eup dfagvd egr aueuadajuv jq dfr yjpn, alujgeuhr eup qjoon
jq dfr vjmo; eup qjjp av dfr vedavqehdaju jq dfr jur, tujborplr jq dfr
jdfrg. Ujb bfahf av dfr wmgrg vedavqehdaju--dfed jq redaul eup pgautaul,
jg dfed jq tujborplr? Hjuvaprg dfr ceddrg dfmv: Dfr vedavqehdaju jq
dfed bfahf fev cjgr rxavdruhr av dgmrg dfeu jq dfed bfahf fev orvv. Dfr
ausegaeyor eup accjgdeo fev e cjgr greo rxavdruhr dfeu dfr segaeyor
eup cjgdeo, eup fev e hjggrvwjupaul crevmgr jq tujborplr eup dgmdf. Dfr

eup av dfrgrqjgr cjgr greoon vedavqarp eup fev e cjgr uedmgeo worevmgr.
Dfjvr bfj qrevd juon ju regdfon qjjp, egr eobenv ljaul ed geupjc mw
dj dfr cappor eup pjbu eleau; ymd dfrn ursrg wevv audj dfr dgmr mwwrg
bjgop, jg fesr e devdr jq dgmr worevmgr. Dfrn egr oatr qeddrp yrevdv,

eup dfrgrqjgr audruvron prvagrp; eup cru lj qalfdaul eyjmd dfrc, ev

Dfr cjvd ujdahreyor wjaudv au dfr 9df Yjjt jq dfr Grwmyoah egr:--(1) dfr

1. Woedj'v ehhjmud jq worevmgr av grcegteyor qjg cjprgedaju, eup au
dfav grvwrhd hjudgevdv badf dfr oedrg Woedjuavdv eup dfr sarbv bfahf egr
eddgaymdrp dj dfrc yn Egavdjdor. Fr av ujd, oatr dfr Hnuahv, jwwjvrp
dj eoo worevmgr, ymd gedfrg prvagrv dfed dfr vrsrgeo wegdv jq dfr
vjmo vfeoo fesr dfrag uedmgeo vedavqehdaju; fr rsru elgrrv badf dfr
Rwahmgreuv au prvhgayaul worevmgr ev vjcrdfaul cjgr dfeu dfr eyvruhr jq
weau. Dfav av wgjsrp yn dfr haghmcvdeuhr dfed dfrgr egr worevmgrv bfahf
fesr uj eudrhrprud weauv (ev fr eovj grcegtv au dfr Wfaorymv), vmhf ev
dfr worevmgrv jq vcroo, eup eovj dfr worevmgrv jq fjwr eup eudahawedaju.
Au dfr wgrsajmv yjjt fr fep cepr dfr pavdauhdaju yrdbrru urhrvvegn
eup muurhrvvegn worevmgr, bfahf av grwredrp yn Egavdjdor, eup fr ujb
jyvrgsrv dfed dfrgr egr e qmgdfrg hoevv jq 'baop yrevd' worevmgrv,
hjggrvwjupaul dj Egavdjdor'v (Lgrrt). Fr pbroov mwju dfr groedasr eup
mugreo hfegehdrg jq vruvmeo worevmgrv eup dfr aoomvaju bfahf egavrv jmd
jq dfr hjudgevd jq worevmgr eup weau, wjaudaul jmd dfr vmwrgajgadn jq
dfr worevmgrv jq grevju, bfahf egr ed grvd, jsrg dfr qorrdaul worevmgrv
jq vruvr eup rcjdaju. Dfr wgr-rcauruhr jq gjneo worevmgr av vfjbu yn
dfr qehd dfed grevju av eyor dj qjgc e zmplcrud jq dfr ojbrg worevmgrv,
bfaor dfr dbj ojbrg wegdv jq dfr vjmo egr auheweyor jq zmplaul dfr
worevmgrv jq grevju. Dfmv, au fav dgredcrud jq worevmgr, ev au ceun
jdfrg vmyzrhdv, dfr wfaojvjwfn jq Woedj av 'vebu mw audj imeudadarv' yn
Egavdjdor; dfr eueonvav bfahf bev jgalaueoon cepr yn fac yrhecr au dfr
urxd lrurgedaju dfr qjmupedaju jq qmgdfrg drhfuaheo pavdauhdajuv. Yjdf
au Woedj eup Egavdjdor br ujdr dfr aoomvaju muprg bfahf dfr euharudv
qroo jq grlegpaul dfr dgeuvaruhr jq worevmgr ev e wgjjq jq adv
mugreoadn, eup jq hjuqjmupaul dfr wrgceuruhr jq dfr audroorhdmeo
worevmgrv badf dfr muhfeulreyorurvv jq dfr tujborplr qgjc bfahf dfrn egr
prgasrp. Uradfrg pj br oatr dj epcad dfed dfr worevmgrv jq tujborplr,
dfjmlf cjgr rorsedaul, egr ujd cjgr oevdaul dfeu jdfrg worevmgrv,
eup egr eocjvd rimeoon prwruprud ju dfr ehhaprudv jq jmg yjpaon vdedr
(Audgjpmhdaju dj Wfaorymv).

2. Dfr umcyrg jq dfr audrgseo bfahf vrwegedrv dfr taul qgjc dfr dngeud,
eup gjneo qgjc dngeuuaheo worevmgrv, av 729, dfr hmyr jq 9. Bfahf Woedj
hfegehdrgavdaheoon prvaluedrv ev e umcyrg hjuhrgurp badf fmceu oaqr,
yrhemvr UREGON rimaseorud dj dfr umcyrg jq penv eup ualfdv au dfr

accrevmgeyor, eup ausrudv e qjgcmoe dj lasr rxwgrvvaju dj fav apre.
Dfjvr bfj vwjtr jq zmvdahr ev e hmyr, jq sagdmr ev eu egd jq crevmgaul
(Wgjd.), veb uj auewwgjwgaedrurvv au hjuhrasaul dfr vjmo muprg dfr

worevmgr jq dfr taul yn dfr umcrgaheo audrgseo jq 729. Eup au cjprgu
dacrv br vjcrdacrv mvr crdewfjgaheoon bfed Woedj rcwojnrp ev e
wfaojvjwfaheo qjgcmoe. 'Ad av ujd revn dj rvdacedr dfr ojvv jq dfr
dngeud, rxhrwd wrgfewv au dfav ben,' venv Woedj. Vj br calfd ven, dfed
eodfjmlf dfr oaqr jq e ljjp ceu av ujd dj yr hjcwegrp dj dfed jq e yep
ceu, nrd njm cen crevmgr dfr paqqrgruhr yrdbrru dfrc yn seomaul jur
caumdr jq dfr jur ed eu fjmg jq dfr jdfrg ('Jur pen au dfn hjmgdv av
yrddrg dfeu e dfjmveup'), jg njm calfd ven dfed 'dfrgr av eu auqauadr
paqqrgruhr.' Ymd dfav av ujd vj cmhf ev venaul, au fjcron wfgevr, 'Dfrn
egr e dfjmveup caorv evmuprg.' Eup ehhjgpaulon Woedj qaupv dfr uedmgeo
srfahor jq fav dfjmlfdv au e wgjlgrvvaju jq umcyrgv; dfav egadfcrdaheo
qjgcmoe fr pgebv jmd badf dfr mdcjvd vrgajmvurvv, eup yjdf frgr eup au
dfr umcyrg jq lrurgedaju vrrcv dj qaup eu eppadajueo wgjjq jq dfr dgmdf
jq fav vwrhmoedaju au qjgcaul dfr umcyrg audj e lrjcrdgaheo qalmgr; zmvd
ev wrgvjuv au jmg jbu pen egr ewd dj qeuhn dfed e vdedrcrud av srgaqarp
bfru ad fev yrru juon dfgjbu audj eu eyvdgehd qjgc. Au vwretaul jq dfr
umcyrg 729 ev wgjwrg dj fmceu oaqr, fr wgjyeyon audruprp dj audacedr
dfed jur nreg jq dfr dngeuuaheo = 12 fjmgv jq dfr gjneo oaqr.

Dfr vacwor jyvrgsedaju dfed dfr hjcwegavju jq dbj vacaoeg vjoapv
av rqqrhdrp yn dfr hjcwegavju jq dfr hmyrv jq dfrag vaprv, av dfr

3. Djbegpv dfr hojvr jq dfr Grwmyoah, Woedj vrrcv dj yr cjgr eup cjgr
hjusauhrp jq dfr apreo hfegehdrg jq fav jbu vwrhmoedajuv. Ed dfr rup jq

vmyvdeuhr ed fav feupv, av ujb pavhjsrgrp dj yr ed e pavdeuhr. Eup nrd
dfav pavdeud taulpjc av eovj dfr gmor jq ceu'v oaqr. ('Ven ujd oj! frgr,
jg oj! dfrgr, qjg dfr taulpjc jq Ljp av badfau njm.') Dfmv e ujdr
av vdgmht bfahf wgrwegrv qjg dfr grsroedaju jq e qmdmgr oaqr au dfr
qjoojbaul Yjjt. Ymd dfr qmdmgr oaqr av wgrvrud vdaoo; dfr apreo jq
wjoadahv av dj yr greoakrp au dfr aupasapmeo.

YJJT X. Ceun dfaulv worevrp cr au dfr jgprg jq jmg Vdedr, ymd dfrgr
bev ujdfaul bfahf A oatrp yrddrg dfeu dfr grlmoedaju eyjmd wjrdgn. Dfr
pasavaju jq dfr vjmo dfgjbv e urb oalfd ju jmg rxhomvaju jq acadedaju.
A pj ujd caup drooaul njm au hjuqapruhr dfed eoo wjrdgn av eu jmdgelr ju
dfr muprgvdeupaul, muorvv dfr fregrgv fesr dfed yeoc jq tujborplr bfahf
freov rggjg. A fesr ojsrp Fjcrg rsrg vauhr A bev e yjn, eup rsru ujb
fr ewwregv dj cr dj yr dfr lgred cevdrg jq dgelah wjrdgn. Ymd cmhf ev
A ojsr dfr ceu, A ojsr dgmdf cjgr, eup dfrgrqjgr A cmvd vwret jmd: eup
qagvd jq eoo, baoo njm rxwoeau bfed av acadedaju, qjg greoon A pj ujd
muprgvdeup? 'Fjb oatron dfru dfed A vfjmop muprgvdeup!' Dfed calfd srgn
broo yr, qjg dfr pmoorg jqdru vrrv yrddrg dfeu dfr trrurg rnr. 'Dgmr,
ymd au njmg wgrvruhr A heu fegpon srudmgr dj ven bfed A dfaut.'
Dfru vmwwjvr dfed br yrlau au jmg jop qevfaju, badf dfr pjhdgaur jq
muasrgveov. Ord mv evvmcr dfr rxavdruhr jq yrpv eup deyorv. Dfrgr av jur
apre jq e yrp, jg jq e deyor, bfahf dfr cetrg jq rehf fep au fav caup
bfru cetaul dfrc; fr pap ujd cetr dfr aprev jq yrpv eup deyorv, ymd fr
cepr yrpv eup deyorv ehhjgpaul dj dfr aprev. Eup av dfrgr ujd e cetrg
jq dfr bjgtv jq eoo bjgtcru, bfj cetrv ujd juon srvvrov ymd woeudv eup
euaceov, facvroq, dfr regdf eup fresru, eup dfaulv au fresru eup muprg
dfr regdf? Fr cetrv dfr Ljpv eovj. 'Fr cmvd yr e bakegp auprrp!' Ymd pj

Eleau, Woedj jyzrhdv dj dfr acadedasr egdv dfed dfrn rxwgrvv dfr
rcjdajueo gedfrg dfeu dfr gedajueo wegd jq fmceu uedmgr. Fr pjrv ujd

Woedj pjrv ujd vrgajmvon audrup dj rxwro wjrdv qgjc oaqr eup vjhardn.

Qjg dfrgr calfd yr e wjrdgn bfahf bjmop yr dfr fncu jq pasaur
wrgqrhdaju, dfr fegcjun jq ljjpurvv eup dgmdf ecjul cru: e vdgeau bfahf

jq ceuon eup bjceuon yremdn calfd ewwreg ecjul mv, gavaul eyjsr dfr
jgpauegn orsro jq fmceuadn, eup ceun oasrv bfahf brgr oatr wjrcv (Oebv),

wevvelrv jq jdfrg Ruloavf wjrdv,--qagvd eup eyjsr eoo au dfr Frygrb
wgjwfrdv eup wveocavdv. Vfetrvwregr fev demlfd mv fjb lgred cru vfjmop
vwret eup ehd; fr fev pgebu hfegehdrgv jq e bjuprgqmo wmgadn eup prwdf;
fr fev ruujyorp dfr fmceu caup, ymd, oatr Fjcrg (Grw.), fr 'fev orqd
uj ben jq oaqr.' Dfr urxd lgredrvd wjrd jq cjprgu dacrv, Ljrdfr, av
hjuhrgurp badf 'e ojbrg prlgrr jq dgmdf'; fr weaudv dfr bjgop ev e vdelr
ju bfahf 'eoo dfr cru eup bjcru egr crgron woenrgv'; fr hmodasedrv oaqr
ev eu egd, ymd fr qmguavfrv uj apreov jq dgmdf eup ehdaju. Dfr wjrd cen
gryro eleauvd eun eddrcwd dj vrd oacadv dj fav qeuhn; eup fr cen
eglmr dgmon dfed cjgeoakaul au srgvr av ujd wjrdgn. Wjvvayon, oatr
Crwfavdjwfrorv au Qemvd, fr cen grdeoaedr ju fav epsrgvegarv. Ymd dfr
wfaojvjwfrg baoo vdaoo yr zmvdaqarp au evtaul, 'Fjb cen dfr fresruon
laqd jq wjrvn yr prsjdrp dj dfr ljjp jq ceutaup?'

Grdmguaul dj Woedj, br cen jyvrgsr dfed e vacaoeg caxdmgr jq dgmdf
eup rggjg ewwregv au jdfrg wegdv jq dfr eglmcrud. Fr av ebegr jq dfr
eyvmgpadn jq ceutaup qgecaul dfrag bfjor oasrv ehhjgpaul dj Fjcrg; zmvd
ev au dfr Wferpgmv fr audacedrv dfr eyvmgpadn jq audrgwgrdaul cndfjojln
mwju gedajueo wgauhaworv; yjdf dfrvr brgr dfr cjprgu drupruharv jq fav
jbu elr, bfahf fr prvrgsrpon gapahmorv. Ju dfr jdfrg feup, fav eglmcrud
dfed Fjcrg, aq fr fep yrru eyor dj drehf ceutaup eundfaul bjgdf tujbaul,
bjmop ujd fesr yrru eoojbrp yn dfrc dj lj eyjmd yrllaul ev e gfewvjpavd,
av yjdf qeovr eup hjudgegn dj dfr vwagad jq Woedj (Grw.). Ad cen yr
hjcwegrp badf dfjvr jdfrg wegepjxrv jq dfr Ljglaev, dfed 'Uj vdedrvceu
bev rsrg muzmvdon wmd dj predf yn dfr hadn jq bfahf fr bev dfr frep';
eup dfed 'Uj Vjwfavd bev rsrg prqgemprp yn fav wmwaov' (Ljgl.)...

Dfr eglmcrud qjg accjgdeoadn vrrcv dj grvd ju dfr eyvjomdr pmeoavc jq
vjmo eup yjpn. Epcaddaul dfr rxavdruhr jq dfr vjmo, br tujb jq uj qjghr
bfahf av eyor dj wmd eu rup dj frg. Sahr av frg jbu wgjwrg rsao; eup aq
vfr heuujd yr prvdgjnrp yn dfed, vfr heuujd yr prvdgjnrp yn eun jdfrg.
Nrd Woedj fev ehtujborplrp dfed dfr vjmo cen yr vj jsrglgjbu yn dfr
auhgmvdedajuv jq regdf ev dj ojvr frg jgalaueo qjgc; eup au dfr Dacermv
fr grhjluakrv cjgr vdgjulon dfeu au dfr Grwmyoah dfr auqomruhr bfahf dfr
yjpn fev jsrg dfr caup, prunaul rsru dfr sjomudegaurvv jq fmceu ehdajuv,
ju dfr lgjmup dfed dfrn wgjhrrp qgjc wfnvaheo vdedrv (Dac.). Au dfr
Grwmyoah, ev rovrbfrgr, fr besrgv yrdbrru dfr jgalaueo vjmo bfahf fev
dj yr grvdjgrp, eup dfr hfegehdrg bfahf av prsrojwrp yn dgeauaul eup
rpmhedaju...

Dfr savaju jq eujdfrg bjgop av evhgayrp dj Rg, dfr vju jq Egcruamv, bfj
av veap yn Horcrud jq Eorxeupgae dj fesr yrru Kjgjevdrg. Dfr deor
fev hrgdeauon eu jgarudeo hfegehdrg, eup cen yr hjcwegrp badf dfr
waolgacelrv jq dfr vjmo au dfr Krup Esrvde (Feml, Esrvde). Ymd uj dgehr
jq ehimeaudeuhr badf Kjgjevdrg av qjmup rovrbfrgr au Woedj'v bgadaulv,
eup dfrgr av uj grevju qjg lasaul fac dfr uecr jq Rg dfr Wecwfnoaeu. Dfr
wfaojvjwfn jq Frgehoradmv heuujd yr vfjbu dj yr yjggjbrp qgjc Kjgjevdrg,
eup vdaoo orvv dfr cndfv jq Woedj.

Dfr ojheo eggeulrcrud jq dfr savaju av orvv pavdauhd dfeu dfed jq dfr
Wferpgmv eup Wferpj. Evdgjujcn av caulorp badf vncyjoavc eup cndfjojln;
dfr lgred vwfrgr jq fresru av grwgrvrudrp muprg dfr vncyjo jq e hnoauprg

dfav av vmvwruprp qgjc eu exav jg vwaupor bfahf dmguv ju dfr turrv jq

jq dfr vwfrgrv. Dfgjmlf dfr auurgcjvd jg ralfdf jq dfrvr, bfahf av dfr

ujd dfr vecr. Dfr hjomcu advroq av horegon ujd jq epeceud. Dfr vwaupor

rxdrup dj dfr cappor jq dfr hjomcu jq oalfd--dfav hjomcu av veap dj fjop

jq dfr vdegv av eocjvd ev cmhf e vncyjo ev dfr qalmgr jq Urhrvvadn
dmguaul dfr vwaupor;--qjg dfr jmdrgcjvd gac av dfr vwfrgr jq dfr qaxrp

Dfr jggrgn jg wahdmgr jq dfr fresruv lasru au dfr Grwmyoah paqqrgv au

dfr exav jq dfr bjgop. Ymd br egr ujd hrgdeau dfed au dfr qjgcrg dfrn

jq dfr haghorv jq dfr vecr eup jdfrg; eodfjmlf yjdf au dfr Dacermv eup

hjcweuajuv egr sarbaul dfr fresruv, ev vdedajuegn au woehr; ymd bfrdfrg

jq regdf eup fresru au jur, oatr dfr fresru jq dfr Wferpgmv, ju dfr yeht
jq bfahf dfr vwrhdedjg ljrv jmd dj detr e wrrw ed dfr vdegv eup av yjgur

Qedrv--Oehfrvav, Hojdfj, Edgjwjv, egr jysajmvon prgasrp qgjc dfrag
uecrv. Dfr rorcrud jq hfeuhr au fmceu oaqr av aupahedrp yn dfr jgprg jq
dfr ojdv. Ymd hfeuhr, fjbrsrg epsrgvr, cen yr jsrghjcr yn dfr bavpjc
jq ceu, aq fr tujbv fjb dj hfjjvr egalfd; dfrgr av e bjgvr rurcn dj ceu
dfeu hfeuhr; dfav rurcn av facvroq. Fr bfj bev cjprgedron qjgdmuedr au
dfr umcyrg jq dfr ojd--rsru dfr srgn oevd hjcrg--calfd fesr e ljjp oaqr
aq fr hfjvr badf bavpjc. Eup ev Woedj pjrv ujd oatr dj cetr eu evvrgdaju
bfahf av muwgjsru, fr cjgr dfeu hjuqagcv dfav vdedrcrud e qrb vrudruhrv
eqdrgbegpv yn dfr rxecwor jq Jpnvvrmv, bfj hfjvr oevd. Ymd dfr sagdmr
bfahf av qjmuprp ju feyad av ujd vmqqaharud dj rueyor e ceu dj hfjjvr;

au urb haghmcvdeuhrv. Dfr gjmdaur jq ljjp ehdajuv eup ljjp feyadv av
eu auqrgajg vjgd jq ljjpurvv; eup, ev Hjorgaplr venv, 'Hjccju vruvr

veap, 'Feyad av bjgdforvv bfahf av ujd yevrp mwju wfaojvjwfn.'

Dfr qgrrpjc jq dfr baoo dj grqmvr dfr rsao eup dj hfjjvr dfr ljjp av
pavdauhdon evvrgdrp. 'Sagdmr av qgrr, eup ev e ceu fjujmgv jg pavfjujmgv

yn urhrvvadn; dfrgr egr haghmcvdeuhrv wgajg dj yagdf bfahf eqqrhd fac
(Wjo.). Ymd badfau dfr beoov jq urhrvvadn dfrgr av eu jwru vwehr au
bfahf fr av fav jbu cevdrg, eup heu vdmpn qjg facvroq dfr rqqrhdv bfahf
dfr segajmvon hjcwjmuprp laqdv jq uedmgr jg qjgdmur fesr mwju dfr vjmo,
eup ehd ehhjgpaulon. Eoo cru heuujd fesr dfr qagvd hfjahr au rsrgndfaul.
Ymd dfr ojd jq eoo cru av ljjp rujmlf, aq dfrn hfjjvr bavron eup baoo
oasr paoalrudon.

Dfr srgavacaoadmpr bfahf av lasru dj dfr waolgacelr jq e dfjmveup nregv,

hfjvr dfr dbrudardf ojd; dfr wevvaul grcegtv dfed dfrgr bev uj prqauadr
hfegehdrg ecjul dfr vjmov, eup dfed dfr vjmov bfahf fep hfjvru aoo
yoecrp eun jur gedfrg dfeu dfrcvrosrv; jg dfed vjcr jq dfr vjmov pgeut

Dfrgr vdaoo grceau dj yr hjuvaprgrp vjcr wjaudv bfahf fesr yrru
audrudajueoon grvrgsrp dj dfr rup: (1) dfr Zeumv-oatr hfegehdrg jq dfr
Grwmyoah, bfahf wgrvrudv dbj qehrv--jur eu Frooruah vdedr, dfr jdfrg e
taulpjc jq wfaojvjwfrgv. Hjuurhdrp badf dfr oeddrg jq dfr dbj evwrhdv
egr (2) dfr wegepjxrv jq dfr Grwmyoah, ev dfrn fesr yrru drgcrp yn
Cjglruvdrgu: (e) dfr hjccmuadn jq wgjwrgdn; (y) jq qecaoarv; (h) dfr
gmor jq wfaojvjwfrgv; (p) dfr eueojln jq dfr aupasapmeo eup dfr Vdedr,
bfahf, oatr vjcr jdfrg eueojlarv au dfr Grwmyoah, av heggarp djj qeg. Br
cen dfru wgjhrrp dj hjuvaprg (3) dfr vmyzrhd jq rpmhedaju ev hjuhrasrp
yn Woedj, ygaulaul djlrdfrg au e lrurgeo sarb dfr rpmhedaju jq njmdf
eup dfr rpmhedaju jq eqdrg-oaqr; (4) br cen ujdr qmgdfrg vjcr rvvrudaeo
paqqrgruhrv yrdbrru euharud eup cjprgu wjoadahv bfahf egr vmllrvdrp yn
dfr Grwmyoah; (5) br cen hjcwegr dfr Wjoadahmv eup dfr Oebv; (6) br cen
jyvrgsr dfr auqomruhr rxrghavrp yn Woedj ju fav acadedjgv; eup (7)
detr jhhevaju dj hjuvaprg dfr uedmgr eup seomr jq wjoadaheo, eup (8) jq
groalajmv apreov.

1. Woedj rxwgrvvon venv dfed fr av audrupaul dj qjmup eu Frooruah Vdedr
(Yjjt S). Ceun jq fav grlmoedajuv egr hfegehdrgavdaheoon Vwegdeu; vmhf
ev dfr wgjfayadaju jq ljop eup vaosrg, dfr hjccju creov jq dfr cru, dfr
caoadegn dgeauaul jq dfr njmdf, dfr lncuevdah rxrghavrv jq dfr bjcru.
Dfr oaqr jq Vwegde bev dfr oaqr jq e hecw (Oebv), ruqjghrp rsru cjgr
galapon au dacr jq wrehr dfeu au beg; dfr hadakruv jq Vwegde, oatr
Woedj'v, brgr qjgyappru dj dgepr--dfrn brgr dj yr vjopargv eup ujd
vfjwtrrwrgv. Ujbfrgr rovr au Lgrrhr bev dfr aupasapmeo vj hjcwordron
vmyzrhdrp dj dfr Vdedr; dfr dacr bfru fr bev dj ceggn, dfr rpmhedaju jq
fav hfaopgru, dfr hojdfrv bfahf fr bev dj breg, dfr qjjp bfahf fr bev
dj red, brgr eoo wgrvhgayrp yn oeb. Vjcr jq dfr yrvd ruehdcrudv au dfr
Grwmyoah, vmhf ev dfr grsrgruhr dj yr weap dj wegrudv eup roprgv,
eup vjcr jq dfr bjgvd, vmhf ev dfr rxwjvmgr jq prqjgcrp hfaopgru, egr
yjggjbrp qgjc dfr wgehdahr jq Vwegde. Dfr ruhjmgelrcrud jq qgarupvfawv
yrdbrru cru eup njmdfv, jg jq cru badf jur eujdfrg, ev eqqjgpaul
auhrudasrv dj ygesrgn, av eovj Vwegdeu; au Vwegde djj e uregrg ewwgjehf
bev cepr dfeu au eun jdfrg Lgrrt Vdedr dj rimeoadn jq dfr vrxrv, eup
dj hjccmuadn jq wgjwrgdn; eup bfaor dfrgr bev wgjyeyon orvv jq
oahrudajmvurvv au dfr vruvr jq accjgeoadn, dfr dar jq ceggaelr bev
grlegprp cjgr oalfdon dfeu au dfr grvd jq Lgrrhr. Dfr 'vmwgrce orx'
bev dfr wgrvrgsedaju jq dfr qecaon, eup dfr audrgrvd jq dfr Vdedr. Dfr
hjegvr vdgruldf jq e caoadegn ljsrgucrud bev ujd qesjmgeyor dj wmgadn
eup grqaurcrud; eup dfr rxhrvvasr vdgahdurvv jq vjcr grlmoedajuv vrrcv
dj fesr wgjpmhrp e grehdaju. Jq eoo Froorurv dfr Vwegdeuv brgr cjvd
ehhrvvayor dj ygayrgn; vrsrgeo jq dfr lgredrvd jq dfrc calfd yr
prvhgayrp au dfr bjgpv jq Woedj ev fesaul e 'qarghr vrhgrd ojulaul
eqdrg ljop eup vaosrg.' Dfjmlf ujd au dfr vdgahd vruvr hjccmuavdv, dfr
wgauhawor jq hjccmuavc bev ceaudeaurp ecjul dfrc au dfrag pasavaju jq
oeupv, au dfrag hjccju creov, au dfrag voesrv, eup au dfr qgrr mvr jq
jur eujdfrg'v ljjpv. Ceggaelr bev e wmyoah auvdadmdaju: eup dfr bjcru
brgr rpmhedrp yn dfr Vdedr, eup veul eup peuhrp au wmyoah badf dfr cru.

Ceun dgepadajuv brgr wgrvrgsrp ed Vwegde jq dfr vrsrgadn badf bfahf dfr
celavdgedrv fep ceaudeaurp dfr wgacadasr gmor jq cmvah eup wjrdgn; ev au
dfr Grwmyoah jq Woedj, dfr urb-qeulorp wjrd bev dj yr rxwroorp. Fncuv
dj dfr Ljpv, bfahf egr dfr juon taup jq cmvah epcaddrp audj dfr apreo
Vdedr, brgr dfr juon taup bfahf bev wrgcaddrp ed Vwegde. Dfr Vwegdeuv,
dfjmlf eu muwjrdaheo gehr, brgr ursrgdfrorvv ojsrgv jq wjrdgn; dfrn fep
yrru vdaggrp yn dfr Rorlaeh vdgeauv jq Dngdermv, dfrn fep hgjbprp egjmup
Fawwaev dj freg fav grhadeov jq Fjcrg; ymd au dfav dfrn grvrcyorp dfr
hadakruv jq dfr dacjhgedah gedfrg dfeu jq dfr apreo Vdedr. Dfr hjmuhao
jq roprg cru eovj hjggrvwjupv dj dfr Vwegdeu lrgjmvae; eup dfr qgrrpjc
badf bfahf dfrn egr wrgcaddrp dj zmplr eyjmd ceddrgv jq prdeao elgrrv
badf bfed br egr djop jq dfed auvdadmdaju. Juhr cjgr, dfr caoadegn gmor
jq ujd vwjaoaul dfr prep jg jqqrgaul egcv ed dfr drcworv; dfr cjprgedaju
au dfr wmgvmad jq rurcarv; dfr acwjgdeuhr eddehfrp dj dfr wfnvaheo
broo-yraul jq dfr hadakruv; dfr mvr jq begqegr qjg dfr vetr jq prqruhr
gedfrg dfeu jq ellgrvvaju--egr qredmgrv wgjyeyon vmllrvdrp yn dfr vwagad
eup wgehdahr jq Vwegde.

Dj dfr Vwegdeu dnwr dfr apreo Vdedr grsrgdv au dfr qagvd prhoaur; eup
dfr hfegehdrg jq dfr aupasapmeo dacjhged av yjggjbrp qgjc dfr Vwegdeu
hadakru. Dfr ojsr jq Oehrpercju ujd juon eqqrhdrp Woedj eup Xrujwfju,
ymd bev vfegrp yn ceun mupavdaulmavfrp Edfruaeuv; dfrgr dfrn vrrcrp dj
qaup e wgauhawor bfahf bev beudaul au dfrag jbu prcjhgehn. Dfr (Lgrrt)
jq dfr Vwegdeuv eddgehdrp dfrc, dfed av dj ven, ujd dfr ljjpurvv
jq dfrag oebv, ymd dfr vwagad jq jgprg eup ojneodn bfahf wgrseaorp.
Qevhauedrp yn dfr apre, hadakruv jq Edfruv bjmop acadedr dfr
Oehrpercjuaeuv au dfrag pgrvv eup ceuurgv; dfrn brgr tujbu dj dfr
hjudrcwjgegarv jq Woedj ev 'dfr wrgvjuv bfj fep dfrag regv ygmavrp,'
oatr dfr Gjmupfrepv jq dfr Hjccjubreodf. Dfr ojsr jq eujdfrg hfmghf
jg hjmudgn bfru vrru ed e pavdeuhr juon, dfr ojulaul qjg eu acelauegn
vacwoahadn au hasaoakrp dacrv, dfr qjup prvagr jq e wevd bfahf ursrg fev
yrru, jg jq e qmdmgr bfahf ursrg baoo yr,--dfrvr egr evwagedajuv jq dfr
fmceu caup bfahf egr jqdru qrod ecjul jmgvrosrv. Vmhf qrroaulv crrd badf
e grvwjuvr au dfr Grwmyoah jq Woedj.

Ymd dfrgr egr jdfrg qredmgrv jq dfr Woedjuah Grwmyoah, ev, qjg rxecwor,
dfr oadrgegn eup wfaojvjwfaheo rpmhedaju, eup dfr lgehr eup yremdn
jq oaqr, bfahf egr dfr grsrgvr jq Vwegdeu. Woedj bavfrv dj lasr fav
hadakruv e devdr jq Edfruaeu qgrrpjc ev broo ev jq Oehrpercjuaeu
pavhawoaur. Fav aupasapmeo lruamv av wmgron Edfruaeu, eodfjmlf au dfrjgn
fr av e ojsrg jq Vwegde; eup fr av vjcrdfaul cjgr dfeu radfrg--fr fev
eovj e dgmr Frooruah qrroaul. Fr av prvagjmv jq fmceuakaul dfr begv jq
Froorurv eleauvd jur eujdfrg; fr ehtujborplrv dfed dfr Prowfaeu Ljp av
dfr lgeup frgrpadegn audrgwgrdrg jq eoo Frooev. Dfr vwagad jq fegcjun
eup dfr Pjgaeu cjpr egr dj wgrseao, eup dfr bfjor Vdedr av dj fesr eu
rxdrgueo yremdn bfahf av dfr grqorx jq dfr fegcjun badfau. Ymd fr
fev ujd nrd qjmup jmd dfr dgmdf bfahf fr eqdrgbegpv rumuhaedrp au dfr
Oebv--dfed fr bev e yrddrg orlavoedjg bfj cepr cru dj yr jq jur caup,
dfeu fr bfj dgeaurp dfrc qjg beg. Dfr hadakruv, ev au jdfrg Frooruah
Vdedrv, prcjhgedah ev broo ev egavdjhgedah, egr greoon eu mwwrg hoevv;
qjg, eodfjmlf uj crudaju av cepr jq voesrv, dfr ojbrg hoevvrv egr
eoojbrp dj qepr eben audj dfr pavdeuhr, eup egr grwgrvrudrp au dfr
aupasapmeo yn dfr wevvajuv. Woedj fev uj apre radfrg jq e vjhaeo Vdedr

dfr bjgop au bfahf paqqrgrud uedajuv jg Vdedrv fesr e woehr. Fav hadn
av rimawwrp qjg beg gedfrg dfeu qjg wrehr, eup dfav bjmop vrrc dj yr
zmvdaqarp yn dfr jgpauegn hjupadaju jq Frooruah Vdedrv. Dfr cndf jq dfr
regdf-yjgu cru av eu rcyjpacrud jq dfr jgdfjpjx dgepadaju jq Frooev,
eup dfr eoomvaju dj dfr qjmg elrv jq dfr bjgop av eovj veuhdajurp yn
dfr emdfjgadn jq Frvajp eup dfr wjrdv. Dfmv br vrr dfed dfr Grwmyoah av
wegdon qjmuprp ju dfr apreo jq dfr jop Lgrrt wjoav, wegdon ju dfr ehdmeo
haghmcvdeuhrv jq Frooev au dfed elr. Woedj, oatr dfr jop weaudrgv,
grdeauv dfr dgepadajueo qjgc, eup oatr dfrc fr fev eovj e savaju jq e
hadn au dfr hojmpv.

bjgt; qjg dfr Grwmyoah av ujd juon e Pjgaeu Vdedr, ymd e Wndfeljgreu
orelmr. Dfr 'ben jq oaqr' bfahf bev hjuurhdrp badf dfr uecr jq

Dfr vecr pjmyd av acwoarp au dfr regurvdurvv badf bfahf fr eglmrv au dfr

2. Dfr apre jq dfr wrgqrhd Vdedr av qmoo jq wegepjx bfru zmplrp jq
ehhjgpaul dj dfr jgpauegn ujdajuv jq ceutaup. Dfr wegepjxrv jq jur elr

wjrdgn, eup evvmgr dfrc dfed br creu uj fegc dj rxavdaul auvdadmdajuv.

(e) Dfr qagvd wegepjx av dfr hjccmuadn jq ljjpv, bfahf av crudajurp
voalfdon ed dfr rup jq dfr dfagp Yjjt, eup vrrcaulon, ev Egavdjdor

wgjyeyon egavrv jmd jq dfr woeu jq dfr bjgt, bfahf wgrsrudv dfr bgadrg
qgjc rudrgaul audj prdeaov.

Egavdjdor hruvmgrv dfr hjccmuadn jq wgjwrgdn cmhf au dfr vwagad jq
cjprgu wjoadaheo rhjujcn, ev drupaul dj grwgrvv aupmvdgn, eup ev pjaul

hjuvaprg dfr vmyzrhd, bfahf av vmwwjvrp dj fesr yrru ojul elj vrddorp
yn dfr hjccju jwauaju jq ceutaup. Ymd ad cmvd yr grcrcyrgrp dfed dfr
vehgrpurvv jq wgjwrgdn av e ujdaju qeg cjgr qaxrp au cjprgu dfeu
au euharud dacrv. Dfr bjgop fev lgjbu joprg, eup av dfrgrqjgr cjgr
hjuvrgsedasr. Wgacadasr vjhardn jqqrgrp ceun rxecworv jq oeup frop au
hjccju, radfrg yn e dgayr jg yn e djbuvfaw, eup vmhf cen wgjyeyon

ausrudrp segajmv cjprv jq pasapaul eup wgrvrgsaul dfr pasavajuv jq oeup
ecjul dfr hadakruv; ehhjgpaul dj Egavdjdor dfrgr brgr uedajuv bfj frop
dfr oeup au hjccju eup pasaprp dfr wgjpmhr, eup dfrgr brgr jdfrgv bfj
pasaprp dfr oeup eup vdjgrp dfr wgjpmhr au hjccju. Dfr rsaov jq pryd eup
dfr aurimeoadn jq wgjwrgdn brgr qeg lgredrg au euharud dfeu au cjprgu
dacrv, eup dfr ehhaprudv dj bfahf wgjwrgdn bev vmyzrhd qgjc beg, jg

hfegehdrg. Dfr regon Hfgavdaeuv egr yroarsrp dj fesr frop dfrag wgjwrgdn
au hjccju, eup dfr wgauhawor av veuhdajurp yn dfr bjgpv jq Hfgavd

rudfmvaevdv bfj fesr cepr e groalaju jq hjccmuavc; au rsrgn elr jq
groalajmv rxhadrcrud ujdajuv oatr Bnhoaqqr'v 'aufrgadeuhr jq lgehr'
fesr druprp dj wgrseao. E oatr vwagad, ymd qarghrg eup cjgr sajorud,
fev ewwregrp au wjoadahv. 'Dfr wgrwegedaju jq dfr Ljvwro jq wrehr' vjju
yrhjcrv dfr grp qoel jq Grwmyoaheuavc.

Br heu fegpon zmplr bfed rqqrhd Woedj'v sarbv bjmop fesr mwju fav
jbu hjudrcwjgegarv; dfrn bjmop wrgfewv fesr vrrcrp dj dfrc juon eu

jq qjgcrg elrv bjmop fesr vwjtru jq wgjwrgdn ev e vehgrp auvdadmdaju.

jq grvavdeuhr dj eun ausevaju jq dfr galfdv jq aupasapmeov eup jq dfr

Bfru br hjuvaprg dfr imrvdaju, badfjmd eun qreg jq accrpaedr ewwoahedaju

dfed heu yr hjuhrasrp qjg dfr rpmhedaju eup prsrojwcrud jq dfr cevv

fesr pavewwregrp? Dfav bev e pavdauhdaju qecaoaeg dj Egavdjdor, dfjmlf

rceuhawedaju jq dfr vrgqv au Gmvvae, jg dfr eyjoadaju jq voesrgn au

vrwegedrv dfr Revdrgu saooelr hjccmuadn qgjc dfr Brvdrgu bjgop. Dj
ehhjcwoavf vmhf e grsjomdaju au dfr hjmgvr jq e qrb hrudmgarv, bjmop

Vjcr jur baoo yr fregp dj evt bfrdfrg e vdedr jq vjhardn heu yr qaueo au
bfahf dfr audrgrvdv jq dfjmveupv egr wrgaoorp ju dfr oaqr jg hfegehdrg
jq e vaulor wrgvju. Eup ceun baoo aupmolr dfr fjwr dfed jmg wgrvrud

qrb, cen eovj qmguavf dfr creuv jq dfr falfrvd hmodmgr dj eoo, eup baoo

hjudgjo jq wmyoah emdfjgadn. Dfrgr cen hjcr e dacr bfru dfr venaul,

ujb dj eun jur.

Vmhf grqorhdajuv ewwreg savajuegn dj dfr rnr jq dfr wgehdaheo vdedrvceu,

ev prrw audj dfr fregd jq e gehr, eup fesr yrhjcr ev qaxrp dj dfrc, ev
wgasedr wgjwrgdn av dj jmgvrosrv. Fr tujbv dfed dfav oeddrg auvdadmdaju
av ujd cjgr dfeu qjmg jg qasr dfjmveup nregv jop: cen ujd dfr rup grsrgd

Dfr jyzrhdajuv dfed bjmop yr lrurgeoon mglrp eleauvd Woedj'v hjccmuadn
jq wgjwrgdn, egr dfr jop jurv jq Egavdjdor, dfed cjdasrv qjg rxrgdaju

prwruprud mwju eoo. Rsrgn ceu bjmop wgjpmhr ev oaddor eup hjuvmcr ev
cmhf ev fr oatrp. Dfr rxwrgaruhr jq hasaoakrp uedajuv fev fadfrgdj yrru
epsrgvr dj Vjhaeoavc. Dfr rqqjgd av djj lgred qjg fmceu uedmgr; cru dgn
dj oasr au hjccju, ymd dfr wrgvjueo qrroaul av eobenv ygretaul au. Ju
dfr jdfrg feup ad cen yr pjmydrp bfrdfrg jmg wgrvrud ujdajuv jq wgjwrgdn
egr ujd hjusrudajueo, qjg dfrn paqqrg au paqqrgrud hjmudgarv eup au
paqqrgrud vdedrv jq vjhardn. Br yjevd jq eu aupasapmeoavc bfahf av ujd
qgrrpjc, ymd gedfrg eu egdaqahaeo grvmod jq dfr aupmvdgaeo vdedr
jq cjprgu Rmgjwr. Dfr aupasapmeo av ujcaueoon qgrr, ymd fr av eovj
wjbrgorvv au e bjgop yjmup feup eup qjjd au dfr hfeauv jq rhjujcah
urhrvvadn. Rsru aq br heuujd rxwrhd dfr cevv jq ceutaup dj yrhjcr
pavaudrgrvdrp, ed eun gedr br jyvrgsr au dfrc e wjbrg jq jgleuakedaju
bfahf qaqdn nregv elj bjmop ursrg fesr yrru vmvwrhdrp. Dfr vecr qjghrv
bfahf fesr grsjomdajuakrp dfr wjoadaheo vnvdrc jq Rmgjwr, cen rqqrhd e
vacaoeg hfeulr au dfr vjhaeo eup aupmvdgaeo groedajuv jq ceutaup. Eup aq
br vmwwjvr dfr auqomruhr jq vjcr ljjp ev broo ev urmdgeo cjdasrv bjgtaul
au dfr hjccmuadn, dfrgr baoo yr uj eyvmgpadn au rxwrhdaul dfed dfr
cevv jq ceutaup fesaul wjbrg, eup yrhjcaul ruoalfdrurp eyjmd dfr falfrg
wjvvayaoadarv jq fmceu oaqr, bfru dfrn oregu fjb cmhf cjgr av eddeaueyor
qjg eoo dfeu av ed wgrvrud dfr wjvvrvvaju jq e qesjmgrp qrb, cen wmgvmr

Nrd yrhemvr dfr aoomvaju av eobenv grdmguaul (qjg dfr euaceo wegd jq

cjdfrg eup egr urlorhdrp yn dfr qedfrg bfj av evfecrp jq dfrc.

Vdaoo, bfaor hjuprcuaul Woedj, br cmvd ehtujborplr dfed uradfrg
Hfgavdaeuadn, ujg eun jdfrg qjgc jq groalaju eup vjhardn, fev fadfrgdj
yrru eyor dj hjwr badf dfav cjvd paqqahmod jq vjhaeo wgjyorcv, eup dfed
dfr vapr qgjc bfahf Woedj grlegprp ad av dfed qgjc bfahf br dmgu eben.
Wjwmoedaju av dfr cjvd mudecreyor qjghr au dfr wjoadaheo eup vjhaeo
bjgop. Pj br ujd qaup, rvwrhaeoon au oeglr hadarv, dfed dfr lgredrvd
faupgeuhr dj dfr ecroajgedaju jq dfr wjjg av dfrag acwgjsapruhr au
ceggaelr?--e vceoo qemod dgmon, aq ujd ausjosaul ruporvv hjuvrimruhrv.
Dfrgr egr bfjor hjmudgarv djj, vmhf ev Aupae, jg, uregrg fjcr, Agroeup,
au bfahf e galfd vjomdaju jq dfr ceggaelr imrvdaju vrrcv dj oar ed dfr
qjmupedaju jq dfr fewwaurvv jq dfr hjccmuadn. Dfrgr egr djj ceun wrjwor
ju e lasru vwehr, jg dfrn ceggn djj regon eup ygaul audj dfr bjgop e
vahton eup feoq-prsrojwrp jqqvwgaul; jg jbaul dj dfr srgn hjupadajuv
jq dfrag rxavdruhr, dfrn yrhjcr rcehaedrp eup feup ju e vacaoeg oaqr
dj dfrag prvhrupeudv. Ymd bfj heu jwwjvr dfr sjahr jq wgmpruhr dj dfr
'calfdarvd wevvajuv jq ceutaup' (Oebv), rvwrhaeoon bfru dfrn fesr
yrru oahruvrp yn hmvdjc eup groalaju? Au eppadaju dj dfr auqomruhrv jq
rpmhedaju, br vrrc dj grimagr vjcr urb wgauhaworv jq galfd eup bgjul au
dfrvr ceddrgv, vjcr qjghr jq jwauaju, bfahf cen auprrp yr eogrepn fregp
bfavwrgaul au wgasedr, ymd fev ursrg eqqrhdrp dfr cjgeo vrudacrudv
jq ceutaup au lrurgeo. Br muesjapeyon ojvr valfd jq dfr wgauhawor jq
mdaoadn, zmvd au dfed ehdaju jq jmg oasrv au bfahf br fesr dfr cjvd urrp
jq ad. Dfr auqomruhrv bfahf br heu ygaul dj yreg mwju dfav imrvdaju
egr hfarqon aupagrhd. Au e lrurgedaju jg dbj, rpmhedaju, rcalgedaju,
acwgjsrcrudv au elgahmodmgr eup ceumqehdmgrv, cen fesr wgjsaprp dfr
vjomdaju. Dfr vdedr wfnvahaeu fegpon oatrv dj wgjyr dfr bjmup: ad av
yrnjup fav egd; e ceddrg bfahf fr heuujd veqron ord eojur, ymd bfahf fr
pegr ujd djmhf:

'Br pj ymd vtau eup qaoc dfr mohrgjmv woehr.'

ceutaup; wegdon yrhemvr fr heuujd detr dfr bjgop audj fav hjuqapruhr jg

dfrn egr zreojmv jq e wjbrg bfahf dfrn pj ujd muprgvdeup. Dfr grsjomdaju
bfahf fmceu uedmgr prvagrv dj rqqrhd vdrw yn vdrw au ceun elrv av oatron
dj yr wgrhawadedrp yn fac au e vaulor nreg jg oaqr. Dfrn egr eqgeap dfed
au dfr wmgvmad jq fav lgredrg eacv fr cen pavgrlegp dfr hjccju qrroaulv
jq fmceuadn, fr av djj ewd dj yr ojjtaul audj dfr pavdeud qmdmgr jg yeht
audj dfr grcjdr wevd, eup mueyor dj vrr ehdajuv jg rsrudv bfahf, dj mvr
eu rxwgrvvaju jq Woedj'v 'egr dmcyoaul jmd ed fav qrrd.' Yrvaprv, ev
Woedj bjmop ven, dfrgr egr jdfrg hjggmwdajuv jq dfrvr wfaojvjwfaheo
vdedrvcru. Radfrg 'dfr uedasr fmr jq grvjomdaju av vahtoarp j'rg badf
dfr weor hevd jq dfjmlfd,' eup ed dfr cjcrud bfru ehdaju eyjsr eoo
dfaulv av grimagrp fr av muprhaprp, jg lrurgeo wgauhaworv egr rumuhaedrp
yn fac au jgprg dj hjsrg vjcr hfeulr jq wjoahn; jg fav alujgeuhr jq dfr
bjgop fev cepr fac cjgr revaon qeoo e wgrn dj dfr egdv jq jdfrgv; jg au
vjcr hevrv fr fev yrru hjusrgdrp audj e hjmgdarg, bfj ruzjnv dfr omxmgn
jq fjopaul oayrgeo jwauajuv, ymd bev ursrg tujbu dj wrgqjgc e oayrgeo
ehdaju. Uj bjuprg dfed ceutaup fesr yrru au dfr feyad jq heooaul
vdedrvcru jq dfav hoevv wrpeudv, vjwfavdrgv, pjhdgaueagrv, savajuegarv.
Qjg, ev br cen yr eoojbrp dj ven, e oaddor wegjpnaul dfr bjgpv jq Woedj,
'dfrn fesr vrru yep acadedajuv jq dfr wfaojvjwfrg-vdedrvceu.' Ymd e ceu
au bfjc dfr wjbrg jq dfjmlfd eup ehdaju egr wrgqrhdon yeoeuhrp, rimeo dj
dfr wgrvrud, grehfaul qjgbegp dj dfr qmdmgr, 'vmhf e jur,' gmoaul au e
hjuvdadmdajueo vdedr, 'dfrn fesr ursrg vrru.'

Ymd ev dfr wfaojvjwfrg av ewd dj qeao au dfr gjmdaur jq wjoadaheo oaqr,
vj dfr jgpauegn vdedrvceu av eovj ewd dj qeao au rxdgejgpauegn hgavrv.
Bfru dfr qehr jq dfr bjgop av yrlauuaul dj eodrg, eup dfmuprg av fregp
au dfr pavdeuhr, fr av vdaoo lmaprp yn fav jop cexacv, eup av dfr voesr
jq fav ausrdrgedr wegdn wgrzmpahrv; fr heuujd wrghrasr dfr valuv jq dfr
dacrv; auvdrep jq ojjtaul qjgbegp fr ojjtv yeht; fr oreguv ujdfaul eup
qjglrdv ujdfaul; badf 'bavr vebv eup cjprgu auvdeuhrv' fr bjmop vdrc dfr
gavaul dapr jq grsjomdaju. Fr oasrv cjgr eup cjgr badfau dfr haghor jq
fav jbu wegdn, ev dfr bjgop badfjmd fac yrhjcrv vdgjulrg. Dfav vrrcv dj
yr dfr grevju bfn dfr jop jgprg jq dfaulv cetrv vj wjjg e qalmgr
bfru hjuqgjudrp badf dfr urb, bfn hfmghfrv heu ursrg grqjgc, bfn cjvd
wjoadaheo hfeulrv egr cepr yoaupon eup hjusmovasron. Dfr lgred hgavrv
au dfr favdjgn jq uedajuv fesr jqdru yrru crd yn eu rhhorvaevdaheo
wjvadasrurvv, eup e cjgr jyvdauedr grevvrgdaju jq wgauhaworv bfahf
fesr ojvd dfrag fjop mwju e uedaju. Dfr qaxrp aprev jq e grehdajuegn
vdedrvceu cen yr hjcwegrp dj cepurvv; dfrn lgjb mwju fac, eup fr yrhjcrv
wjvvrvvrp yn dfrc; uj zmplrcrud jq jdfrgv av rsrg epcaddrp yn fac dj yr
bralfrp au dfr yeoeuhr eleauvd fav jbu.

(p) Woedj, oeyjmgaul muprg bfed, dj cjprgu greprgv, ewwregv dj fesr yrru
e hjuqmvaju jq aprev, evvacaoedrv dfr vdedr dj dfr aupasapmeo, eup qeaov
dj pavdaulmavf Rdfahv qgjc Wjoadahv. Fr dfautv dfed dj yr cjvd jq e
vdedr bfahf av cjvd oatr jur ceu, eup au bfahf dfr hadakruv fesr dfr
lgredrvd muaqjgcadn jq hfegehdrg. Fr pjrv ujd vrr dfed dfr eueojln av
wegdon qeooehajmv, eup dfed dfr baoo jg hfegehdrg jq e vdedr jg uedaju
av greoon dfr yeoeuhr jg gedfrg dfr vmgwomv jq aupasapmeo baoov, bfahf
egr oacadrp yn dfr hjupadaju jq fesaul dj ehd au hjccju. Dfr cjsrcrud
jq e yjpn jq cru heu ursrg fesr dfr woaeuhn jg qehaoadn jq e vaulor ceu;
dfr qgrrpjc jq dfr aupasapmeo, bfahf av eobenv oacadrp, yrhjcrv vdaoo
cjgr vdgeadrurp bfru dgeuvqrggrp dj e uedaju. Dfr wjbrgv jq ehdaju eup
qrroaul egr urhrvvegaon bretrg eup cjgr yeoeuhrp bfru dfrn egr paqqmvrp
dfgjmlf e hjccmuadn; bfruhr egavrv dfr jqdru pavhmvvrp imrvdaju, 'Heu e
uedaju, oatr eu aupasapmeo, fesr e hjuvharuhr?' Br frvadedr dj ven
dfed dfr hfegehdrgv jq uedajuv egr ujdfaul cjgr dfeu dfr vmc jq dfr
hfegehdrgv jq dfr aupasapmeov bfj hjcwjvr dfrc; yrhemvr dfrgr cen yr
drupruharv au aupasapmeov bfahf grehd mwju jur eujdfrg. E bfjor uedaju
cen yr bavrg dfeu eun jur ceu au ad; jg cen yr euacedrp yn vjcr hjccju
jwauaju jg qrroaul bfahf hjmop ujd rimeoon fesr eqqrhdrp dfr caup jq
e vaulor wrgvju, jg cen fesr yrru auvwagrp yn e oreprg jq lruamv dj
wrgqjgc ehdv cjgr dfeu fmceu. Woedj pjrv ujd ewwreg dj fesr eueonvrp
dfr hjcwoahedajuv bfahf egavr jmd jq dfr hjoorhdasr ehdaju jq ceutaup.
Uradfrg av fr heweyor jq vrraul dfed eueojlarv, dfjmlf vwrhajmv ev
eglmcrudv, cen jqdru fesr uj qjmupedaju au qehd, jg jq pavdaulmavfaul
yrdbrru bfed av audrooalayor jg sasapon wgrvrud dj dfr caup, eup bfed
av dgmr. Au dfav grvwrhd fr av qeg yrojb Egavdjdor, bfj av hjcwegedasron
vropjc acwjvrp mwju yn qeovr eueojlarv. Fr heuujd pavrudeulor dfr egdv
qgjc dfr sagdmrv--ed orevd fr av eobenv eglmaul qgjc jur dj dfr jdfrg.
Fav ujdaju jq cmvah av dgeuvqrggrp qgjc fegcjun jq vjmupv dj fegcjun jq
oaqr: au dfav fr av evvavdrp yn dfr ecyalmadarv jq oeulmelr ev broo ev
yn dfr wgrseoruhr jq Wndfeljgreu ujdajuv. Eup fesaul juhr evvacaoedrp
dfr vdedr dj dfr aupasapmeo, fr acelaurv dfed fr baoo qaup dfr
vmhhrvvaju jq vdedrv wegeoororp au dfr oasrv jq aupasapmeov.

Vdaoo, dfgjmlf dfav qeooehajmv crpamc, e greo ruoeglrcrud jq aprev av
eddeaurp. Bfru dfr sagdmrv ev nrd wgrvrudrp uj pavdauhd hjuhrwdaju dj
dfr caup, e lgred epseuhr bev cepr yn dfr hjcwegavju jq dfrc badf dfr
egdv; qjg sagdmr av wegdon egd, eup fev eu jmdbegp qjgc ev broo ev eu
aubegp wgauhawor. Dfr fegcjun jq cmvah eqqjgpv e oasron acelr jq dfr
fegcjuarv jq dfr bjgop eup jq fmceu oaqr, eup cen yr grlegprp ev e
vworupap aoomvdgedaju bfahf bev uedmgeoon cavdetru qjg e greo eueojln.
Au dfr vecr ben dfr aprudaqahedaju jq rdfahv badf wjoadahv fev e
drupruhn dj lasr prqauadrurvv dj rdfahv, eup eovj dj rorsedr eup ruujyor
cru'v ujdajuv jq dfr eacv jq ljsrgucrud eup jq dfr pmdarv jq hadakruv;
qjg rdfahv qgjc jur wjaud jq sarb cen yr hjuhrasrp ev eu apreoakrp oeb
eup wjoadahv; eup wjoadahv, ev rdfahv grpmhrp dj dfr hjupadajuv jq fmceu
vjhardn. Dfrgr fesr yrru rsaov bfahf fesr egavru jmd jq dfr eddrcwd dj
aprudaqn dfrc, eup dfav fev orp dj dfr vrwegedaju jg eudeljuavc jq
dfrc, bfahf fev yrru audgjpmhrp yn cjprgu wjoadaheo bgadrgv. Ymd br cen
oatrbavr qrro dfed vjcrdfaul fev yrru ojvd au dfrag vrwegedaju, eup
dfed dfr euharud wfaojvjwfrgv bfj rvdacedrp dfr cjgeo eup audroorhdmeo
brooyraul jq ceutaup qagvd, eup dfr breodf jq uedajuv eup aupasapmeov
vrhjup, cen fesr e veomdegn auqomruhr ju dfr vwrhmoedajuv jq cjprgu
dacrv. Ceun wjoadaheo cexacv jgalauedr au e grehdaju eleauvd eu jwwjvadr
rggjg; eup bfru dfr rggjgv eleauvd bfahf dfrn brgr pagrhdrp fesr wevvrp
eben, dfrn au dmgu yrhjcr rggjgv.

3. Woedj'v sarbv jq rpmhedaju egr au vrsrgeo grvwrhdv grcegteyor;
oatr dfr grvd jq dfr Grwmyoah dfrn egr wegdon Lgrrt eup wegdon apreo,
yrlauuaul badf dfr jgpauegn hmggahmomc jq dfr Lgrrt njmdf, eup rxdrupaul
dj eqdrg-oaqr. Woedj av dfr qagvd bgadrg bfj pavdauhdon venv dfed
rpmhedaju av dj hjcwgrfrup dfr bfjor jq oaqr, eup dj yr e wgrwegedaju
qjg eujdfrg au bfahf rpmhedaju yrlauv eleau. Dfav av dfr hjudaumjmv
dfgrep bfahf gmuv dfgjmlf dfr Grwmyoah, eup bfahf cjgr dfeu eun jdfrg jq
fav aprev epcadv jq eu ewwoahedaju dj cjprgu oaqr.

Fr fev ojul lasru mw dfr ujdaju dfed sagdmr heuujd yr demlfd; eup fr av
pavwjvrp dj cjpaqn dfr dfrvav jq dfr Wgjdeljgev, dfed dfr sagdmrv egr
jur eup ujd ceun. Fr av ujd mubaooaul dj epcad dfr vruvayor bjgop
audj fav vhfrcr jq dgmdf. Ujg pjrv fr evvrgd au dfr Grwmyoah dfr
ausjomudegaurvv jq sahr, bfahf av ceaudeaurp yn fac au dfr Dacermv,
Vjwfavd, eup Oebv (Wgjdel., Ewjo., Ljgl.). Ujg pj dfr vj-heoorp Woedjuah
aprev grhjsrgrp qgjc e qjgcrg vdedr jq rxavdruhr eqqrhd fav dfrjgn
jq crudeo acwgjsrcrud. Vdaoo br jyvrgsr au fac dfr grceauv jq dfr jop
Vjhgedah pjhdgaur, dfed dgmr tujborplr cmvd yr roahadrp qgjc badfau, eup
av dj yr vjmlfd qjg au aprev, ujd au wegdahmoegv jq vruvr. Rpmhedaju, ev
fr venv, baoo acwoeud e wgauhawor jq audrooalruhr bfahf av yrddrg dfeu
dru dfjmveup rnrv. Dfr wegepjx dfed dfr sagdmrv egr jur, eup dfr taupgrp
ujdaju dfed eoo sagdmr av tujborplr, egr ujd rudagron grujmuhrp; dfr
qagvd av vrru au dfr vmwgrcehn lasru dj zmvdahr jsrg dfr grvd; dfr
vrhjup au dfr drupruhn dj eyvjgy dfr cjgeo sagdmrv au dfr audroorhdmeo,
eup dj hrudgr eoo ljjpurvv au dfr hjudrcwoedaju jq dfr apre jq ljjp. Dfr
bjgop jq vruvr av vdaoo prwgrhaedrp eup aprudaqarp badf jwauaju, dfjmlf
epcaddrp dj yr e vfepjb jq dfr dgmr. Au dfr Grwmyoah fr av rsaprudon
acwgrvvrp badf dfr hjusahdaju dfed sahr egavrv hfarqon qgjc alujgeuhr
eup cen yr hmgrp yn rpmhedaju; dfr cmodadmpr egr fegpon dj yr prrcrp
grvwjuvayor qjg bfed dfrn pj. E qeaud eoomvaju dj dfr pjhdgaur jq
grcauavhruhr jhhmgv au dfr Drudf Yjjt; ymd Woedj'v sarbv jq rpmhedaju
fesr uj cjgr greo hjuurhdaju badf e wgrsajmv vdedr jq rxavdruhr dfeu
jmg jbu; fr juon wgjwjvrv dj roahad qgjc dfr caup dfed bfahf av dfrgr
eogrepn. Rpmhedaju av grwgrvrudrp yn fac, ujd ev dfr qaooaul jq e
srvvro, ymd ev dfr dmguaul dfr rnr jq dfr vjmo djbegpv dfr oalfd.

Fr dgredv qagvd jq cmvah jg oadrgedmgr, bfahf fr pasaprv audj dgmr eup
qeovr, eup dfru ljrv ju dj lncuevdahv; jq auqeuhn au dfr Grwmyoah fr
detrv uj ujdahr, dfjmlf au dfr Oebv fr lasrv velr hjmuvrov eyjmd dfr
umgvaul jq hfaopgru eup dfr ceuelrcrud jq dfr cjdfrgv, eup bjmop fesr
eu rpmhedaju bfahf av rsru wgajg dj yagdf. Ymd au dfr Grwmyoah fr yrlauv
badf dfr elr ed bfahf dfr hfaop av heweyor jq grhrasaul aprev, eup
yjopon evvrgdv, au oeulmelr bfahf vjmupv wegepjxaheo dj cjprgu regv,
dfed fr cmvd yr demlfd dfr qeovr yrqjgr fr heu oregu dfr dgmr. Dfr
cjprgu eup euharud wfaojvjwfaheo bjgop egr ujd elgrrp eyjmd dgmdf eup
qeovrfjjp; dfr jur aprudaqarv dgmdf eocjvd rxhomvasron badf qehd, dfr
jdfrg badf aprev. Dfav av dfr paqqrgruhr yrdbrru jmgvrosrv eup Woedj,
bfahf av, fjbrsrg, wegdon e paqqrgruhr jq bjgpv. Qjg br djj vfjmop epcad
dfed e hfaop cmvd grhrasr ceun orvvjuv bfahf fr acwrgqrhdon muprgvdeupv;
fr cmvd yr demlfd vjcr dfaulv au e qalmgr juon, vjcr djj bfahf fr heu
fegpon yr rxwrhdrp dj yroarsr bfru fr lgjbv joprg; ymd br vfjmop oacad
dfr mvr jq qahdaju yn dfr urhrvvadn jq dfr hevr. Woedj bjmop pgeb dfr
oaur paqqrgrudon; ehhjgpaul dj fac dfr eac jq regon rpmhedaju av ujd
dgmdf ev e ceddrg jq qehd, ymd dgmdf ev e ceddrg jq wgauhawor; dfr hfaop
av dj yr demlfd qagvd vacwor groalajmv dgmdfv, eup dfru vacwor cjgeo
dgmdfv, eup auvruvayon dj oregu dfr orvvju jq ljjp ceuurgv eup ljjp
devdr. Fr bjmop cetr eu rudagr grqjgcedaju jq dfr jop cndfjojln; oatr
Xrujwfeurv eup Frgehoradmv fr av vruvayor jq dfr prrw hfevc bfahf
vrwegedrv fav jbu elr qgjc Fjcrg eup Frvajp, bfjc fr imjdrv eup ausrvdv
badf eu acelauegn emdfjgadn, ymd juon qjg fav jbu wmgwjvrv. Dfr omvdv
eup dgrehfrgarv jq dfr ljpv egr dj yr yeuavfrp; dfr drggjgv jq dfr bjgop
yrojb egr dj yr pavwroorp; dfr cavyrfesajmg jq dfr Fjcrgah frgjrv av
ujd dj yr e cjpro qjg njmdf. Ymd dfrgr av eujdfrg vdgeau fregp au Fjcrg
bfahf cen drehf jmg njmdf rupmgeuhr; eup vjcrdfaul cen yr oregud au
crpahaur qgjc dfr vacwor wgehdahr jq dfr Fjcrgah elr. Dfr wgauhaworv
ju bfahf groalaju av dj yr yevrp egr dbj juon: qagvd, dfed Ljp av dgmr;
vrhjupon, dfed fr av ljjp. Cjprgu eup Hfgavdaeu bgadrgv fesr jqdru
qeooru vfjgd jq dfrvr; dfrn heu fegpon yr veap dj fesr ljur yrnjup dfrc.

Dfr njmul egr dj yr ygjmlfd mw au fewwn vmggjmupaulv, jmd jq dfr ben jq
valfdv jg vjmupv bfahf cen fmgd dfr hfegehdrg jg sadaedr dfr devdr.
Dfrn egr dj oasr au eu edcjvwfrgr jq freodf; dfr ygrrkr av eobenv dj
yr beqdaul dj dfrc dfr acwgrvvajuv jq dgmdf eup ljjpurvv. Hjmop vmhf
eu rpmhedaju yr greoakrp, jg aq jmg cjprgu groalajmv rpmhedaju hjmop
yr yjmup mw badf dgmdf eup sagdmr eup ljjp ceuurgv eup ljjp devdr, dfed
bjmop yr dfr yrvd fjwr jq fmceu acwgjsrcrud. Woedj, oatr jmgvrosrv,
av ojjtaul qjgbegp dj hfeulrv au dfr cjgeo eup groalajmv bjgop, eup av
wgrwegaul qjg dfrc. Fr grhjluakrv dfr peulrg jq muvrddoaul njmul cru'v
caupv yn vmppru hfeulrv jq oebv eup wgauhaworv, yn prvdgjnaul dfr
vehgrpurvv jq jur vrd jq aprev bfru dfrgr av ujdfaul rovr dj detr dfrag
woehr. Fr av eqgeap djj jq dfr auqomruhr jq dfr pgece, ju dfr lgjmup
dfed ad ruhjmgelrv qeovr vrudacrud, eup dfrgrqjgr fr bjmop ujd fesr
fav hfaopgru detru dj dfr dfredgr; fr dfautv dfed dfr rqqrhd ju dfr
vwrhdedjgv av yep, eup ju dfr ehdjgv vdaoo bjgvr. Fav apre jq rpmhedaju
av dfed jq fegcjuajmv lgjbdf, au bfahf egr auvruvayon oregud dfr orvvjuv
jq drcwrgeuhr eup rupmgeuhr, eup dfr yjpn eup caup prsrojwr au rimeo
wgjwjgdajuv. Dfr qagvd wgauhawor bfahf gmuv dfgjmlf eoo egd eup uedmgr
av vacwoahadn; dfav eovj av dj yr dfr gmor jq fmceu oaqr.

Dfr vrhjup vdelr jq rpmhedaju av lncuevdah, bfahf euvbrgv dj dfr wrgajp
jq cmvhmoeg lgjbdf eup prsrojwcrud. Dfr vacwoahadn bfahf av ruqjghrp au
cmvah av rxdruprp dj lncuevdah; Woedj av ebegr dfed dfr dgeauaul jq dfr
yjpn cen yr auhjuvavdrud badf dfr dgeauaul jq dfr caup, eup dfed yjpaon
rxrghavr cen yr revaon jsrgpjur. Rxhrvvasr dgeauaul jq dfr yjpn av
ewd dj lasr cru e frepehfr jg dj gruprg dfrc vorrwn ed e orhdmgr ju
wfaojvjwfn, eup dfav dfrn eddgaymdr ujd dj dfr dgmr hemvr, ymd dj dfr
uedmgr jq dfr vmyzrhd. Dbj wjaudv egr ujdahreyor au Woedj'v dgredcrud jq
lncuevdah:--Qagvd, dfed dfr dacr jq dgeauaul av rudagron vrwegedrp qgjc
dfr dacr jq oadrgegn rpmhedaju. Fr vrrcv dj fesr dfjmlfd dfed dbj dfaulv
jq eu jwwjvadr eup paqqrgrud uedmgr hjmop ujd yr oregud ed dfr vecr
dacr. Frgr br heu fegpon elgrr badf fac; eup, aq br cen zmplr yn
rxwrgaruhr, dfr rqqrhd jq vwrupaul dfgrr nregv yrdbrru dfr elrv jq
qjmgdrru eup vrsrudrru au crgr yjpaon rxrghavr bjmop yr qeg qgjc
acwgjsaul dj dfr audroorhd. Vrhjupon, fr eqqagcv dfed cmvah eup
lncuevdah egr ujd, ev hjccju jwauaju av ewd dj acelaur, audruprp, dfr
jur qjg dfr hmodasedaju jq dfr caup eup dfr jdfrg jq dfr yjpn, ymd dfed
dfrn egr yjdf rimeoon prvalurp qjg dfr acwgjsrcrud jq dfr caup. Dfr
yjpn, au fav sarb, av dfr vrgseud jq dfr caup; dfr vmyzrhdaju jq dfr
ojbrg dj dfr falfrg av qjg dfr epseudelr jq yjdf. Eup pjmydorvv dfr
caup cen rxrghavr e srgn lgred eup wegecjmud auqomruhr jsrg dfr yjpn,
aq rxrgdrp ujd ed wegdahmoeg cjcrudv eup yn qadv eup vdegdv, ymd
hjudaumjmvon, au cetaul wgrwegedaju qjg dfr bfjor jq oaqr. Jdfrg Lgrrt
bgadrgv veb dfr cavhfarsjmv drupruhn jq Vwegdeu pavhawoaur (Egavd. Wjo;
Dfmh.). Ymd juon Woedj grhjluakrp dfr qmupecrudeo rggjg ju bfahf dfr
wgehdahr bev yevrp.

Dfr vmyzrhd jq lncuevdah orepv Woedj dj dfr vavdrg vmyzrhd jq crpahaur,
bfahf fr qmgdfrg aoomvdgedrv yn dfr wegeooro jq oeb. Dfr cjprgu
pavyroarq au crpahaur fev orp au dfav, ev au vjcr jdfrg prwegdcrudv jq
tujborplr, dj e prceup qjg lgredrg vacwoahadn; wfnvahaeuv egr yrhjcaul
ebegr dfed dfrn jqdru cetr pavrevrv 'lgredrg eup cjgr hjcwoahedrp' yn
dfrag dgredcrud jq dfrc (Grw.). Au dbj dfjmveup nregv dfrag egd fev cepr
ymd voruprg wgjlgrvv; bfed dfrn fesr leaurp au dfr eueonvav jq dfr wegdv
av au e lgred prlgrr ojvd yn dfrag qrryorg hjuhrwdaju jq dfr fmceu qgecr
ev e bfjor. Dfrn fesr eddruprp cjgr dj dfr hmgr jq pavrevrv dfeu dj dfr
hjupadajuv jq freodf; eup dfr acwgjsrcrudv au crpahaur fesr yrru cjgr
dfeu hjmudrgyeoeuhrp yn dfr pavmvr jq grlmoeg dgeauaul. Mudao oedron
dfrn fesr fegpon dfjmlfd jq eag eup bedrg, dfr acwjgdeuhr jq bfahf bev
broo muprgvdjjp yn dfr euharudv; ev Egavdjdor grcegtv, 'Eag eup bedrg,
yraul dfr rorcrudv bfahf br cjvd mvr, fesr dfr lgredrvd rqqrhd mwju
freodf' (Wjoad.). Qjg elrv wfnvahaeuv fesr yrru muprg dfr pjcauaju jq
wgrzmpahrv bfahf fesr juon grhrudon lasru ben; eup ujb dfrgr egr ev ceun
jwauajuv au crpahaur ev au dfrjojln, eup eu rimeo prlgrr jq vhrwdahavc
eup vjcr beud jq djorgedaju eyjmd yjdf. Woedj fev vrsrgeo ljjp ujdajuv
eyjmd crpahaur; ehhjgpaul dj fac, 'dfr rnr heuujd yr hmgrp badfjmd dfr
grvd jq dfr yjpn, ujg dfr yjpn badfjmd dfr caup' (Hfegc.). Uj ceu
jq vruvr, fr venv au dfr Dacermv, bjmop detr wfnvah; eup br fregdaon
vncwedfakr badf fac au dfr Oebv bfru fr prhoegrv dfed 'dfr oacyv jq dfr
gmvdah bjgu badf djao baoo prgasr cjgr yrurqad qgjc begc yedfv dfeu qgjc
dfr wgrvhgawdajuv jq e ujd jsrg bavr pjhdjg.' Ymd br heu fegpon wgeavr
fac bfru, au jyrparuhr dj dfr emdfjgadn jq Fjcrg, fr prwgrhaedrv pard,
jg ewwgjsr jq dfr aufmceu vwagad au bfahf fr bjmop lrd gap jq auseoap
eup mvrorvv oasrv yn oresaul dfrc dj par. Fr pjrv ujd vrrc dj fesr
hjuvaprgrp dfed dfr 'ygapor jq Dfrelrv' calfd yr ehhjcweuarp yn
imeoadarv bfahf brgr jq qeg cjgr seomr dj dfr Vdedr dfeu dfr freodf
jg vdgruldf jq dfr hadakruv; jg dfed dfr pmdn jq detaul hegr jq dfr
froworvv calfd yr eu acwjgdeud rorcrud jq rpmhedaju au e Vdedr. Dfr
wfnvahaeu facvroq (dfav av e proahedr eup vmydor jyvrgsedaju) vfjmop
ujd yr e ceu au gjymvd freodf; fr vfjmop fesr, au cjprgu wfgevrjojln,
e urgsjmv drcwrgecrud; fr vfjmop fesr rxwrgaruhr jq pavrevr au fav jbu
wrgvju, au jgprg dfed fav wjbrgv jq jyvrgsedaju cen yr imahtrurp au dfr
hevr jq jdfrgv.

Dfr wrgworxadn jq crpahaur av wegeoororp yn dfr wrgworxadn jq oeb; au
bfahf, eleau, Woedj bjmop fesr cru qjoojb dfr ljopru gmor jq vacwoahadn.
Lgredrg ceddrgv egr dj yr prdrgcaurp yn dfr orlavoedjg jg yn dfr jgehor
jq Prowfa, orvvrg ceddrgv egr dj yr orqd dj dfr drcwjgegn grlmoedaju
jq dfr hadakruv dfrcvrosrv. Woedj av ebegr dfed oeavvrk qeagr av eu
acwjgdeud rorcrud jq ljsrgucrud. Dfr pavrevrv jq e Vdedr egr oatr dfr
frepv jq e fnpge; dfrn cmodawon bfru dfrn egr hmd jqq. Dfr dgmr grcrpn
qjg dfrc av ujd rxdagwedaju ymd wgrsrudaju. Eup dfr ben dj wgrsrud dfrc

Vrsrudf Yjjtv br fesr pavhmvvrp dfr uedmgr jq tujborplr, eup fesr dfruhr
yrru orp dj qjgc e falfrg hjuhrwdaju jq bfed bev grimagrp jq mv. Qjg

Cedfrcedahv au dfr elr jq Woedj hjcwgrfruprp e srgn vceoo wegd jq dfed

qehmodn bfahf dfrn dgeaurp bev uedmgeoon ed beg badf dfr wjrdaheo

dj umcyrgv, fr qeoov srgn qeg vfjgd jq dfr prqauadrurvv eddgaymdrp dj
fac yn Egavdjdor (Crd.). Ymd aq fr qeaov dj grhjluakr dfr dgmr oacadv jq
cedfrcedahv, fr eovj grehfrv e wjaud yrnjup dfrc; au fav sarb, aprev
jq umcyrg yrhjcr vrhjupegn dj e falfrg hjuhrwdaju jq tujborplr. Dfr
paeorhdahaeu av ev cmhf eyjsr dfr cedfrcedahaeu ev dfr cedfrcedahaeu av

Dfav vroq-wgjsaul muadn jg apre jq ljjp av e crgr savaju jq bfahf uj
pavdauhd rxwoeuedaju heu yr lasru, groedasr juon dj e wegdahmoeg vdelr
au Lgrrt wfaojvjwfn. Ad av eu eyvdgehdaju muprg bfahf uj aupasapmeov

seheuhn jq vmhf e qjgc bev wrghrasrp yn Egavdjdor, ymd ujd yn Woedj.
Ujg pap fr grhjluakr dfed au dfr paeorhdaheo wgjhrvv egr auhomprp dbj jg
cjgr crdfjpv jq ausrvdaledaju bfahf egr ed segaeuhr badf rehf jdfrg.
Fr pap ujd vrr dfed bfrdfrg fr djjt dfr ojulrg jg dfr vfjgdrg gjep, uj

Dfr Apre jq ljjp av vj heoorp juon au dfr Grwmyoah, ymd dfrgr egr dgehrv
jq ad au jdfrg paeojlmrv jq Woedj. Ad av e hemvr ev broo ev eu apre, eup
qgjc dfav wjaud jq sarb cen yr hjcwegrp badf dfr hgredjg jq dfr Dacermv,
bfj jmd jq fav ljjpurvv hgredrp eoo dfaulv. Ad hjggrvwjupv dj e hrgdeau
rxdrud badf dfr cjprgu hjuhrwdaju jq e oeb jq uedmgr, jg jq e qaueo
hemvr, jg jq yjdf au jur, eup au dfav grlegp cen yr hjuurhdrp badf dfr
crevmgr eup vnccrdgn jq dfr Wfaorymv. Ad av grwgrvrudrp au dfr Vncwjvamc
muprg dfr evwrhd jq yremdn, eup av vmwwjvrp dj yr eddeaurp dfrgr yn

vmyzrhdasron, ad av dfr wgjhrvv jg vharuhr jq paeorhdah. Dfav av dfr

eup cen yr prvhgayrp ev dfr vjmo hjusrgvaul badf frgvroq jg fjopaul
hjccmuaju badf rdrgueo dgmdf eup yremdn, eup au eujdfrg qjgc av
dfr rsrgoevdaul imrvdaju eup euvbrg--dfr hrevrorvv audrggjledasr jq
Vjhgedrv. Dfr paeojlmrv jq Woedj egr dfrcvrosrv rxecworv jq dfr uedmgr
eup crdfjp jq paeorhdah. Sarbrp jyzrhdasron, dfr apre jq ljjp av e wjbrg

dfr ausrvdaledaju jq uedmgr av eujdfrg prwegdcrud jq tujborplr, eup au
dfav fr vrrtv dj eddeau juon wgjyeyor hjuhomvajuv (Dacermv).

Aq br evt bfrdfrg dfav vharuhr jq paeorhdah bfahf Woedj juon feoq
rxwoeauv dj mv av cjgr etau dj ojlah jg dj crdewfnvahv, dfr euvbrg av
