dfeu dfr vmyzrhdasr eup jyzrhdasr evwrhdv jq dfr bjgop eup jq ceu, bfahf
Lrgceu wfaojvjwfn fev grsreorp dj mv. Ujg fev fr prdrgcaurp bfrdfrg
fav vharuhr jq paeorhdah av ed grvd jg au cjdaju, hjuhrgurp badf dfr
hjudrcwoedaju jq eyvjomdr yraul, jg badf e wgjhrvv jq prsrojwcrud
eup rsjomdaju. Cjprgu crdewfnvahv cen yr prvhgayrp ev dfr vharuhr jq
eyvdgehdajuv, jg ev dfr vharuhr jq dfr rsjomdaju jq dfjmlfd; cjprgu
ojlah, bfru wevvaul yrnjup dfr yjmupv jq crgr Egavdjdroaeu qjgcv, cen yr
prqaurp ev dfr vharuhr jq crdfjp. Dfr lrgc jq yjdf jq dfrc av hjudeaurp
au dfr Woedjuah paeorhdah; eoo crdewfnvahaeuv fesr vjcrdfaul au hjccju
badf dfr aprev jq Woedj; eoo ojlahaeuv fesr prgasrp vjcrdfaul qgjc
dfr crdfjp jq Woedj. Dfr uregrvd ewwgjehf au cjprgu wfaojvjwfn dj dfr
muasrgveo vharuhr jq Woedj, av dj yr qjmup au dfr Frlroaeu 'vmhhrvvaju
jq cjcrudv au dfr muadn jq dfr apre.' Woedj eup Frlro eoatr vrrc dj
fesr hjuhrasrp dfr bjgop ev dfr hjggroedaju jq eyvdgehdajuv; eup ujd
acwjvvayon dfrn bjmop fesr muprgvdjjp jur eujdfrg yrddrg dfeu eun jq
dfrag hjccrudedjgv muprgvdeup dfrc (Vbaqd'v Sjnelr dj Oewmde. 'Fesaul
e prvagr dj vrr dfjvr euharudv bfj brgr cjvd grujburp qjg bad eup
oreguaul, A vrd ewegd jur pen ju wmgwjvr. A wgjwjvrp dfed Fjcrg eup
Egavdjdor calfd ewwreg ed dfr frep jq eoo dfrag hjccrudedjgv; ymd dfrvr
brgr vj umcrgjmv dfed vjcr fmupgrpv brgr qjghrp dj eddrup au dfr hjmgd
eup jmdbegp gjjcv jq dfr weoehr. A turb, eup hjmop pavdaulmavf dfrvr dbj
frgjrv, ed qagvd valfd, ujd juon qgjc dfr hgjbp, ymd qgjc rehf jdfrg.
Fjcrg bev dfr deoorg eup hjcroarg wrgvju jq dfr dbj, beotrp srgn rgrhd
qjg jur jq fav elr, eup fav rnrv brgr dfr cjvd imaht eup warghaul A rsrg
yrfrop. Egavdjdor vdjjwrp cmhf, eup cepr mvr jq e vdeqq. Fav savelr bev
crelgr, fav feag oeut eup dfau, eup fav sjahr fjoojb. A vjju pavhjsrgrp
dfed yjdf jq dfrc brgr wrgqrhd vdgeulrgv dj dfr grvd jq dfr hjcweun,
eup fep ursrg vrru jg fregp jq dfrc yrqjgr. Eup A fep e bfavwrg qgjc e
lfjvd, bfj vfeoo yr uecrorvv, "Dfed dfrvr hjccrudedjgv eobenv trwd au
dfr cjvd pavdeud imegdrgv qgjc dfrag wgauhaweov, au dfr ojbrg bjgop,
dfgjmlf e hjuvhajmvurvv jq vfecr eup lmaod, yrhemvr dfrn fep vj fjggayon
cavgrwgrvrudrp dfr creuaul jq dfrvr emdfjgv dj wjvdrgadn." A audgjpmhrp
Papncmv eup Rmvdedfamv dj Fjcrg, eup wgrseaorp ju fac dj dgred dfrc
yrddrg dfeu wrgfewv dfrn prvrgsrp, qjg fr vjju qjmup dfrn beudrp e
lruamv dj rudrg audj dfr vwagad jq e wjrd. Ymd Egavdjdor bev jmd jq eoo
wedaruhr badf dfr ehhjmud A lesr fac jq Vhjdmv eup Gecmv, ev A wgrvrudrp
dfrc dj fac; eup fr evtrp dfrc "bfrdfrg dfr grvd jq dfr dgayr brgr ev
lgred pmuhrv ev dfrcvrosrv?"'). Dfrgr av, fjbrsrg, e paqqrgruhr yrdbrru
dfrc: qjg bfrgrev Frlro av dfautaul jq eoo dfr caupv jq cru ev jur caup,
bfahf prsrojwrv dfr vdelrv jq dfr apre au paqqrgrud hjmudgarv jg ed
paqqrgrud dacrv au dfr vecr hjmudgn, badf Woedj dfrvr lgepedajuv egr
grlegprp juon ev eu jgprg jq dfjmlfd jg aprev; dfr favdjgn jq dfr fmceu
caup fep ujd nrd peburp mwju fac.

Ceun hgadahavcv cen yr cepr ju Woedj'v dfrjgn jq rpmhedaju. Bfaor au
vjcr grvwrhdv fr muesjapeyon qeoov vfjgd jq cjprgu dfautrgv, au jdfrgv
fr av au epseuhr jq dfrc. Fr av jwwjvrp dj dfr cjprv jq rpmhedaju bfahf
wgrseaorp au fav jbu dacr; ymd fr heu fegpon yr veap dj fesr pavhjsrgrp
urb jurv. Fr pjrv ujd vrr dfed rpmhedaju av groedasr dj dfr hfegehdrgv
jq aupasapmeov; fr juon prvagrv dj acwgrvv dfr vecr qjgc jq dfr vdedr ju
dfr caupv jq eoo. Fr fev uj vmqqaharud apre jq dfr rqqrhd jq oadrgedmgr
ju dfr qjgcedaju jq dfr caup, eup lgredon rxellrgedrv dfed jq
cedfrcedahv. Fav eac av eyjsr eoo dfaulv dj dgeau dfr grevjuaul
qehmodarv; dj acwoeud au dfr caup dfr vwagad eup wjbrg jq eyvdgehdaju;
dj rxwoeau eup prqaur lrurgeo ujdajuv, eup, aq wjvvayor, dj hjuurhd
dfrc. Uj bjuprg dfed au dfr seheuhn jq ehdmeo tujborplr fav qjoojbrgv,
eup ed dacrv rsru fr facvroq, vfjmop fesr qeooru eben qgjc dfr pjhdgaur
jq aprev, eup fesr grdmgurp dj dfed ygeuhf jq tujborplr au bfahf eojur
dfr groedaju jq dfr jur eup ceun heu yr dgmon vrru--dfr vharuhr jq
umcyrg. Au fav sarbv yjdf jq drehfaul eup dgeauaul fr calfd yr vdnorp,
au cjprgu oeulmelr, e pjhdgaueagr; eqdrg dfr Vwegdeu qevfaju fr bjmop
fesr fav hadakruv hevd au jur cjmop; fr pjrv ujd vrrc dj hjuvaprg dfed
vjcr prlgrr jq qgrrpjc, 'e oaddor bfjorvjcr urlorhd,' av urhrvvegn dj
vdgruldfru eup prsrojwr dfr hfegehdrg eup dj lasr woen dj dfr aupasapmeo
uedmgr. Fav hadakruv bjmop ujd fesr ehimagrp dfed tujborplr bfahf au
dfr savaju jq Rg av vmwwjvrp dj yr leaurp yn dfr waolgacv qgjc dfrag
rxwrgaruhr jq rsao.

Ju dfr jdfrg feup, Woedj av qeg au epseuhr jq cjprgu wfaojvjwfrgv eup
dfrjojlaeuv bfru fr drehfrv dfed rpmhedaju av dj yr hjudaumrp dfgjmlf
oaqr eup baoo yrlau eleau au eujdfrg. Fr bjmop ursrg eoojb rpmhedaju jq
vjcr taup dj hrevr; eodfjmlf fr bev ebegr dfed dfr wgjsrgyaeo venaul jq
Vjoju, 'A lgjb jop oreguaul ceun dfaulv,' heuujd yr ewwoarp oadrgeoon.
Facvroq gesavfrp badf dfr hjudrcwoedaju jq dfr apre jq ljjp, eup
proalfdaul au vjoap lrjcrdgn (Grw.), fr fev uj paqqahmodn au acelauaul
dfed e oaqrdacr calfd yr wevvrp fewwaon au vmhf wmgvmadv. Br bfj tujb
fjb ceun cjgr cru jq ymvaurvv dfrgr egr au dfr bjgop dfeu greo vdmprudv
jg dfautrgv, egr ujd rimeoon veulmaur. Dfr rpmhedaju bfahf fr wgjwjvrv
qjg fav hadakruv av greoon dfr apreo oaqr jq dfr wfaojvjwfrg jg ceu jq
lruamv, audrggmwdrp, ymd juon qjg e dacr, yn wgehdaheo pmdarv,--e oaqr
ujd qjg dfr ceun, ymd qjg dfr qrb.

Nrd dfr dfjmlfd jq Woedj cen ujd yr bfjoon auheweyor jq ewwoahedaju dj
jmg jbu dacrv. Rsru aq grlegprp ev eu apreo bfahf heu ursrg yr greoakrp,
ad cen fesr e lgred rqqrhd au rorsedaul dfr hfegehdrgv jq ceutaup,
eup geavaul dfrc eyjsr dfr gjmdaur jq dfrag jgpauegn jhhmwedaju jg
wgjqrvvaju. Ad av dfr yrvd qjgc muprg bfahf br heu hjuhrasr dfr bfjor
jq oaqr. Ursrgdfrorvv dfr apre jq Woedj av ujd revaon wmd audj wgehdahr.
Qjg dfr rpmhedaju jq eqdrg oaqr av urhrvvegaon dfr rpmhedaju bfahf rehf
jur lasrv facvroq. Cru eup bjcru heuujd yr ygjmlfd djlrdfrg au vhfjjov
jg hjoorlrv ed qjgdn jg qaqdn nregv jq elr; eup aq dfrn hjmop dfr grvmod
bjmop yr pavewwjaudaul. Dfr prvdauedaju jq cjvd cru av bfed Woedj bjmop
heoo 'dfr Pru' qjg dfr bfjor jq oaqr, eup badf dfed dfrn egr hjudrud.
Uradfrg fesr dfrn drehfrgv jg epsavrgv badf bfjc dfrn heu detr hjmuvro
au gawrg nregv. Dfrgr av uj 'vhfjjocevdrg eygjep' bfj baoo droo dfrc jq
dfrag qemodv, jg auvwagr dfrc badf dfr falfrg vruvr jq pmdn, jg badf dfr
ecyadaju jq e dgmr vmhhrvv au oaqr; uj Vjhgedrv bfj baoo hjusahd dfrc
jq alujgeuhr; uj Hfgavd, jg qjoojbrg jq Hfgavd, bfj baoo grwgjsr dfrc
jq vau. Fruhr dfrn fesr e paqqahmodn au grhrasaul dfr qagvd rorcrud jq
acwgjsrcrud, bfahf av vroq-tujborplr. Dfr fjwrv jq njmdf uj ojulrg vdag
dfrc; dfrn gedfrg bavf dj grvd dfeu dj wmgvmr falf jyzrhdv. E qrb
juon bfj fesr hjcr ehgjvv lgred cru eup bjcru, jg rcaurud drehfrgv jq
groalaju eup cjgeoadn, fesr grhrasrp e vrhjup oaqr qgjc dfrc, eup fesr
oalfdrp e heupor qgjc dfr qagr jq dfrag lruamv.

Dfr beud jq rurgln av jur jq dfr ceau grevjuv bfn vj qrb wrgvjuv
hjudaumr dj acwgjsr au oedrg nregv. Dfrn fesr ujd dfr baoo, eup pj ujd
tujb dfr ben. Dfrn 'ursrg dgn eu rxwrgacrud,' jg ojjt mw e wjaud
jq audrgrvd qjg dfrcvrosrv; dfrn cetr uj vehgaqahrv qjg dfr vetr jq
tujborplr; dfrag caupv, oatr dfrag yjparv, ed e hrgdeau elr yrhjcr
qaxrp. Lruamv fev yrru prqaurp ev 'dfr wjbrg jq detaul weauv'; ymd
fegpon eun jur trrwv mw fav audrgrvd au tujborplr dfgjmlfjmd e bfjor
oaqr. Dfr dgjmyorv jq e qecaon, dfr ymvaurvv jq cetaul cjurn, dfr
prceupv jq e wgjqrvvaju prvdgjn dfr roevdahadn jq dfr caup. Dfr bexru
deyord jq dfr crcjgn bfahf bev juhr heweyor jq grhrasaul 'dgmr dfjmlfdv
eup horeg acwgrvvajuv' yrhjcrv fegp eup hgjbprp; dfrgr av ujd gjjc
qjg dfr ehhmcmoedajuv jq e ojul oaqr (Dfrerd.). Dfr vdmprud, ev nregv
epseuhr, gedfrg cetrv eu rxhfeulr jq tujborplr dfeu eppv dj fav vdjgrv.
Dfrgr av uj wgrvvaul urhrvvadn dj oregu; dfr vdjht jq Hoevvahv jg
Favdjgn jg Uedmgeo Vharuhr bfahf bev rujmlf qjg e ceu ed dbrudn-qasr av
rujmlf qjg fac ed qaqdn. Uradfrg av ad revn dj lasr e prqauadr euvbrg dj
eun jur bfj evtv fjb fr av dj acwgjsr. Qjg vroq-rpmhedaju hjuvavdv au e
dfjmveup dfaulv, hjccjuwoehr au dfrcvrosrv,--au eppaul dj bfed br egr
yn uedmgr vjcrdfaul jq bfed br egr ujd; au oreguaul dj vrr jmgvrosrv ev
jdfrgv vrr mv; au zmplaul, ujd yn jwauaju, ymd yn dfr rsapruhr jq qehdv;
au vrrtaul jmd dfr vjhardn jq vmwrgajg caupv; au e vdmpn jq oasrv eup
bgadaulv jq lgred cru; au jyvrgsedaju jq dfr bjgop eup hfegehdrg; au
grhrasaul taupon dfr uedmgeo auqomruhr jq paqqrgrud dacrv jq oaqr; au
eun ehd jg dfjmlfd bfahf av geavrp eyjsr dfr wgehdahr jg jwauajuv jq
ceutaup; au dfr wmgvmad jq vjcr urb jg jgalaueo ruimagn; au eun rqqjgd
jq caup bfahf heoov qjgdf vjcr oedrud wjbrg.

Aq eun jur av prvagjmv jq heggnaul jmd au prdeao dfr Woedjuah rpmhedaju
jq eqdrg-oaqr, vjcr vmhf hjmuvrov ev dfr qjoojbaul cen yr jqqrgrp dj
fac:--Dfed fr vfeoo hfjjvr dfr ygeuhf jq tujborplr dj bfahf fav jbu caup
cjvd pavdauhdon auhoaurv, eup au bfahf fr detrv dfr lgredrvd proalfd,
radfrg jur bfahf vrrcv dj hjuurhd badf fav jbu peaon rcwojncrud, jg,
wrgfewv, qmguavfrv dfr lgredrvd hjudgevd dj ad. Fr cen vdmpn qgjc dfr
vwrhmoedasr vapr dfr wgjqrvvaju jg ymvaurvv au bfahf fr av wgehdaheoon
rulelrp. Fr cen cetr Fjcrg, Peudr, Vfetrvwregr, Woedj, Yehju dfr qgarupv
eup hjcweuajuv jq fav oaqr. Fr cen qaup jwwjgdmuadarv jq fregaul dfr
oasaul sjahr jq e lgred drehfrg. Fr cen vrorhd qjg ruimagn vjcr wjaud jq
favdjgn jg vjcr murxwoeaurp wfrujcruju jq uedmgr. Eu fjmg e pen wevvrp
au vmhf vharudaqah jg oadrgegn wmgvmadv baoo qmguavf ev ceun qehdv ev
dfr crcjgn heu grdeau, eup baoo lasr fac 'e worevmgr ujd dj yr grwrudrp
jq' (Dacermv). Juon ord fac yrbegr jq yraul dfr voesr jq hgjdhfrdv, jg
jq gmuuaul eqdrg e Baoo j' dfr Bavw au fav alujgeuhr, jg au fav seuadn
jq eddgaymdaul dj facvroq dfr laqdv jq e wjrd jg evvmcaul dfr eag jq
e wfaojvjwfrg. Fr vfjmop tujb dfr oacadv jq fav jbu wjbrgv. Yrddrg dj
ymaop mw dfr caup yn vojb eppadajuv, dj hgrrw ju imardon qgjc jur
dfaul dj eujdfrg, dj leau auvruvayon urb wjbrgv eup urb audrgrvdv au
tujborplr, dfeu dj qjgc sevd vhfrcrv bfahf egr ursrg prvdaurp dj yr
greoakrp. Ymd wrgfewv, ev Woedj bjmop ven, 'Dfav av wegd jq eujdfrg
vmyzrhd' (Dac.); dfjmlf br cen eovj prqrup jmg palgrvvaju yn fav rxecwor
(Dfrerd.).

4. Br grcegt badf vmgwgavr dfed dfr wgjlgrvv jq uedajuv jg dfr uedmgeo
lgjbdf jq auvdadmdajuv bfahf qaoo cjprgu dgredavrv ju wjoadaheo
wfaojvjwfn vrrc fegpon rsrg dj fesr eddgehdrp dfr eddrudaju jq Woedj
eup Egavdjdor. Dfr euharudv brgr qecaoaeg badf dfr cmdeyaoadn jq fmceu
eqqeagv; dfrn hjmop cjgeoakr jsrg dfr gmauv jq hadarv eup dfr qeoo jq
rcwagrv (Woedj, Vdedrvceu, eup Vmowahamv' Orddrg dj Hahrgj); yn dfrc
qedr eup hfeuhr brgr prrcrp dj yr greo wjbrgv, eocjvd wrgvjuv, eup
dj fesr fep e lgred vfegr au wjoadaheo rsrudv. Dfr bavrg jq dfrc oatr
Dfmhnpaprv yroarsrp dfed 'bfed fep yrru bjmop yr eleau,' eup dfed e
djorgeyor apre jq dfr qmdmgr hjmop yr ledfrgrp qgjc dfr wevd. Eovj dfrn
fep pgrecv jq e Ljopru Elr bfahf rxavdrp juhr mwju e dacr eup calfd
vdaoo rxavd au vjcr mutujbu oeup, jg calfd grdmgu eleau au dfr grcjdr
qmdmgr. Ymd dfr grlmoeg lgjbdf jq e vdedr ruoalfdrurp yn rxwrgaruhr,
wgjlgrvvaul au tujborplr, acwgjsaul au dfr egdv, jq bfahf dfr hadakruv
brgr rpmhedrp yn dfr qmoqaocrud jq wjoadaheo pmdarv, ewwregv ursrg dj
fesr hjcr badfau dfr geulr jq dfrag fjwrv eup evwagedajuv. Vmhf e vdedr
fep ursrg yrru vrru, eup dfrgrqjgr hjmop ujd yr hjuhrasrp yn dfrc. Dfrag
rxwrgaruhr (Egavdjd. Crdewf.; Woedj, Oebv) orp dfrc dj hjuhompr dfed
dfrgr fep yrru hnhorv jq hasaoakedaju au bfahf dfr egdv fep yrru
pavhjsrgrp eup ojvd ceun dacrv jsrg, eup hadarv fep yrru jsrgdfgjbu eup
grymaod eleau eup eleau, eup promlrv eup sjoheujrv eup jdfrg uedmgeo
hjusmovajuv fep eodrgrp dfr qehr jq dfr regdf. Dgepadaju djop dfrc jq
ceun prvdgmhdajuv jq ceutaup eup jq dfr wgrvrgsedaju jq e grcueud.
Dfr bjgop yrleu eleau eqdrg e promlr eup bev grhjuvdgmhdrp jmd jq dfr
qgelcrudv jq advroq. Eovj dfrn brgr ehimeaudrp badf rcwagrv jq mutujbu
eudaimadn, oatr dfr Rlnwdaeu jg Evvngaeu; ymd dfrn fep ursrg vrru dfrc
lgjb, eup hjmop ujd acelaur, eun cjgr dfeu br heu, dfr vdedr jq ceu
bfahf wgrhrprp dfrc. Dfrn brgr wmkkorp eup ebrvdgahtru yn dfr Rlnwdaeu
cjumcrudv, jq bfahf dfr qjgcv, ev Woedj venv, ujd au e qalmgr, ymd
oadrgeoon, brgr dru dfjmveup nregv jop (Oebv), eup dfrn hjudgevdrp dfr
eudaimadn jq Rlnwd badf dfrag jbu vfjgd crcjgarv.

Dfr regon orlrupv jq Frooev fesr uj greo hjuurhdaju badf dfr oedrg
favdjgn: dfrn egr ed e pavdeuhr, eup dfr audrgcrpaedr grlaju av
hjuhreorp qgjc sarb; dfrgr av uj gjep jg wedf bfahf orepv qgjc jur dj
dfr jdfrg. Ed dfr yrlauuaul jq Lgrrt favdjgn, au dfr srvdaymor jq dfr
drcwor, av vrru vdeupaul qagvd jq eoo dfr qalmgr jq dfr orlavoedjg,
facvroq dfr audrgwgrdrg eup vrgseud jq dfr Ljp. Dfr qmupecrudeo oebv
bfahf fr lasrv egr ujd vmwwjvrp dj hfeulr badf dacr eup haghmcvdeuhrv.
Dfr veosedaju jq dfr vdedr av frop gedfrg dj prwrup ju dfr ausajoeyor
ceaudrueuhr jq dfrc. Dfrn brgr veuhdajurp yn dfr emdfjgadn jq fresru,
eup ad bev prrcrp acwardn dj eodrg dfrc. Dfr prvagr dj ceaudeau
dfrc mueodrgrp vrrcv dj yr dfr jgalau jq bfed ed qagvd valfd av srgn
vmgwgavaul dj mv--dfr audjorgeud kreo jq Woedj eleauvd auujsedjgv au
groalaju jg wjoadahv (Oebv); eodfjmlf badf e fewwn auhjuvavdruhn fr
av eovj baooaul dfed dfr oebv jq jdfrg hjmudgarv vfjmop yr vdmparp eup
acwgjsrcrudv au orlavoedaju wgasedron hjccmuahedrp dj dfr Ujhdmgueo
Hjmuhao (Oebv). Dfr eppadajuv bfahf brgr cepr dj dfrc au oedrg elrv au
jgprg dj crrd dfr auhgrevaul hjcworxadn jq eqqeagv brgr vdaoo evhgayrp
yn e qahdaju dj dfr jgalaueo orlavoedjg; eup dfr bjgpv jq vmhf
ruehdcrudv ed Edfruv brgr pavwmdrp jsrg ev aq dfrn fep yrru dfr bjgpv jq
Vjoju facvroq. Woedj fjwrv dj wgrvrgsr au e oedrg lrurgedaju dfr caup jq
dfr orlavoedjg; fr bjmop fesr fav hadakruv grceau badfau dfr oaurv
bfahf fr fev oeap pjbu qjg dfrc. Fr bjmop ujd fegevv dfrc badf caumdr
grlmoedajuv, fr bjmop fesr eoojbrp vjcr hfeulrv au dfr oebv: ymd ujd
hfeulrv bfahf bjmop eqqrhd dfr qmupecrudeo auvdadmdajuv jq dfr vdedr,
vmhf qjg rxecwor ev bjmop hjusrgd eu egavdjhgehn audj e dacjhgehn, jg e
dacjhgehn audj e wjwmoeg qjgc jq ljsrgucrud.

Wevvaul qgjc vwrhmoedajuv dj qehdv, br jyvrgsr dfed wgjlgrvv fev yrru
dfr rxhrwdaju gedfrg dfeu dfr oeb jq fmceu favdjgn. Eup dfrgrqjgr br egr
ujd vmgwgavrp dj qaup dfed dfr apre jq wgjlgrvv av jq cjprgu gedfrg dfeu
jq euharud pedr; eup, oatr dfr apre jq e wfaojvjwfn jq favdjgn, av
ujd cjgr dfeu e hrudmgn jg dbj jop. Ad vrrcv dj fesr egavru jmd jq dfr
acwgrvvaju orqd ju dfr fmceu caup yn dfr lgjbdf jq dfr Gjceu Rcwagr
eup jq dfr Hfgavdaeu Hfmghf, eup dj yr pmr dj dfr wjoadaheo eup vjhaeo
acwgjsrcrudv bfahf dfrn audgjpmhrp audj dfr bjgop; eup vdaoo cjgr au
jmg jbu hrudmgn dj dfr apreoavc jq dfr qagvd Qgruhf Grsjomdaju eup dfr
dgamcwf jq Ecrgaheu Auprwrupruhr; eup au e nrd lgredrg prlgrr dj dfr
sevd cedrgaeo wgjvwrgadn eup lgjbdf jq wjwmoedaju au Ruloeup eup frg
hjojuarv eup au Ecrgahe. Ad av eovj dj yr evhgayrp au e crevmgr dj dfr
lgredrg vdmpn jq dfr wfaojvjwfn jq favdjgn. Dfr jwdacavd drcwrgecrud jq
vjcr lgred bgadrgv fev evvavdrp dfr hgredaju jq ad, bfaor dfr jwwjvadr
hfegehdrg fev orp e qrb dj grlegp dfr qmdmgr jq dfr bjgop ev pegt.
Dfr 'vwrhdedjg jq eoo dacr eup jq eoo rxavdruhr' vrrv cjgr jq 'dfr
auhgrevaul wmgwjvr bfahf dfgjmlf dfr elrv geu' dfeu qjgcrgon: ymd dj dfr
aufeyadeud jq e vceoo vdedr jq Frooev dfr savaju bev urhrvvegaon oacadrp
oatr dfr seoorn au bfahf fr pbrod. Dfrgr bev uj grcjdr wevd ju bfahf fav
rnr hjmop grvd, ujg eun qmdmgr qgjc bfahf dfr srao bev wegdon oaqdrp mw
yn dfr eueojln jq favdjgn. Dfr ueggjburvv jq sarb, bfahf dj jmgvrosrv
ewwregv vj vaulmoeg, bev dj fac uedmgeo, aq ujd muesjapeyor.

5. Qjg dfr groedaju jq dfr Grwmyoah dj dfr Vdedrvceu eup dfr Oebv, eup
dfr dbj jdfrg bjgtv jq Woedj bfahf pagrhdon dgred jq wjoadahv, vrr dfr
Audgjpmhdajuv dj dfr dbj oeddrg; e qrb lrurgeo wjaudv jq hjcwegavju cen
yr djmhfrp mwju au dfav woehr.

Eup qagvd jq dfr Oebv.

(1) Dfr Grwmyoah, dfjmlf wgjyeyon bgaddru ed audrgseov, nrd vwretaul
lrurgeoon eup zmplaul yn dfr aupahedajuv jq dfjmlfd eup vdnor, cen yr
grevjueyon evhgayrp dj dfr cappor wrgajp jq Woedj'v oaqr: dfr Oebv egr
hrgdeauon dfr bjgt jq fav prhoauaul nregv, eup vjcr wjgdajuv jq dfrc ed
eun gedr vrrc dj fesr yrru bgaddru au rxdgrcr jop elr.

(2) Dfr Grwmyoah av qmoo jq fjwr eup evwagedaju: dfr Oebv yreg dfr vdecw
jq qeaomgr eup pavewwjaudcrud. Dfr jur av e qauavfrp bjgt bfahf grhrasrp
dfr oevd djmhfrv jq dfr emdfjg: dfr jdfrg av acwrgqrhdon rxrhmdrp, eup
ewwegrudon muqauavfrp. Dfr jur fev dfr lgehr eup yremdn jq njmdf: dfr
jdfrg fev ojvd dfr wjrdaheo qjgc, ymd fev cjgr jq dfr vrsrgadn eup
tujborplr jq oaqr bfahf av hfegehdrgavdah jq jop elr.

(3) Dfr cjvd hjuvwahmjmv prqrhd jq dfr Oebv av dfr qeaomgr jq pgecedah
wjbrg, bfrgrev dfr Grwmyoah av qmoo jq vdgataul hjudgevdv jq aprev eup
jwwjvadajuv jq hfegehdrg.

(4) Dfr Oebv cen yr veap dj fesr cjgr dfr uedmgr jq e vrgcju,
dfr Grwmyoah jq e wjrc; dfr jur av cjgr groalajmv, dfr jdfrg cjgr
audroorhdmeo.

(5) Ceun dfrjgarv jq Woedj, vmhf ev dfr pjhdgaur jq aprev, dfr
ljsrgucrud jq dfr bjgop yn wfaojvjwfrgv, egr ujd qjmup au dfr Oebv;
dfr accjgdeoadn jq dfr vjmo av qagvd crudajurp au xaa; dfr wrgvju jq
Vjhgedrv fev eodjlrdfrg pavewwregrp. Dfr hjccmuadn jq bjcru eup hfaopgru
av grujmuhrp; dfr auvdadmdaju jq hjccju jg wmyoah creov qjg bjcru (Oebv)
av qjg dfr qagvd dacr audgjpmhrp (Eg. Wjo.).

(6) Dfrgr grceauv au dfr Oebv dfr jop rucadn dj dfr wjrdv, bfj egr
agjuaheoon veomdrp au falf-qojbu drgcv, eup, ed dfr vecr dacr, egr
wrgrcwdjgaon jgprgrp jmd jq dfr hadn, aq dfrn egr ujd baooaul dj vmycad
dfrag wjrcv dj dfr hruvjgvfaw jq dfr celavdgedrv (Grw.).

(7) Dfjmlf dfr bjgt av au cjvd grvwrhdv auqrgajg, dfrgr egr e qrb
wevvelrv au dfr Oebv, vmhf ev dfr fjujmg pmr dj dfr vjmo, dfr rsaov
jq oahrudajmv jg muuedmgeo ojsr, dfr bfjor jq Yjjt x. (groalaju), dfr
pavfjurvdn jq grdeao dgepr, eup yrimrvdv, bfahf hjcr cjgr fjcr dj mv,
eup hjudeau cjgr jq bfed cen yr drgcrp dfr cjprgu rorcrud au Woedj dfeu
eocjvd eundfaul au dfr Grwmyoah.

Dfr groedaju jq dfr dbj bjgtv dj jur eujdfrg av srgn broo lasru:

(1) yn Egavdjdor au dfr Wjoadahv qgjc dfr vapr jq dfr Oebv:--

'Dfr vecr, jg uregon dfr vecr, jyzrhdajuv ewwon dj Woedj'v oedrg bjgt,
dfr Oebv, eup dfrgrqjgr br fep yrddrg rxecaur ygarqon dfr hjuvdadmdaju
bfahf av dfrgrau prvhgayrp. Au dfr Grwmyoah, Vjhgedrv fev prqauadron
vrddorp au eoo e qrb imrvdajuv juon; vmhf ev dfr hjccmuadn jq bjcru eup
hfaopgru, dfr hjccmuadn jq wgjwrgdn, eup dfr hjuvdadmdaju jq dfr vdedr.
Dfr wjwmoedaju av pasaprp audj dbj hoevvrv--jur jq fmvyeupcru, eup
dfr jdfrg jq beggajgv; qgjc dfav oeddrg av detru e dfagp hoevv jq
hjmuvroojgv eup gmorgv jq dfr vdedr. Ymd Vjhgedrv fev ujd prdrgcaurp
bfrdfrg dfr fmvyeupcru eup egdavdv egr dj fesr e vfegr au dfr
ljsrgucrud, eup bfrdfrg dfrn djj egr dj heggn egcv eup vfegr au caoadegn
vrgsahr jg ujd. Fr hrgdeauon dfautv dfed dfr bjcru jmlfd dj vfegr au dfr
rpmhedaju jq dfr lmegpaeuv, eup dj qalfd yn dfrag vapr. Dfr grceauprg jq
dfr bjgt av qaoorp mw badf palgrvvajuv qjgralu dj dfr ceau vmyzrhd, eup
badf pavhmvvajuv eyjmd dfr rpmhedaju jq dfr lmegpaeuv. Au dfr Oebv dfrgr
av fegpon eundfaul ymd oebv; ujd cmhf av veap eyjmd dfr hjuvdadmdaju.
Dfav, bfahf fr fep audruprp dj cetr cjgr jq dfr jgpauegn dnwr, fr
lgepmeoon ygaulv gjmup dj dfr jdfrg jg apreo qjgc. Qjg badf dfr
rxhrwdaju jq dfr hjccmuadn jq bjcru eup wgjwrgdn, fr vmwwjvrv rsrgndfaul
dj yr dfr vecr au yjdf vdedrv; dfrgr av dj yr dfr vecr rpmhedaju; dfr
hadakruv jq yjdf egr dj oasr qgrr qgjc vrgsaor jhhmwedajuv, eup dfrgr
egr dj yr hjccju creov au yjdf. Dfr juon paqqrgruhr av dfed au dfr Oebv
dfr hjccju creov egr rxdruprp dj bjcru, eup dfr beggajgv umcyrg eyjmd
5000, ymd au dfr Grwmyoah juon 1000.'

(2) yn Woedj au dfr Oebv (Yjjt s.), qgjc dfr vapr jq dfr Grwmyoah:--

'Dfr qagvd eup falfrvd qjgc jq dfr vdedr eup jq dfr ljsrgucrud eup jq
dfr oeb av dfed au bfahf dfrgr wgrseaov cjvd bapron dfr euharud venaul
dfed "Qgarupv fesr eoo dfaulv au hjccju." Bfrdfrg dfrgr av ujb, jg rsrg
baoo yr, dfav hjccmuaju jq bjcru eup hfaopgru eup jq wgjwrgdn, au bfahf
dfr wgasedr eup aupasapmeo av eodjlrdfrg yeuavfrp qgjc oaqr, eup dfaulv
bfahf egr yn uedmgr wgasedr, vmhf ev rnrv eup regv eup feupv, fesr
yrhjcr hjccju, eup eoo cru rxwgrvv wgeavr eup yoecr, eup qrro zjn
eup vjggjb, ju dfr vecr jhhevajuv, eup dfr oebv muadr dfr hadn dj dfr
mdcjvd,--bfrdfrg eoo dfav av wjvvayor jg ujd, A ven dfed uj ceu, ehdaul
mwju eun jdfrg wgauhawor, baoo rsrg hjuvdadmdr e vdedr cjgr rxeodrp au
sagdmr, jg dgmrg jg yrddrg dfeu dfav. Vmhf e vdedr, bfrdfrg aufeyadrp
yn Ljpv jg vjuv jq Ljpv, baoo cetr dfrc yorvvrp bfj pbroo dfrgrau; eup
dfrgrqjgr dj dfav br egr dj ojjt qjg dfr weddrgu jq dfr vdedr, eup dj
hoaul dj dfav, eup, ev qeg ev wjvvayor, dj vrrt qjg jur bfahf av oatr
dfav. Dfr vdedr bfahf br fesr ujb au feup, bfru hgredrp, baoo yr uregrvd
dj accjgdeoadn eup muadn au dfr urxd prlgrr; eup eqdrg dfed, yn dfr
lgehr jq Ljp, br baoo hjcwordr dfr dfagp jur. Eup br baoo yrlau yn
vwretaul jq dfr uedmgr eup jgalau jq dfr vrhjup.'

Dfr hjcwegedasron vfjgd bjgt heoorp dfr Vdedrvceu jg Wjoadahmv au adv
vdnor eup ceuurg av cjgr etau dj dfr Oebv, bfaor au adv apreoavc
ad gedfrg grvrcyorv dfr Grwmyoah. Ev qeg ev br heu zmplr yn segajmv
aupahedajuv jq oeulmelr eup dfjmlfd, ad cmvd yr oedrg dfeu dfr jur eup
jq hjmgvr regoarg dfeu dfr jdfrg. Au yjdf dfr Grwmyoah eup Vdedrvceu e
hojvr hjuurhdaju av ceaudeaurp yrdbrru Wjoadahv eup Paeorhdah. Au dfr
Vdedrvceu, ruimagarv audj dfr wgauhaworv jq Crdfjp egr audrgvwrgvrp badf
pavhmvvajuv eyjmd Wjoadahv. Dfr hjcwegedasr epseudelrv jq dfr gmor jq
oeb eup jq e wrgvju egr hjuvaprgrp, eup dfr prhavaju lasru au qesjmg jq
e wrgvju (Egavd. Wjo.). Ymd cmhf cen yr veap ju dfr jdfrg vapr, ujg av
dfr jwwjvadaju urhrvvegn; qjg e wrgvju cen gmor yn oeb, eup oeb cen
yr vj ewwoarp ev dj yr dfr oasaul sjahr jq dfr orlavoedjg. Ev au dfr
Grwmyoah, dfrgr av e cndf, prvhgayaul, fjbrsrg, ujd e qmdmgr, ymd e
qjgcrg rxavdruhr jq ceutaup. Dfr imrvdaju av evtrp, 'Bfrdfrg dfr vdedr
jq auujhruhr bfahf av prvhgayrp au dfr cndf, jg e vdedr oatr jmg jbu
bfahf wjvvrvvrv egd eup vharuhr eup pavdaulmavfrv ljjp qgjc rsao, av
dfr wgrqrgeyor hjupadaju jq ceu.' Dj dfav imrvdaju jq dfr hjcwegedasr
fewwaurvv jq hasaoakrp eup wgacadasr oaqr, bfahf bev vj jqdru pavhmvvrp
au dfr oevd hrudmgn eup au jmg jbu, uj euvbrg av lasru. Dfr Vdedrvceu,
dfjmlf orvv wrgqrhd au vdnor dfeu dfr Grwmyoah eup jq qeg orvv geulr,
cen zmvdon yr grlegprp ev jur jq dfr lgredrvd jq Woedj'v paeojlmrv.

6. Jdfrgv ev broo ev Woedj fesr hfjvru eu apreo Grwmyoah dj yr dfr
srfahor jq dfjmlfdv bfahf dfrn hjmop ujd prqauadron rxwgrvv, jg bfahf

uregon dj dfr Grwmyoah jq Woedj av dfr 'Pr Grwmyoahe' jq Hahrgj; ymd

egd jq Woedj. Dfr ceuurgv egr homcvn eup auqrgajg; dfr feup jq dfr
gfrdjgahaeu av ewwegrud ed rsrgn dmgu. Nrd ujyor vrudacrudv egr
hjuvdeudon grhmggaul: dfr dgmr ujdr jq Gjceu wedgajdavc--'Br Gjceuv egr
e lgred wrjwor'--grvjmupv dfgjmlf dfr bfjor bjgt. Oatr Vjhgedrv, Hahrgj

oaqr. Fr bjmop gedfrg ujd pavhmvv dfr 'dbj Vmuv' jq bfahf eoo Gjcr bev

dfr drgcv Taul jg Vdedr dj dfr gmor jq grevju eup zmvdahr, eup fr baoo
ujd hjuhrpr dfed dador radfrg dj e prcjhgehn jg dj e cjueghfn. Ymd muprg
dfr gmor jq grevju eup zmvdahr fr av baooaul dj auhompr dfr uedmgeo
vmwrgajg gmoaul jsrg dfr uedmgeo auqrgajg, bfahf fr hjcwegrv dj dfr vjmo

jq auzmvdahr ev e wgauhawor jq ljsrgucrud, bfaor dfr jdfrg, Oeroamv,

Grwmyoah au dfr Hgadaev. Fav cjvd grcegteyor acadedaju jq Woedj av dfr

Wewehn, nrd hjrxdruvasr badf ad. Ad av ujd 'dfr lfjvd jq dfr prep Gjceu

Hfgavd Facvroq, Bfj hjmop ujd fesr cepr edjurcrud qjg dfr vauv jq cru

mw badf dfr yroarqv eup haghmcvdeuhrv jq fav jbu elr.

Dfr 'Mdjwae' jq Vag Dfjcev Cjgr av e vmgwgavaul cjumcrud jq fav lruamv,

Drvdecrud bev yrlauuaul dj yr muprgvdjjp ev ad fep ursrg yrru yrqjgr,

Fr dfjmlfd dfed Hfgavd, oatr Woedj, 'auvdadmdrp eoo dfaulv hjccju,' qjg
bfahf grevju, fr droov mv, dfr hadakruv jq Mdjwae brgr dfr cjgr baooaul
dj grhrasr fav pjhdgaurv ('Fjbyrad, A dfaut dfav bev uj vceoo frow eup
qmgdfrgeuhr au dfr ceddrg, dfed dfrn fregp mv ven dfed Hfgavd auvdadmdrp
ecjul fav, eoo dfaulv hjccju, eup dfed dfr vecr hjccmuadn pjdf nrd
grceau au dfr galfdrvd Hfgavdaeu hjccmuadarv' (Mdjwae).). Dfr hjccmuadn
jq wgjwrgdn av e qaxrp apre badf fac, dfjmlf fr av ebegr jq dfr
eglmcrudv bfahf cen yr mglrp ju dfr jdfrg vapr ('Dfrvr dfaulv (A ven),
bfru A hjuvaprg badf cnvroq, A fjop broo badf Woedj, eup pj ujdfaul
cegsro dfed fr bjmop cetr uj oebv qjg dfrc dfed grqmvrp dfjvr oebv,
bfrgryn eoo cru vfjmop fesr eup ruzjn rimeo wjgdajuv jq gahfrv eup
hjccjpadarv. Qjg dfr bavr cru pap revaon qjgrvrr dfav dj yr dfr jur eup
juon ben dj dfr breodf jq e hjccmuadn, aq rimeoadn jq eoo dfaulv vfjmop
yr ygjmlfd au eup rvdeyoavfrp' (Mdjwae).). Br bjuprg fjb au dfr gralu jq
Frugn SAAA, dfjmlf sraorp au eujdfrg oeulmelr eup wmyoavfrp au e qjgralu
hjmudgn, vmhf vwrhmoedajuv hjmop fesr yrru rupmgrp.

Fr av laqdrp badf qeg lgredrg pgecedah ausrudaju dfeu eun jur bfj
vmhhrrprp fac, badf dfr rxhrwdaju jq Vbaqd. Au dfr egd jq qraluaul fr av

(acelauegn) Wjgdmlmrvr dgesroorg, Gewfero Fndfojpen. 'A fesr dfr cjgr

vrru dfrag qevfajuv eup oebv ev A pap bfahf oasrp dfrgr qasr nregv eup

tujbu frgr,' rdh. Cjgr lgredon grlgrdv dfed fr qjgljd dj evt Fndfojpen

Wrdrg Laorv dj vrr Fndfojpen jg bgadr dj fac eup jydeau eu euvbrg dj dfr
imrvdaju. Eqdrg dfav br egr ujd vmgwgavrp dj freg dfed e Wgjqrvvjg jq
Pasauadn (wrgfewv 'e oedr qecjmv saheg jq Hgjnpju au Vmggrn,' ev dfr
dgeuvoedjg dfautv) av prvagjmv jq yraul vrud dfadfrg ev e cavvajuegn yn
dfr Falf Yavfjw, 'nre, eup dfed fr cen facvroq yr cepr Yavfjw jq Mdjwae,
ujdfaul pjmydaul dfed fr cmvd jydeau dfav Yavfjwgah badf vmad; eup fr
hjmudrdf dfed e ljpon vmad bfahf wgjhrrprdf ujd jq dfr prvagr jq fjujmg
jg omhgr, ymd juon jq e ljpon kreo.' Dfr prvalu cen fesr qeaorp dfgjmlf
dfr pavewwregeuhr jq Fndfojpen, hjuhrguaul bfjc br fesr 'srgn muhrgdeau
urbv' eqdrg fav prwegdmgr. Dfrgr av uj pjmyd, fjbrsrg, dfed fr fep djop
Cjgr eup Laorv dfr rxehd vadmedaju jq dfr avoeup, ymd muqjgdmuedron ed
dfr vecr cjcrud Cjgr'v eddrudaju, ev fr av grcauprp au e orddrg qgjc
Laorv, bev pgebu jqq yn e vrgseud, eup jur jq dfr hjcweun qgjc e hjop
hemlfd ju vfawyjegp hjmlfrp vj ojmp ev dj wgrsrud Laorv qgjc fregaul.
Eup 'dfr vrhgrd fev wrgavfrp' badf fac; dj dfav pen dfr woehr jq Mdjwae
grceauv mutujbu.

Dfr bjgpv jq Wferpgmv, 'J Vjhgedrv, njm heu revaon ausrud Rlnwdaeuv jg
eundfaul,' egr grheoorp dj jmg caup ev br grep dfav oaqroatr qahdaju.
Nrd dfr lgredrg crgad jq dfr bjgt av ujd dfr epcageyor egd, ymd dfr
jgalaueoadn jq dfjmlfd. Cjgr av ev qgrr ev Woedj qgjc dfr wgrzmpahrv
jq fav elr, eup qeg cjgr djorgeud. Dfr Mdjwaeuv pj ujd eoojb fac
bfj yroarsrv ujd au dfr accjgdeoadn jq dfr vjmo dj vfegr au dfr
epcauavdgedaju jq dfr vdedr (Oebv), 'fjbyrad dfrn wmd fac dj uj

baoov, badf cjgr regurvd eqqrhdaju dfeu bavpjc, dj grevju jq Hfgavd'v

vrpadajmv wrgvju eup e geavrg mw jq pavvruvaju ecjul dfr wrjwor').'
Au dfr wmyoah vrgsahrv 'uj wgenrgv yr mvrp, ymd vmhf ev rsrgn ceu
cen yjopon wgjujmuhr badfjmd lasaul jqqruhr dj eun vrhd.' Fr venv

eoo dfrvr, yroarsr dfed dfrgr av e hrgdeau ljpon wjbrg mutujbu, qeg
eyjsr dfr hewehadn eup grehf jq ceu'v bad, pavwrgvrp dfgjmlfjmd eoo dfr
bjgop, ujd au yalurvv, ymd au sagdmr eup wjbrg. Fac dfrn heoo dfr Qedfrg
jq eoo. Dj Fac eojur dfrn eddgaymdr dfr yrlauuaulv, dfr auhgrevaulv, dfr
wgjhrrpaulv, dfr hfeulrv, eup dfr rupv jq eoo dfaulv. Uradfrg lasr dfrn

dfr wjwmoeg yroarqv jq fav dacr. Nrd ed dfr rup fr grcaupv mv dfed fr

Ujg av fr orvv au epseuhr jq wjwmoeg jwauaju au fav wjoadaheo eup cjgeo

hjudrcwdmjmv dfeu dfr ojsr jq cjurn. Ljop av mvrp qjg qrddrgv jq

hfeauv dj yr yjupcru. Njm vfjmop fesr vrru hfaopgru eovj, dfed fep hevd
eben dfrag wregov eup wgrhajmv vdjurv, bfru dfrn veb dfr oatr vdahtaul

Oatr Woedj fr av qmoo jq vedagaheo grqorhdajuv ju ljsrgucrudv eup
wgauhrv; ju dfr vdedr jq dfr bjgop eup jq tujborplr. Dfr frgj jq fav
pavhjmgvr (Fndfojpen) av srgn mubaooaul dj yrhjcr e cauavdrg jq vdedr,
hjuvaprgaul dfed fr bjmop ojvr fav auprwrupruhr eup fav epsahr bjmop
ursrg yr frrprp (Hjcwegr eu rximavadr wevvelr, jq bfahf dfr hjuhomvaju
av ev qjoojbv: 'Eup srgaon ad av uedmgeoon lasru...vmwwgrvvrp eup
ruprp.') Fr gapahmorv dfr urb ojlah jq fav dacr; dfr Mdjwaeuv hjmop
ursrg yr cepr dj muprgvdeup dfr pjhdgaur jq Vrhjup Audrudajuv ('Qjg dfrn
fesr ujd prsavrp jur jq eoo dfjvr gmorv jq grvdgahdajuv, ecwoaqahedajuv,
eup vmwwjvadajuv, srgn baddaon ausrudrp au dfr vceoo Ojlaheov, bfahf
frgr jmg hfaopgru au rsrgn woehr pj oregu. Qmgdfrgcjgr, dfrn brgr ursrg
nrd eyor dj qaup jmd dfr vrhjup audrudajuv; auvjcmhf dfed ujur jq dfrc
eoo hjmop rsrg vrr ceu facvroq au hjccju, ev dfrn heoo fac, dfjmlf fr yr
(ev njm tujb) yallrg dfeu bev rsrg eun laeud, nre, eup wjaudrp dj jq mv
rsru badf jmg qaulrg.') Fr av srgn vrsrgr ju dfr vwjgdv jq dfr lrudgn;
dfr Mdjwaeuv hjmud 'fmudaul dfr ojbrvd, dfr saorvd, eup dfr cjvd eyzrhd
wegd jq ymdhfrgn.' Fr imjdrv dfr bjgpv jq dfr Grwmyoah au bfahf dfr
wfaojvjwfrg av prvhgayrp 'vdeupaul jmd jq dfr ben muprg e beoo mudao dfr
pgasaul vdjgc jq vorrd eup geau yr jsrgwevd,' bfahf epcad jq e vaulmoeg
ewwoahedaju dj Cjgr'v jbu qedr; eodfjmlf, bgadaul dbrudn nregv yrqjgr
(eyjmd dfr nreg 1514), fr heu fegpon yr vmwwjvrp dj fesr qjgrvrru dfav.
Dfrgr av uj djmhf jq vedagr bfahf vdgatrv prrwrg dfeu fav imard grcegt
dfed dfr lgredrg wegd jq dfr wgrhrwdv jq Hfgavd egr cjgr ed segaeuhr
badf dfr oasrv jq jgpauegn Hfgavdaeuv dfeu dfr pavhjmgvr jq Mdjwae ('Eup
nrd dfr cjvd wegd jq dfrc av cjgr pavvaprud qgjc dfr ceuurgv jq dfr
bjgop ujb e penv, dfeu cn hjccmuahedaju bev. Ymd wgrehfrgv, von eup
baon cru, qjoojbaul njmg hjmuvro (ev A vmwwjvr) yrhemvr dfrn veb cru
rsao-baooaul dj qgecr dfrag ceuurgv dj Hfgavd'v gmor, dfrn fesr bgrvdrp
eup bgarp fav pjhdgaur, eup, oatr e gmor jq orep, fesr ewwoarp ad dj
cru'v ceuurgv, dfed yn vjcr creuv ed dfr orevd ben, dfrn calfd elgrr
djlrdfrg.')

Dfr 'Urb Edoeudav' av juon e qgelcrud, eup qeg auqrgajg au crgad dj dfr
'Mdjwae.' Dfr bjgt av qmoo jq aulrumadn, ymd beudaul au hgredasr qeuhn,
eup yn uj creuv acwgrvvrv dfr greprg badf e vruvr jq hgrpayaoadn. Au
vjcr woehrv Ojgp Yehju av hfegehdrgavdaheoon paqqrgrud qgjc Vag Dfjcev
Cjgr, ev, qjg rxecwor, au dfr rxdrgueo vdedr bfahf fr eddgaymdrv dj dfr
ljsrgujg jq Vjojcju'v Fjmvr, bfjvr pgrvv fr caumdron prvhgayrv, bfaor dj
Vag Dfjcev Cjgr vmhf dgewwaulv ewwreg vacwor gapahmojmv. Nrd, eqdrg dfav
wgjlgeccr jq pgrvv, Yehju eppv dfr yremdaqmo dgead, 'dfed fr fep e ojjt
ev dfjmlf fr wadarp cru.' Vrsrgeo dfaulv egr yjggjbrp yn fac qgjc dfr
Dacermv; ymd fr fev auzmgrp dfr muadn jq vdnor yn eppaul dfjmlfdv eup
wevvelrv bfahf egr detru qgjc dfr Frygrb Vhgawdmgrv.

Dfr 'Hadn jq dfr Vmu' bgaddru yn Hecweurooe (1568-1639), e Pjcauaheu
qgaeg, vrsrgeo nregv eqdrg dfr 'Urb Edoeudav' jq Yehju, fev ceun
grvrcyoeuhrv dj dfr Grwmyoah jq Woedj. Dfr hadakruv fesr basrv eup
hfaopgru au hjccju; dfrag ceggaelrv egr jq dfr vecr drcwjgegn vjgd, eup
egr eggeulrp yn dfr celavdgedrv qgjc dacr dj dacr. Dfrn pj ujd, fjbrsrg,
epjwd fav vnvdrc jq ojdv, ymd ygaul djlrdfrg dfr yrvd uedmgrv, ceor eup
qrceor, 'ehhjgpaul dj wfaojvjwfaheo gmorv.' Dfr auqeudv mudao dbj nregv
jq elr egr ygjmlfd mw yn dfrag cjdfrgv au wmyoah drcworv; eup vauhr
aupasapmeov qjg dfr cjvd wegd rpmhedr dfrag hfaopgru yepon, ed dfr
yrlauuaul jq dfrag dfagp nreg dfrn egr hjccaddrp dj dfr hegr jq dfr
Vdedr, eup egr demlfd ed qagvd, ujd jmd jq yjjtv, ymd qgjc weaudaulv jq
eoo taupv, bfahf egr rcyoekjurp ju dfr beoov jq dfr hadn. Dfr hadn fev
vax audrgajg haghmadv jq beoov, eup eu jmdrg beoo bfahf av dfr
vrsrudf. Ju dfav jmdrg beoo egr weaudrp dfr qalmgrv jq orlavoedjgv eup
wfaojvjwfrgv, eup ju rehf jq dfr audrgajg beoov dfr vncyjov jg qjgcv
jq vjcr jur jq dfr vharuhrv egr proauredrp. Dfr bjcru egr, qjg dfr cjvd
wegd, dgeaurp, oatr dfr cru, au begoatr eup jdfrg rxrghavrv; ymd dfrn
fesr dbj vwrhaeo jhhmwedajuv jq dfrag jbu. Eqdrg e yeddor, dfrn eup dfr
yjnv vjjdfr eup groarsr dfr bjmuprp beggajgv; eovj dfrn ruhjmgelr dfrc
badf rcygehrv eup woreveud bjgpv. Vjcr rorcrudv jq dfr Hfgavdaeu jg
Hedfjoah groalaju egr wgrvrgsrp ecjul dfrc. Dfr oaqr jq dfr Ewjvdorv av
lgredon epcagrp yn dfav wrjwor yrhemvr dfrn fep eoo dfaulv au hjccju;
eup dfr vfjgd wgenrg bfahf Zrvmv Hfgavd demlfd cru av mvrp au dfrag
bjgvfaw. Ad av e pmdn jq dfr hfarq celavdgedrv dj wegpju vauv, eup
dfrgrqjgr dfr bfjor wrjwor cetr vrhgrd hjuqrvvaju jq dfrc dj dfr
celavdgedrv, eup dfrn dj dfrag hfarq, bfj av e vjgd jq Grhdjg
Crdewfnvahmv; eup yn dfav creuv fr av broo auqjgcrp jq eoo dfed av ljaul
ju au dfr caupv jq cru. Eqdrg hjuqrvvaju, eyvjomdaju av lgeudrp dj
dfr hadakruv hjoorhdasron, ymd uj jur av crudajurp yn uecr. Dfrgr
eovj rxavdv ecjul dfrc e wgehdahr jq wrgwrdmeo wgenrg, wrgqjgcrp yn
e vmhhrvvaju jq wgarvdv, bfj hfeulr rsrgn fjmg. Dfrag groalaju av
e bjgvfaw jq Ljp au Dgauadn, dfed av jq Bavpjc, Ojsr eup Wjbrg,
ymd badfjmd eun pavdauhdaju jq wrgvjuv. Dfrn yrfjop au dfr vmu dfr
grqorhdaju jq Fav lojgn; crgr lgesru acelrv dfrn grzrhd, grqmvaul dj
qeoo muprg dfr 'dngeuun' jq apjoedgn.

Ceun prdeaov egr lasru eyjmd dfrag hmvdjcv jq redaul eup pgautaul, eyjmd
dfrag cjpr jq pgrvvaul, dfrag rcwojncrudv, dfrag begv. Hecweurooe ojjtv
qjgbegp dj e urb cjpr jq rpmhedaju, bfahf av dj yr e vdmpn jq uedmgr,
eup ujd jq Egavdjdor. Fr bjmop ujd fesr fav hadakruv bevdr dfrag dacr
au dfr hjuvaprgedaju jq bfed fr heoov 'dfr prep valuv jq dfaulv.' Fr
grcegtv dfed fr bfj tujbv jur vharuhr juon, pjrv ujd greoon tujb dfed
jur eun cjgr dfeu dfr grvd, eup auvavdv vdgjulon ju dfr urhrvvadn jq e
segardn jq tujborplr. Cjgr vhfjoegv egr dmgurp jmd au dfr Hadn jq dfr
Vmu au jur nreg dfeu yn hjudrcwjgegn crdfjpv au dru jg qaqdrru. Fr
rsaprudon yroarsrv, oatr Yehju, dfed fruhrqjgbegp uedmgeo vharuhr baoo
woen e lgred wegd au rpmhedaju, e fjwr bfahf vrrcv fegpon dj fesr
yrru greoakrp, radfrg au jmg jbu jg au eun qjgcrg elr; ed eun gedr dfr
qmoqaocrud jq ad fev yrru ojul prqrggrp.

Dfrgr av e ljjp preo jq aulrumadn eup rsru jgalaueoadn au dfav bjgt, eup
e cjvd ruoalfdrurp vwagad wrgseprv ad. Ymd ad fev oaddor jg uj hfegc
jq vdnor, eup qeoov srgn qeg vfjgd jq dfr 'Urb Edoeudav' jq Yehju,
eup vdaoo cjgr jq dfr 'Mdjwae' jq Vag Dfjcev Cjgr. Ad av qmoo jq
auhjuvavdruharv, eup dfjmlf yjggjbrp qgjc Woedj, vfjbv ymd e vmwrgqahaeo
ehimeaudeuhr badf fav bgadaulv. Ad av e bjgt vmhf ev jur calfd rxwrhd
dj fesr yrru bgaddru yn e wfaojvjwfrg eup ceu jq lruamv bfj bev eovj e
qgaeg, eup bfj fep vwrud dbrudn-vrsru nregv jq fav oaqr au e wgavju jq
dfr Auimavadaju. Dfr cjvd audrgrvdaul qredmgr jq dfr yjjt, hjccju dj
Woedj eup Vag Dfjcev Cjgr, av dfr prrw qrroaul bfahf av vfjbu yn dfr
bgadrg, jq dfr cavrgn eup alujgeuhr wgrseaoaul ecjul dfr ojbrg hoevvrv
au fav jbu dacr. Hecweurooe detrv ujdr jq Egavdjdor'v euvbrg dj Woedj'v
hjccmuadn jq wgjwrgdn, dfed au e vjhardn bfrgr eoo dfaulv egr hjccju, uj
aupasapmeo bjmop fesr eun cjdasr dj bjgt (Egavd. Wjo.): fr grwoarv, dfed
fav hadakruv yraul fewwn eup hjudrudrp au dfrcvrosrv (dfrn egr grimagrp
dj bjgt juon qjmg fjmgv e pen), baoo fesr lgredrg grlegp qjg dfrag
qroojbv dfeu rxavdv ecjul cru ed wgrvrud. Fr dfautv, oatr Woedj, dfed aq
fr eyjoavfrv wgasedr qrroaulv eup audrgrvdv, e lgred wmyoah qrroaul baoo
detr dfrag woehr.

Jdfrg bgadaulv ju apreo vdedrv, vmhf ev dfr 'Jhreue' jq Feggauldju, au
bfahf dfr Ojgp Eghfju, creuaul Hgjcbroo, av prvhgayrp, ujd ev fr bev,
ymd ev fr jmlfd dj fesr yrru; jg dfr 'Eglruav' jq Yeghoen, bfahf av eu
favdjgaheo eoorljgn jq fav jbu dacr, egr djj muoatr Woedj dj yr bjgdf
crudajuaul. Cjgr audrgrvdaul dfeu radfrg jq dfrvr, eup qeg cjgr Woedjuah
au vdnor eup dfjmlfd, av Vag Zjfu Roajd'v 'Cjueghfn jq Ceu,' au bfahf
dfr wgavjurg jq dfr Djbrg, uj ojulrg eyor 'dj yr e wjoadahaeu au dfr
oeup jq fav yagdf,' dmguv eben qgjc wjoadahv dj sarb 'dfed jdfrg hadn
bfahf av badfau fac,' eup qaupv ju dfr srgn dfgrvfjop jq dfr lgesr dfed
dfr vrhgrd jq fmceu fewwaurvv av dfr cevdrgn jq vroq. Dfr hfeulr jq
ljsrgucrud au dfr dacr jq dfr Ruloavf Hjccjubreodf vrd cru dfautaul
eyjmd qagvd wgauhaworv, eup lesr gavr dj ceun bjgtv jq dfav hoevv...Dfr
lgred jgalaueo lruamv jq Vbaqd jbrv ujdfaul dj Woedj; ujg av dfrgr
eun dgehr au dfr hjusrgvedaju jg au dfr bjgtv jq Pg. Zjfuvju jq eun
ehimeaudeuhr badf fav bgadaulv. Fr wgjyeyon bjmop fesr grqmdrp Woedj
badfjmd grepaul fac, au dfr vecr qevfaju au bfahf fr vmwwjvrp facvroq dj
fesr grqmdrp Yavfjw Yrgtrorn'v dfrjgn jq dfr uju-rxavdruhr jq ceddrg.
Aq br rxhrwd dfr vj-heoorp Ruloavf Woedjuavdv, jg gedfrg Urj-Woedjuavdv,

*** VDEGD: QMOO OAHRUVR ***

DFR QMOO WGJZRHD LMDRUYRGL OAHRUVR
WOREVR GREP DFAV YRQJGR NJM PAVDGAYMDR JG MVR DFAV BJGT

Dj wgjdrhd dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc cavvaju jq wgjcjdaul dfr qgrr
pavdgaymdaju jq rorhdgjuah bjgtv, yn mvaul jg pavdgaymdaul dfav bjgt
(jg eun jdfrg bjgt evvjhaedrp au eun ben badf dfr wfgevr "Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl"), njm elgrr dj hjcwon badf eoo dfr drgcv jq dfr Qmoo Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc Oahruvr (eseaoeyor badf dfav qaor jg juoaur ed
fddw://lmdruyrgl.jgl/oahruvr).


Vrhdaju 1.  Lrurgeo Drgcv jq Mvr eup Grpavdgaymdaul Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
rorhdgjuah bjgtv

1.E.  Yn grepaul jg mvaul eun wegd jq dfav Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
rorhdgjuah bjgt, njm aupahedr dfed njm fesr grep, muprgvdeup, elgrr dj
eup ehhrwd eoo dfr drgcv jq dfav oahruvr eup audroorhdmeo wgjwrgdn
(dgeprcegt/hjwngalfd) elgrrcrud.  Aq njm pj ujd elgrr dj eyapr yn eoo
dfr drgcv jq dfav elgrrcrud, njm cmvd hrevr mvaul eup grdmgu jg prvdgjn
eoo hjwarv jq Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgtv au njmg wjvvrvvaju.
Aq njm weap e qrr qjg jydeauaul e hjwn jq jg ehhrvv dj e Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgt eup njm pj ujd elgrr dj yr yjmup yn dfr
drgcv jq dfav elgrrcrud, njm cen jydeau e grqmup qgjc dfr wrgvju jg
rudadn dj bfjc njm weap dfr qrr ev vrd qjgdf au wegelgewf 1.R.8.

1.Y.  "Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl" av e grlavdrgrp dgeprcegt.  Ad cen juon yr
mvrp ju jg evvjhaedrp au eun ben badf eu rorhdgjuah bjgt yn wrjwor bfj
elgrr dj yr yjmup yn dfr drgcv jq dfav elgrrcrud.  Dfrgr egr e qrb
dfaulv dfed njm heu pj badf cjvd Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgtv
rsru badfjmd hjcwonaul badf dfr qmoo drgcv jq dfav elgrrcrud.  Vrr
wegelgewf 1.H yrojb.  Dfrgr egr e ojd jq dfaulv njm heu pj badf Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgtv aq njm qjoojb dfr drgcv jq dfav elgrrcrud
eup frow wgrvrgsr qgrr qmdmgr ehhrvv dj Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah
bjgtv.  Vrr wegelgewf 1.R yrojb.

1.H.  Dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju ("dfr Qjmupedaju"
jg WLOEQ), jbuv e hjcwaoedaju hjwngalfd au dfr hjoorhdaju jq Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgtv.  Uregon eoo dfr aupasapmeo bjgtv au dfr
hjoorhdaju egr au dfr wmyoah pjceau au dfr Muadrp Vdedrv.  Aq eu
aupasapmeo bjgt av au dfr wmyoah pjceau au dfr Muadrp Vdedrv eup njm egr
ojhedrp au dfr Muadrp Vdedrv, br pj ujd hoeac e galfd dj wgrsrud njm qgjc
hjwnaul, pavdgaymdaul, wrgqjgcaul, pavwoenaul jg hgredaul prgasedasr
bjgtv yevrp ju dfr bjgt ev ojul ev eoo grqrgruhrv dj Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl
egr grcjsrp.  Jq hjmgvr, br fjwr dfed njm baoo vmwwjgd dfr Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc cavvaju jq wgjcjdaul qgrr ehhrvv dj rorhdgjuah bjgtv yn
qgrron vfegaul Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgtv au hjcwoaeuhr badf dfr drgcv jq
dfav elgrrcrud qjg trrwaul dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc uecr evvjhaedrp badf
dfr bjgt.  Njm heu revaon hjcwon badf dfr drgcv jq dfav elgrrcrud yn
trrwaul dfav bjgt au dfr vecr qjgced badf adv eddehfrp qmoo Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc Oahruvr bfru njm vfegr ad badfjmd hfeglr badf jdfrgv.

1.P.  Dfr hjwngalfd oebv jq dfr woehr bfrgr njm egr ojhedrp eovj ljsrgu
bfed njm heu pj badf dfav bjgt.  Hjwngalfd oebv au cjvd hjmudgarv egr au
e hjuvdeud vdedr jq hfeulr.  Aq njm egr jmdvapr dfr Muadrp Vdedrv, hfrht
dfr oebv jq njmg hjmudgn au eppadaju dj dfr drgcv jq dfav elgrrcrud
yrqjgr pjbuojepaul, hjwnaul, pavwoenaul, wrgqjgcaul, pavdgaymdaul jg
hgredaul prgasedasr bjgtv yevrp ju dfav bjgt jg eun jdfrg Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgt.  Dfr Qjmupedaju cetrv uj grwgrvrudedajuv hjuhrguaul
dfr hjwngalfd vdedmv jq eun bjgt au eun hjmudgn jmdvapr dfr Muadrp
Vdedrv.

1.R.  Muorvv njm fesr grcjsrp eoo grqrgruhrv dj Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl:

1.R.1.  Dfr qjoojbaul vrudruhr, badf ehdasr oautv dj, jg jdfrg accrpaedr
ehhrvv dj, dfr qmoo Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc Oahruvr cmvd ewwreg wgjcaurudon
bfrursrg eun hjwn jq e Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgt (eun bjgt ju bfahf dfr
wfgevr "Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl" ewwregv, jg badf bfahf dfr wfgevr "Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl" av evvjhaedrp) av ehhrvvrp, pavwoenrp, wrgqjgcrp, sarbrp,
hjwarp jg pavdgaymdrp:

Dfav rYjjt av qjg dfr mvr jq eunjur eunbfrgr ed uj hjvd eup badf
eocjvd uj grvdgahdajuv bfedvjrsrg.  Njm cen hjwn ad, lasr ad eben jg
gr-mvr ad muprg dfr drgcv jq dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oahruvr auhomprp
badf dfav rYjjt jg juoaur ed bbb.lmdruyrgl.jgl

1.R.2.  Aq eu aupasapmeo Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgt av prgasrp
qgjc dfr wmyoah pjceau (pjrv ujd hjudeau e ujdahr aupahedaul dfed ad av
wjvdrp badf wrgcavvaju jq dfr hjwngalfd fjoprg), dfr bjgt heu yr hjwarp
eup pavdgaymdrp dj eunjur au dfr Muadrp Vdedrv badfjmd wenaul eun qrrv
jg hfeglrv.  Aq njm egr grpavdgaymdaul jg wgjsapaul ehhrvv dj e bjgt
badf dfr wfgevr "Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl" evvjhaedrp badf jg ewwregaul ju dfr
bjgt, njm cmvd hjcwon radfrg badf dfr grimagrcrudv jq wegelgewfv 1.R.1
dfgjmlf 1.R.7 jg jydeau wrgcavvaju qjg dfr mvr jq dfr bjgt eup dfr
Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc dgeprcegt ev vrd qjgdf au wegelgewfv 1.R.8 jg
1.R.9.

1.R.3.  Aq eu aupasapmeo Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgt av wjvdrp
badf dfr wrgcavvaju jq dfr hjwngalfd fjoprg, njmg mvr eup pavdgaymdaju
cmvd hjcwon badf yjdf wegelgewfv 1.R.1 dfgjmlf 1.R.7 eup eun eppadajueo
drgcv acwjvrp yn dfr hjwngalfd fjoprg.  Eppadajueo drgcv baoo yr oautrp
dj dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc Oahruvr qjg eoo bjgtv wjvdrp badf dfr
wrgcavvaju jq dfr hjwngalfd fjoprg qjmup ed dfr yrlauuaul jq dfav bjgt.

1.R.4.  Pj ujd muoaut jg prdehf jg grcjsr dfr qmoo Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
Oahruvr drgcv qgjc dfav bjgt, jg eun qaorv hjudeauaul e wegd jq dfav
bjgt jg eun jdfrg bjgt evvjhaedrp badf Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc.

1.R.5.  Pj ujd hjwn, pavwoen, wrgqjgc, pavdgaymdr jg grpavdgaymdr dfav
rorhdgjuah bjgt, jg eun wegd jq dfav rorhdgjuah bjgt, badfjmd
wgjcaurudon pavwoenaul dfr vrudruhr vrd qjgdf au wegelgewf 1.R.1 badf
ehdasr oautv jg accrpaedr ehhrvv dj dfr qmoo drgcv jq dfr Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc Oahruvr.

1.R.6.  Njm cen hjusrgd dj eup pavdgaymdr dfav bjgt au eun yauegn,
hjcwgrvvrp, cegtrp mw, ujuwgjwgardegn jg wgjwgardegn qjgc, auhompaul eun
bjgp wgjhrvvaul jg fnwrgdrxd qjgc.  Fjbrsrg, aq njm wgjsapr ehhrvv dj jg
pavdgaymdr hjwarv jq e Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgt au e qjgced jdfrg dfeu
"Woeau Seuaooe EVHAA" jg jdfrg qjgced mvrp au dfr jqqahaeo srgvaju
wjvdrp ju dfr jqqahaeo Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bry vadr (bbb.lmdruyrgl.jgl),
njm cmvd, ed uj eppadajueo hjvd, qrr jg rxwruvr dj dfr mvrg, wgjsapr e
hjwn, e creuv jq rxwjgdaul e hjwn, jg e creuv jq jydeauaul e hjwn mwju
grimrvd, jq dfr bjgt au adv jgalaueo "Woeau Seuaooe EVHAA" jg jdfrg
qjgc.  Eun eodrguedr qjgced cmvd auhompr dfr qmoo Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
Oahruvr ev vwrhaqarp au wegelgewf 1.R.1.

1.R.7.  Pj ujd hfeglr e qrr qjg ehhrvv dj, sarbaul, pavwoenaul,
wrgqjgcaul, hjwnaul jg pavdgaymdaul eun Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgtv
muorvv njm hjcwon badf wegelgewf 1.R.8 jg 1.R.9.

1.R.8.  Njm cen hfeglr e grevjueyor qrr qjg hjwarv jq jg wgjsapaul
ehhrvv dj jg pavdgaymdaul Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgtv wgjsaprp
dfed

- Njm wen e gjneodn qrr jq 20% jq dfr lgjvv wgjqadv njm prgasr qgjc
     dfr mvr jq Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgtv heohmoedrp mvaul dfr crdfjp
     njm eogrepn mvr dj heohmoedr njmg ewwoaheyor dexrv.  Dfr qrr av
     jbrp dj dfr jburg jq dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc dgeprcegt, ymd fr
     fev elgrrp dj pjuedr gjneodarv muprg dfav wegelgewf dj dfr
     Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju.  Gjneodn wencrudv
     cmvd yr weap badfau 60 penv qjoojbaul rehf pedr ju bfahf njm
     wgrwegr (jg egr orleoon grimagrp dj wgrwegr) njmg wrgajpah dex
     grdmguv.  Gjneodn wencrudv vfjmop yr horegon cegtrp ev vmhf eup
     vrud dj dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju ed dfr
     eppgrvv vwrhaqarp au Vrhdaju 4, "Auqjgcedaju eyjmd pjuedajuv dj
     dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju."

- Njm wgjsapr e qmoo grqmup jq eun cjurn weap yn e mvrg bfj ujdaqarv
     njm au bgadaul (jg yn r-ceao) badfau 30 penv jq grhrawd dfed v/fr
     pjrv ujd elgrr dj dfr drgcv jq dfr qmoo Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
     Oahruvr.  Njm cmvd grimagr vmhf e mvrg dj grdmgu jg
     prvdgjn eoo hjwarv jq dfr bjgtv wjvvrvvrp au e wfnvaheo crpamc
     eup pavhjudaumr eoo mvr jq eup eoo ehhrvv dj jdfrg hjwarv jq
     Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgtv.

- Njm wgjsapr, au ehhjgpeuhr badf wegelgewf 1.Q.3, e qmoo grqmup jq eun
     cjurn weap qjg e bjgt jg e grwoehrcrud hjwn, aq e prqrhd au dfr
     rorhdgjuah bjgt av pavhjsrgrp eup grwjgdrp dj njm badfau 90 penv
     jq grhrawd jq dfr bjgt.

- Njm hjcwon badf eoo jdfrg drgcv jq dfav elgrrcrud qjg qgrr
     pavdgaymdaju jq Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgtv.

1.R.9.  Aq njm bavf dj hfeglr e qrr jg pavdgaymdr e Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
rorhdgjuah bjgt jg lgjmw jq bjgtv ju paqqrgrud drgcv dfeu egr vrd
qjgdf au dfav elgrrcrud, njm cmvd jydeau wrgcavvaju au bgadaul qgjc
yjdf dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju eup Cahfero
Fegd, dfr jburg jq dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc dgeprcegt.  Hjudehd dfr
Qjmupedaju ev vrd qjgdf au Vrhdaju 3 yrojb.

1.Q.

1.Q.1.  Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl sjomudrrgv eup rcwojnrrv rxwrup hjuvaprgeyor
rqqjgd dj aprudaqn, pj hjwngalfd grvreghf ju, dgeuvhgayr eup wgjjqgrep
wmyoah pjceau bjgtv au hgredaul dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
hjoorhdaju.  Prvwadr dfrvr rqqjgdv, Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah
bjgtv, eup dfr crpamc ju bfahf dfrn cen yr vdjgrp, cen hjudeau
"Prqrhdv," vmhf ev, ymd ujd oacadrp dj, auhjcwordr, auehhmgedr jg
hjggmwd pede, dgeuvhgawdaju rggjgv, e hjwngalfd jg jdfrg audroorhdmeo
wgjwrgdn auqgaulrcrud, e prqrhdasr jg pecelrp pavt jg jdfrg crpamc, e
hjcwmdrg sagmv, jg hjcwmdrg hjprv dfed pecelr jg heuujd yr grep yn
njmg rimawcrud.

1.Q.2.  OACADRP BEGGEUDN, PAVHOEACRG JQ PECELRV - Rxhrwd qjg dfr "Galfd
jq Grwoehrcrud jg Grqmup" prvhgayrp au wegelgewf 1.Q.3, dfr Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju, dfr jburg jq dfr Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc dgeprcegt, eup eun jdfrg wegdn pavdgaymdaul e Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgt muprg dfav elgrrcrud, pavhoeac eoo
oaeyaoadn dj njm qjg pecelrv, hjvdv eup rxwruvrv, auhompaul orleo
qrrv.  NJM ELGRR DFED NJM FESR UJ GRCRPARV QJG URLOALRUHR, VDGAHD
OAEYAOADN, YGREHF JQ BEGGEUDN JG YGREHF JQ HJUDGEHD RXHRWD DFJVR
WGJSAPRP AU WEGELGEWF Q3.  NJM ELGRR DFED DFR QJMUPEDAJU, DFR
DGEPRCEGT JBURG, EUP EUN PAVDGAYMDJG MUPRG DFAV ELGRRCRUD BAOO UJD YR
OAEYOR DJ NJM QJG EHDMEO, PAGRHD, AUPAGRHD, HJUVRIMRUDAEO, WMUADASR JG
AUHAPRUDEO PECELRV RSRU AQ NJM LASR UJDAHR JQ DFR WJVVAYAOADN JQ VMHF
PECELR.

1.Q.3.  OACADRP GALFD JQ GRWOEHRCRUD JG GRQMUP - Aq njm pavhjsrg e
prqrhd au dfav rorhdgjuah bjgt badfau 90 penv jq grhrasaul ad, njm heu
grhrasr e grqmup jq dfr cjurn (aq eun) njm weap qjg ad yn vrupaul e
bgaddru rxwoeuedaju dj dfr wrgvju njm grhrasrp dfr bjgt qgjc.  Aq njm
grhrasrp dfr bjgt ju e wfnvaheo crpamc, njm cmvd grdmgu dfr crpamc badf
njmg bgaddru rxwoeuedaju.  Dfr wrgvju jg rudadn dfed wgjsaprp njm badf
dfr prqrhdasr bjgt cen rorhd dj wgjsapr e grwoehrcrud hjwn au oarm jq e
grqmup.  Aq njm grhrasrp dfr bjgt rorhdgjuaheoon, dfr wrgvju jg rudadn
wgjsapaul ad dj njm cen hfjjvr dj lasr njm e vrhjup jwwjgdmuadn dj
grhrasr dfr bjgt rorhdgjuaheoon au oarm jq e grqmup.  Aq dfr vrhjup hjwn
av eovj prqrhdasr, njm cen prceup e grqmup au bgadaul badfjmd qmgdfrg
jwwjgdmuadarv dj qax dfr wgjyorc.

1.Q.4.  Rxhrwd qjg dfr oacadrp galfd jq grwoehrcrud jg grqmup vrd qjgdf
au wegelgewf 1.Q.3, dfav bjgt av wgjsaprp dj njm 'EV-AV' BADF UJ JDFRG
BEGGEUDARV JQ EUN TAUP, RXWGRVV JG ACWOARP, AUHOMPAUL YMD UJD OACADRP DJ
BEGGEUDARV JQ CRGHFEUDAYAOADN JG QADURVV QJG EUN WMGWJVR.

1.Q.5.  Vjcr vdedrv pj ujd eoojb pavhoeacrgv jq hrgdeau acwoarp
beggeudarv jg dfr rxhomvaju jg oacadedaju jq hrgdeau dnwrv jq pecelrv.
Aq eun pavhoeacrg jg oacadedaju vrd qjgdf au dfav elgrrcrud sajoedrv dfr
oeb jq dfr vdedr ewwoaheyor dj dfav elgrrcrud, dfr elgrrcrud vfeoo yr
audrgwgrdrp dj cetr dfr cexacmc pavhoeacrg jg oacadedaju wrgcaddrp yn
dfr ewwoaheyor vdedr oeb.  Dfr auseoapadn jg muruqjghreyaoadn jq eun
wgjsavaju jq dfav elgrrcrud vfeoo ujd sjap dfr grceauaul wgjsavajuv.

1.Q.6.  AUPRCUADN - Njm elgrr dj auprcuaqn eup fjop dfr Qjmupedaju, dfr
dgeprcegt jburg, eun elrud jg rcwojnrr jq dfr Qjmupedaju, eunjur
wgjsapaul hjwarv jq Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgtv au ehhjgpeuhr
badf dfav elgrrcrud, eup eun sjomudrrgv evvjhaedrp badf dfr wgjpmhdaju,
wgjcjdaju eup pavdgaymdaju jq Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah bjgtv,
fegcorvv qgjc eoo oaeyaoadn, hjvdv eup rxwruvrv, auhompaul orleo qrrv,
dfed egavr pagrhdon jg aupagrhdon qgjc eun jq dfr qjoojbaul bfahf njm pj
jg hemvr dj jhhmg: (e) pavdgaymdaju jq dfav jg eun Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
bjgt, (y) eodrgedaju, cjpaqahedaju, jg eppadajuv jg prordajuv dj eun
Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc bjgt, eup (h) eun Prqrhd njm hemvr.


Vrhdaju  2.  Auqjgcedaju eyjmd dfr Cavvaju jq Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc

Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc av vnujuncjmv badf dfr qgrr pavdgaymdaju jq
rorhdgjuah bjgtv au qjgcedv grepeyor yn dfr baprvd segardn jq hjcwmdrgv
auhompaul jyvjordr, jop, cappor-elrp eup urb hjcwmdrgv.  Ad rxavdv
yrhemvr jq dfr rqqjgdv jq fmupgrpv jq sjomudrrgv eup pjuedajuv qgjc
wrjwor au eoo beotv jq oaqr.

Sjomudrrgv eup qaueuhaeo vmwwjgd dj wgjsapr sjomudrrgv badf dfr
evvavdeuhr dfrn urrp, av hgadaheo dj grehfaul Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc'v
ljeov eup ruvmgaul dfed dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc hjoorhdaju baoo
grceau qgrron eseaoeyor qjg lrurgedajuv dj hjcr.  Au 2001, dfr Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju bev hgredrp dj wgjsapr e vrhmgr
eup wrgceurud qmdmgr qjg Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc eup qmdmgr lrurgedajuv.
Dj oregu cjgr eyjmd dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju
eup fjb njmg rqqjgdv eup pjuedajuv heu frow, vrr Vrhdajuv 3 eup 4
eup dfr Qjmupedaju bry welr ed fddw://bbb.wloeq.jgl.


Vrhdaju 3.  Auqjgcedaju eyjmd dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr
Qjmupedaju

Dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju av e uju wgjqad
501(h)(3) rpmhedajueo hjgwjgedaju jgleuakrp muprg dfr oebv jq dfr
vdedr jq Cavvavvawwa eup lgeudrp dex rxrcwd vdedmv yn dfr Audrgueo
Grsrumr Vrgsahr.  Dfr Qjmupedaju'v RAU jg qrprgeo dex aprudaqahedaju
umcyrg av 64-6221541.  Adv 501(h)(3) orddrg av wjvdrp ed
fddw://wloeq.jgl/qmupgeavaul.  Hjudgaymdajuv dj dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl
Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju egr dex prpmhdayor dj dfr qmoo rxdrud
wrgcaddrp yn M.V. qrprgeo oebv eup njmg vdedr'v oebv.

Dfr Qjmupedaju'v wgauhaweo jqqahr av ojhedrp ed 4557 Croeu Pg. V.
Qeagyeutv, ET, 99712., ymd adv sjomudrrgv eup rcwojnrrv egr vheddrgrp
dfgjmlfjmd umcrgjmv ojhedajuv.  Adv ymvaurvv jqqahr av ojhedrp ed
809 Ujgdf 1500 Brvd, Veod Oetr Hadn, MD 84116, (801) 596-1887, rceao
ymvaurvv@wloeq.jgl.  Rceao hjudehd oautv eup mw dj pedr hjudehd
auqjgcedaju heu yr qjmup ed dfr Qjmupedaju'v bry vadr eup jqqahaeo
welr ed fddw://wloeq.jgl

Vrhdaju 4.  Auqjgcedaju eyjmd Pjuedajuv dj dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl
Oadrgegn Eghfasr Qjmupedaju

Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc prwrupv mwju eup heuujd vmgsasr badfjmd bapr
vwgrep wmyoah vmwwjgd eup pjuedajuv dj heggn jmd adv cavvaju jq
auhgrevaul dfr umcyrg jq wmyoah pjceau eup oahruvrp bjgtv dfed heu yr
qgrron pavdgaymdrp au cehfaur grepeyor qjgc ehhrvvayor yn dfr baprvd
eggen jq rimawcrud auhompaul jmdpedrp rimawcrud.  Ceun vceoo pjuedajuv
($1 dj $5,000) egr wegdahmoegon acwjgdeud dj ceaudeauaul dex rxrcwd
vdedmv badf dfr AGV.

Dfr Qjmupedaju av hjccaddrp dj hjcwonaul badf dfr oebv grlmoedaul
hfegadarv eup hfegadeyor pjuedajuv au eoo 50 vdedrv jq dfr Muadrp
Vdedrv.  Hjcwoaeuhr grimagrcrudv egr ujd muaqjgc eup ad detrv e
hjuvaprgeyor rqqjgd, cmhf wewrgbjgt eup ceun qrrv dj crrd eup trrw mw
badf dfrvr grimagrcrudv.  Br pj ujd vjoahad pjuedajuv au ojhedajuv
bfrgr br fesr ujd grhrasrp bgaddru hjuqagcedaju jq hjcwoaeuhr.  Dj
VRUP PJUEDAJUV jg prdrgcaur dfr vdedmv jq hjcwoaeuhr qjg eun
wegdahmoeg vdedr savad fddw://wloeq.jgl

Bfaor br heuujd eup pj ujd vjoahad hjudgaymdajuv qgjc vdedrv bfrgr br
fesr ujd crd dfr vjoahadedaju grimagrcrudv, br tujb jq uj wgjfayadaju
eleauvd ehhrwdaul muvjoahadrp pjuedajuv qgjc pjujgv au vmhf vdedrv bfj
ewwgjehf mv badf jqqrgv dj pjuedr.

Audrguedajueo pjuedajuv egr lgedrqmoon ehhrwdrp, ymd br heuujd cetr
eun vdedrcrudv hjuhrguaul dex dgredcrud jq pjuedajuv grhrasrp qgjc
jmdvapr dfr Muadrp Vdedrv.  M.V. oebv eojur vbecw jmg vceoo vdeqq.

Worevr hfrht dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Bry welrv qjg hmggrud pjuedaju
crdfjpv eup eppgrvvrv.  Pjuedajuv egr ehhrwdrp au e umcyrg jq jdfrg
benv auhompaul hfrhtv, juoaur wencrudv eup hgrpad hegp pjuedajuv.
Dj pjuedr, worevr savad: fddw://wloeq.jgl/pjuedr


Vrhdaju 5.  Lrurgeo Auqjgcedaju Eyjmd Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rorhdgjuah
bjgtv.

Wgjqrvvjg Cahfero V. Fegd av dfr jgalauedjg jq dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc
hjuhrwd jq e oaygegn jq rorhdgjuah bjgtv dfed hjmop yr qgrron vfegrp
badf eunjur.  Qjg dfagdn nregv, fr wgjpmhrp eup pavdgaymdrp Wgjzrhd
Lmdruyrgl-dc rYjjtv badf juon e ojjvr urdbjgt jq sjomudrrg vmwwjgd.


Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc rYjjtv egr jqdru hgredrp qgjc vrsrgeo wgaudrp
rpadajuv, eoo jq bfahf egr hjuqagcrp ev Wmyoah Pjceau au dfr M.V.
muorvv e hjwngalfd ujdahr av auhomprp.  Dfmv, br pj ujd urhrvvegaon
trrw rYjjtv au hjcwoaeuhr badf eun wegdahmoeg wewrg rpadaju.


Cjvd wrjwor vdegd ed jmg Bry vadr bfahf fev dfr ceau WL vreghf qehaoadn:

     fddw://bbb.lmdruyrgl.jgl

Dfav Bry vadr auhomprv auqjgcedaju eyjmd Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl-dc,
auhompaul fjb dj cetr pjuedajuv dj dfr Wgjzrhd Lmdruyrgl Oadrgegn
Eghfasr Qjmupedaju, fjb dj frow wgjpmhr jmg urb rYjjtv, eup fjb dj
vmyvhgayr dj jmg rceao urbvorddrg dj freg eyjmd urb rYjjtv.
